name: Iced Mochaccino Smoothie
directions: Place the espresso, chocolate syrup, sugar and milk in a blender and blend to combine.
Add the ice cream and blend until smooth.
Pour the mixture into two chilled glasses and top each with whipped cream and chocolate curls, or a dusting of cinnamon or cocoa.

name: Frosty Latte Smoothie
directions: In a large pitcher, whisk together coffee, milk and honey until thoroughly  combined and honey is dissolved; chill.
Just before serving; blend coffee  mixture with ice in blender until frothy and smooth.

name: Choco-Banana Wonder Smoothie
directions: Combine in a blender and mix until smooth.

name: Bink's Smoothie
directions: Blend in blender until smooth.
Tastes best if all ingredients are organic.

name: Mango Madness Smoothie
directions: Combine the buttermilk and yogurt in the blender.
Add the mango, lime juice, fresh and ground gingers.
With the blender running, add the ice cubes one at a time until the desired consistency is reached.

name: Blender Breakfast
directions: Combine banana, milk, honey and bran in blender or food processor.
Whirl until smooth.
Pour into tall glass.

name: Southwest Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in food processor workbowl fitted with steel blade or in blender container; cover and process on high speed until smooth.
Strain if using mango.

name: Banana and Kiwi Smoothie
directions: Peel and slice a banana.
Put it into a freezer-proof container and freeze for minimum 2 hours or overnight.
Peel and chop the kiwi fruits.
Place the banana, kiwi and milk in a blender.
Process until smooth.
Serve chilled!

name: Watermelon Smoothie
directions: Put ice in blender.
Add watermelon.
Add guava juice.
Blend on highest speed for 5 second.
and then on 2nd highest speed for 5 more seconds.

name: Banana Slush
directions: You also need an empty 4 litre ice cream pail or other container.
Boil sugar and water.
Juice the oranges and lemons, mix with sugar water, banana, and pineapple, and freeze in an ice cream pail.
To serve by the glass, fill half the glass with slush and top with 7-up, ginger ale, or grapefruit pop.
Add vodka or fruit-flavored alcohol for fun.

name: Mixed Berry Smoothie (Vegetarian)
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and puree until smooth.
Pour into glasses.

name: Melon-Papaya Batido
directions: In blender, combine all ingredients except watermelon garnish.
Process until smooth.
Taste for sweetness, adding sugar or lime juice as desired.
Pour mixture into tall glass and garnish with watermelon wedge.

name: Sweet Laddi
directions: In a large mixing bowl beat the yogurt with a whisk until smooth.
Whisk in the water, then the sugar, beat until frothy.
Pour into tall glasses and add ice cubes.

name: Pineapple-Banana Drink
directions: In blender or food processor combine all ingredients.
Cover and blend on high speed until smooth.

name: Berry slush
directions: In a blender combine lemonade and rum.
Add strawberry's and sugar.
blend until smooth.
With blender running, add ice cubes, one at a time though opening of the lid to make 8 cups of slushy mixture.
(if mixture becomes to thick add a little water.) garnish with strawberries.

name: Pink Ice
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender until smooth.

name: Pumpkin Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and blend well.
If desired, serve over ice and sprinkle with cinnamon.

name: Wake up Fruit Blend
directions: In a blender combine all ingredients.
Blend until smooth, about 30- 60 seconds.
Pour into glass and garnish with a dollop of yogurt and strawberries, if desired.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Banana and Ginger Wake-Up Call Smoothie

name: Mango Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients together until smooth, then serve.

similar.name: Shannon and Mark's Mondo Mango Smoothie

name: Eggnog Smoothie Special
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender; cover, blend until smooth.
Pour into a large chilled glass; garnish with a slice of same fruit used.

similar.name: Creamy Coffee Ice Cream Brandy Smoothie Dessert

name: Kiwi Commotion Smoothie
directions: Blend kiwis, banana, and frozen yogurt in a food processor or blender.
Add limeade concentrate and process until smooth.

name: Taste of India
directions: Blend bananas and ice cubes in a blender until chunky mixture forms.
Add remaining ingredients and blend until smooth.

name: Peanut Punch
directions: Place the shelled peanuts in an blender.
Pour water in gradually while blending the peanuts Blend thoroughly.
Strain mixture through a sieve lined with muslin, pouring in a little at a time.
Discard the contents.
Add milk and ingredients, then sweeten to taste.

name: Peanut Butter-Banana Blast
directions: Cut bananas into chunks.
Combine all ingredients in blender and puree until smooth and creamy.
Serve in chilled glasses with straws.

name: Jell-o Lime Margarita (Virgin) Smoothie
directions: In a blender, pour in boiling water then gelatin powder.
Cover and blend for a couple of seconds; scrape sides of container.
To blender, add the ice cream, milk, and pineapple; also add a few handfuls of crushed ice.
Replace cover and blend until smooth; serve immediately.

name: Bailey's Banana Colada
directions: In a blender combine the bananas and banana liqueur; blend until smooth.
Blend in the Irish cream and coconut cream (Note: Make sure the coconut cream is at room temperature, or you will not be able to pour it).
Finally, add the ice and blend until smooth.

name: Nancey's Yogurt Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender.
Blend until slushy.

similar.name: High Protein Strawberry Orange & Banana Shake

name: Frozen Nectarine Yogurt Smoothie
directions: Combine nectarines, water and honey in saucepan; cook over medium-high heat until nectarines are soft. Remove from heat.
Puree in blender or food processor. Stir in lemon juice, vanilla and apple juice. Chill until cool. Whisk yogurt into nectarine mixture.
Pour into an 8 X 8-inch pan and freeze until crystals form around edges, about 45 minutes. Stir crystals into middle of pan and return to freezer.
When lightly frozen through, whip mixture until light in color. Spoon into storage container and freeze until firm. Let soften at room temperature 10 minutes before serving.

name: Coffee-banana Smoothie
directions: Combine frozen bananas, milk, yougurt, cinnamon, and nutmeg ina blender container.
Cover and blend till smooth.
To serve, pour into glasses.
If desired, garnish with fresh banana slices and mint.

name: Strawberry Lime Twister
directions: Bring the strawberries, sugar, and water to a boil, and then simmer until the sugar is dissolved, about 10 minutes.
Allow the mixture to cool, then strain through a sieve, pressing to extract as much juice as possible.
Stir in the lime juice, and serve in tall glasses over ice.
Garnish with mint.

name: Smoothie
directions: Use a blender to mix together.

similar.name: Anything Goes Fruit and Nut Smoothie

name: Protein Fruit Smoothie
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients and blend until smooth.
Vary fruit as desired, use mandarins or fresh pineapple instead of the kiwi and banana, or add as much fruit as you like.
This is so delicious, you won't even know you are drinking buttermilk!

name: Orange Slurpy (Adult)
directions: In a blender place ingredients in order listed, spooning in ice cream in small scoops.
Cover and whirl till blended.
Serve in large chilled glasses with an iced tea spoon and straw.
Servings vary depending on glass size.

name: Strawberry Julius
directions: Slice up fresh strawberries until you have enough to fill a one cup measure.
Add to a blender or food processor, or if you only have a stick mixer, just put it in a large pyrex jug.
Add rest of ingredients.
Blend until smooth.
You may want to try this a little bit cooler for summer days, omit the water and add a few ice cubes.
I only leave out the ice cubes because my food processor can't handle hard ice.
Also it does tend to separate if you leave it sitting around for a minute, Don't let this put you off, just stir it up a bit, it tastes the same, just tends to be more frothy at the top then.

name: California Avocado Cooler
directions: Puree the avacados, add the grapefruit juice& sugar.
Chill.
Pour into ice filled glasses& garnish with a sprig of mint.

similar.name: Pineapple Melon Mint Cold Summer Soup
Minted Tomato, Rhubarb and Lime Cooler

name: Shannon's Cantaloupe Delight Smoothie
directions: Freeze fruit and defrost slightly before blending with milk.
Enjoy.

name: Shannon's Peach Raspberry Fantasy Smoothie
directions: Slightly defrost the frozen fruits.
Blend all in blender and enjoy, it's delicious.

name: Funky Purple Smoothie
directions: Process banana in a blender until pureed (about 30 seconds).
Add the black grapes and process again until smooth (15 seconds or so).
Now add the ice cubes and process until some of them are crushed.
Finally, add the milk, process until smooth, pour into a tall, pretty glass, and drink!

name: Golden Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Berry Blaster Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender.
Mix on low speed for 30 seconds then blend on high speed until smooth.

similar.name: Berry Blast Protein Shake -- Fruit Smoothie

name: Shannon's Orange Cranberry Chocolate Explosion Smoothie
directions: Freeze the fruit, I didn't and the drink wasn't cold enough.
Slightly thaw frozen fruit.
Blenderize, adding ice as needed to make thicker.

name: Strawberry Slush
directions: Reserve 2 strawberries for garnish, puree the remaining in a blender or food processor.
Add the remaining ingredients, blending well until smooth and foamy.
Garnish each serving with a fresh strawberry.

name: Gazpacho Cooler
directions: In food processor or blender, process tomatoes, cucumber, green pepper, onion and garlic until smooth.
Stir in tomato juice, vinegar, dillweed,hot pepper sauce, and pepper to taste.
Refrigerate at least 1 hour or until chilled.
Pour into glasses, garnish with alfalfa sprouts.

similar.name: Minted Tomato, Rhubarb and Lime Cooler

name: Raspberry Slush
directions: In lg bowl, mash berries, add ice cream.
In sm bowl, dissolve jello in water; add lemon juice.
Add to berry mixture; mix well.
Cover and freeze.
Remove from freezer, 15 minutes before serving.
Spoon into glasses; add soda.
Serve with spoon and straw.

name: Fresh 'N Fruity Energy Smoothie
directions: In a blender or food processor, puree all the ingredients until smooth and creamy.

name: Huhi-La Smoothie
directions: In a blender or food processor, puree all the ingredients until creamy.

name: Banana Date Shake
directions: In a blender or food processor, puree all the ingredients until thick and creamy.
If you like a thinner shake, use 1/2-3/4 cup more milk.

name: Best Ever Summer Cooler
directions: Put first 5 ingredients in blender.
Process at high until blended.
Add ice cubes, one or two at a time, until slushy.
Before you make the drink, you could: Invert pretty glass and dip into orange juice, and then sugar.
Let the glasses sit for 10 minutes, then fill.

name: Shannon and Mark's Mondo Mango Smoothie
directions: Prepare fruit and freeze in ziptop baggie until frozen solid.
Defrost fruit slightly in microwave.
Put fruit in blender and cover with the soy milk.
Slice through frozen fruit with a knife to help the blender out.
Blend, stoppping to slice through fruit if neccesary.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into 2 pretty parfait glasses and serve.

name: Orange Julius
directions: Add all of the ingredients together in blender.
Blend until smooth.
Add ice until mixture is desired thickness.

similar.name: Orange Julius With  the Secret Ingredient!

name: Rhubarb Cooler
directions: Cook rhubarb and water until rhubarb is tender.
Add sugar and gelatin and stir until dissolved.
Set aside to cool.
Whip chilled milk to whipped cream consistency.
Add cooled rhubarb mixture to whipped milk and refrigerate.
Serve chilled.

similar.name: Minted Tomato, Rhubarb and Lime Cooler

name: Pink Perfection Juice
directions: Combine all of the ingredients in a blender or food processor until smooth.
Cover and chill.
Before serving, shake or stir then pour into chilled glasses.

name: Knock You on Your Ass Slushy
directions: Thaw the lemonade.
Put it in the blender.
Fill the blender with some ice, but not too much.
Dump in vodka to fill the top to the blender or as much as you want.
Set blender on "crush" setting or whatever will chop up the ice.

name: Easy Peasy Low-Fat Creamy Fruit Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender; cover.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into tall glasses and serve!

name: Chocolate Mint Smoothie
directions: Heat 1/2 cup milk in microwave until heated, but not boiling.
Combine hot milk and cocoa mix in the blender and process until smooth.
Add remaining milk and extracts and blend well.
Add ice cream and process until mixture is smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Peach and Yogurt Smoothie
directions: Cut up the peaches removing the pits.
Puree the peaches in a blender.
Blend in the peach yougurt.
Add a hint o' mint on the side and serve.
Enjoy!

name: Berry Pink Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in the order listed into blender container.
Cover and blend on high until thick and slushy.
Pour into two tall glasses.
Top with whipped cream or nondairy whipped topping and garnish with a fresh strawberry.
Serve immediately.

name: Almond Peach Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and process until smooth and creamy.
This makes a great breakfast.

name: Kiwi Energy Smoothie
directions: In blender, combine all ingredients; blend until smooth.
Pour evenly into 4 chilled glasses.

name: The Healthiest Fruit Smoothie on Earth
directions: Simply blend all ingredients together, adding the soymilk and bananas first.
Serve in a glass or drink straight out of the pitcher, depending on convenience.

name: Pear Freeze
directions: Place all the ingredients in the blender (except mint leaves).
and puree until smooth and icy.
Pour into glasses and garnish with a mint leave in each.

name: Lemonade Slush
directions: In a blender,combine lemonade concentrate,milk,water,vanilla and food coloring.
Cover and process until blended.
While processing slowly add crushed ice.
Process until slushy.

name: Strawberry Patch Smoothie
directions: Process in blender until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve.
Note: This smoothie is on this thick side; for an easier to serve smoothie, add a little more juice to the blender.
Also, for a strawberries& cream option, add 1/4 cup half and half to the blender before mixing.
Fat-free half and half works fine.

name: Berry Brainstorm Smoothie
directions: Combine ingredients in blender.
Blend until smooth and frothy.

name: Apple a la Mode Smoothie
directions: Combine the frozen yogurt, applesauce, and apple juice in a blender.
Add the apple, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
Blend until smooth.

name: Rainforest Fusion Smoothie
directions: Combine ingredients in blender.
Mix until smooth and frothy.

name: Hawaii 5-0 Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and blend until smooth.
Hum Hawaii 5-0 theme song while drinking.

name: Ginger Tropical Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients to blender and process until smooth.

similar.name: Banana and Ginger Wake-Up Call Smoothie

name: Strawberry-Banana Swirl
directions: In blender, combine milk, pudding mix, bananas, and berries.
Blend on low for 1 minute, or until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

similar.name: One Second Strawberry Smoothie  Omg It's Orgasmic!

name: Orange Frosty
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and blend for 30 seconds.
Serve with garnish of orange slices.

name: Virgin Blue Lagoon
directions: Place all but pineapple slices and whipped cream in blender and blend until smooth and creamy Add more or less ice depending on the consistency you prefer.
Pour into a tall glass and garnish with whipped cream and pineapple slice.

name: Toots
directions: Blend till smooth.
Top with whipped cream and orange wedge.

name: Fresh Strawberry Mousse
directions: Rinse and stem berries.
Add in sugar, then crush.
Heat until sugar dissolves completely.
Add a pinch of salt.
Strain, and then chill.
Add lemon juice to berry mixture.
Fold in the whipped cream, and stiffly beaten egg whites.
Pour mixture into freezer trays or molding cups.
Freeze, without stirring.

name: Fruitie-Tootie Cooler
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender; cover and blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Summer Chill
directions: Blend the ingredients together to a smooth consistency.
Serve garnished with a wedge of fresh watermelon and a sprig of mint!

similar.name: Pineapple Melon Mint Cold Summer Soup

name: Melon Smoothie
directions: Combine half of the ingredients in a blender and fill with ice.
Blend until ice is crushed.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients.

name: Ayurvedic Lassi f(or warding off GAS and BLOATING)
directions: Blend for one minute.
Drink after lunch.
Dont forget to update me on the pleasant results.

name: Blueberry-Apple Frosty
directions: In food processor or blender, add all ingredients.
Whirl until smooth.
Serve in frosty glasses on a hot summery day.

name: Peach Melba Tofu Smoothie
directions: In blender, combine the first three ingredients; blend until smooth.
Add fruit, wheat germ and sugar; blend until smooth.
Serve immediately or can be kept refrigerated for up to 2 days.

name: Tropical Freeze
directions: Process all ingredients in blender until smooth.
Pour into serving glass.
Serve immediately.

name: Kool-Aid Cream
directions: Put all except ice in blender.
process until mixed.
add ice, one at a time and process until smooth.

name: Peach Creamsicles
directions: In a blender, whip the cream about 30-45 seconds.
Add the peaches and honey/sweetener.
Whir until smooth.
Pour into molds or paper cups, insert sticks and freeze.

name: Horlicks Banana Smoothie
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients; blend until smooth and frothy.
Serve immediately.

name: Zero Calorie Lemon Slushie
directions: Add the koolaid packet and equal packets to a blender.
Add the Ice then Water.
Throughly blend.
Stop every 10 to 12 seconds and mix the top ice to the bottom.
When throughly blended spoon to glasses and enjoy!

name: Creamsicle Papaya Smoothie
directions: Peel, seed, and coarsely chop papayas.
Add all ingredients to blender and process until smooth.

similar.name: Creamy Papaya and Coconut Milk Smoothie (Refresco De Lechosa)

name: Mixed Fruit Explosion Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and whip until smooth.

name: Mango Magic Cooler
directions: Peel mango and cut into cubes.
Put mango, milk, sugar, yogurt into blender.
Blend till smooth.
Pour into tall glasses and serve icy cold.
Sprinkle with cinnamon.

name: Soy Magic Smoothie (SMS)!
directions: This is a quick delicious recipe and a great way to sneak soy into the diet of someone who needs it but hates to take it.
Blend all the ingredients in a blender.
Process until smooth.
Then, all you have to do is serve it and watch it disappear!

name: Frozen Fruit Smoothie
directions: Blend fruit, yogurt and vanilla.
Sweeten to taste and serve immediately.

name: Quick As A wink Smoothie
directions: Add undrained tropical fruit salad and yogurt to blender.
Whirl until smooth.

similar.name: Easy Peasy Low-Fat Creamy Fruit Smoothie

name: 5 Minute Orange Smoothie
directions: Whip in blender until frothy.
Variation: for 1 cup orange juice, substitute 1 banana or 1 cup blueberries, strawberries, raspberries, pineapple, or sliced peaches.
or substitute frozen fruit for the ice.

name: Coffee Smoothie
directions: In blender, combine all ingredients.
Blend until frothy.
Pour into 4 cups and serve immediately.

name: Iced Strawberry Tea Smoothie
directions: Pour boiling water in medium bowl and add tea bags.
Cover and let steep at room temperature 30 minutes.
Remove tea bags and set aside on small plate.
When cool enough to handle, squeeze bags to get every drop of tea.
Chill several hours or overnight.
Process tea, frozen strawberries, sugar and ice cubes in 2 batches in blender until frothy.
Pour into chilled pitcher.
Serve in stemmed glasses garnished with strawberries and mint leaves.

name: Berry Frosty
directions: Combine first four ingredients in blender and process until smooth (If frozen berries are used, partially thaw before blending).
Pour into 4 glasses and slowly add soda to fill each glass.
Garnish with 2 to 3 berries and lemon wheel, if desired.

name: Orange Yogurt Nog
directions: Place yogurt, milk, and the thawed juice concentrate into blender.
Blend mixture until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Banana-Date Smoothie
directions: Blend all the ingredients until smooth.
Chill& serve.

similar.name: A Date With a Banana Smoothie

name: Martian Boogie Power Smoothie
directions: Process all ingredients in a blender until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve.

similar.name: Gingerly's Sunrise and Shine Power Smoothie

name: The Elvis Smoothie
directions: Add ingredients into blender.
Start blending on slow speed and gradually increase to high.
Blend until all ingredients are well combined.
Garnish with sliced banana.

name: Mochaccino Smoothie
directions: Add ingredients into blender.
Start blending on slow speed and gradually increase speed to high.
Blend until all ingredients are well combined.
Garnish with chocolate covered espresso beans or shaved chocolate.

name: Maple Blue Smoothie
directions: Combine yogurt, milk, syrup and cinnamon in a blender.
Add the blueberries and puree until smooth.

name: Peanut Butter Smoothie
directions: In a blender container, add all ingredients.
Blend together until smooth.

name: Strawberry Smoothie Drink
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend thoroughly.
Pour into a glass and serve immediately.

similar.name: Strawberry Orange Low Fat Yogurt Smoothie

name: Mmm...good Smoothie! and Easy Too.
directions: Add the ice cubes to blender and crush until they are many pieces.
Cut pear and apple into small pieces, and add them into the blender.
Include the 1/4 cup milk,and their you have it a great tasting smoothie!

name: Jo's Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Mix everything up in a blender and drink!
SIMPLE!

name: Delicious Dairy Free Smoothie
directions: Put all in blender and mix.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Peaches N Berries N Cream, Oh My!

name: The Best Smoothie (In My Opinion)
directions: Put all ingredients into a blender and blend away!
This makes an awesome breakfast and is filling and so good for you!
The best!

name: Soy Delicious Strawberry Banana Shake or Smoothie
directions: Blenderize, pour into a cute serving glass, insert straw and enjoy.
For a smoothie, freeze fruit in plastic zip top baggie and slightly defrost in microwave before dumping in blender and omit the ice cubes.

similar.name: Berry Wonderful Berry-Banana Vanilla Soy Smoothie

name: Banana Cocoa Smoothies
directions: Mix all ingredients in blender.
Cover and blend until smooth.

name: Pumpkin Pie Smoothie
directions: Combine pumpkin, evaporated milk, yogurt, sugar and pumpkin pie spice in a blender; cover.
Blend until mixture is smooth.
Pour into glasses; top with whipped cream; sprinkle with additional pumpkin pie spice.

name: Chocolate Banana Burst Smoothie
directions: Pour soy milk into blender.
Add protein powder, honey, tofu and bananas.
Blend.
Add ice cubes one at a time until smooth.

name: Salad Smoothie (for juicer or blender)
directions: Wash, trim and roughly chop all ingredients except garnish.
Blend in juicer or blender.
Pour into glass; garnish with scallion stirrer and cherry tomato.

name: Apple Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and process until smooth.
Pour into glasses, and garnish with additional cinnamon, if desired.

name: Cookies and Cream Smoothie
directions: Combine ice cream, cookies and milk in a blender.
Blend on medium speed for about 2 minutes or until well combined.

name: Hot Buttered Pineapple Smoothie
directions: In large saucepan, combine pineapple juice, brown sugar, butter, cloves and cinnamon sticks.
Bring to a boil.
Simmer 5 minutes.
Add lemon slices.
Serve hot in mugs.

similar.name: Pineapple Smoothie - Delicious, Easy and Healthy

name: Strawberry Apple Frost
directions: Combine all ingredients except reserved berries in blender container; process until frothy.
Divide into 2 stemmed glasses; garnish each serving with a strawberry.

name: Fruity Freeze
directions: Peel and slice the banana.
Peel and chop the kiwifruit.
Halve the strawberries.
If they are small add a few more.
Chop the pineapple into smaller pieces.
Lay all the fruit in a single layer in a dish or on a tray and put it all in the freezer.
When it has frozen solid place all the fruit into the blender along with the juice.
Blend until it's smooth and serve immediately.
It should be quite thick, similar to sorbet, so use a spoon.
This recipe is easily adapted to any fruit you may have.
I plan to use mangos in the summertime when they are abundant.

name: Indian Chai Tea or Smoothie
directions: Heat water to boiling.
Add tea bags; reduce heat.
Simmer 2 minutes.
Remove tea bags.
Stir in remaining ingredients.
Heat to boiling.
Stir with wire whisk to foam milk.
Pour into cups.
Variation: For refreshing Chai Tea Smoothies, refrigerate mixture until cold.
Pour Chai Tea into blender container, and add 1 cup crushed ice.
Cover and blend on high speed until smooth.

name: Banana-Cranberry Juice-Tofu Smoothie
directions: Break bananas into 3" pieces and put in blender.
Add the tofu in broken up pieces
Then pour cranberry juice in to almost cover.
Blend, adding more juice if mixture seems too thick.
Add maple syrup while blending.

name: Peach Cooler
directions: Put milk, peaches, and almond in blender container.
Process until smooth.
Add ice cream; process 3 seconds.

name: Strawberry Slush
directions: In blender combine all ingredients except ice and garnish and blend well.
Add ice and blend until thickened and smooth.
Cover and place in freezer until ready to serve.
To serve, pour into 4 glasses.
Garnish with fresh strawberries if you would like.

name: Orange fruity tuty delight
directions: blend a few seconds then.
add 6 full icecubes.
and crush/mix together.
mix together (orange juice,sugar, milk, then blend).
then add 6 full icecubes the blend/crush.

name: Peach Smoothie with a kick
directions: Cut cream cheese into chunks and put into blender container.
Drain peaches and reserve 3 tbl of syrup.
Add fruit, 3 tbl syrup and rum to blender and blend until smooth.
Stir in yogurt.
Pour into 4 dessert dishes and chill in freezer for 25 minutes.

name: Aloha Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients in blender and blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Peanut Butter-Chocolate Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Blend on high for 30 seconds.
Pour into glasses, garnish with fresh fruit.

name: Fruit Smoothies
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until smooth.

similar.name: The Healthiest Fruit Smoothie on Earth

name: Orange Smoothie
directions: Mix all ingredients in a blender until smooth.

name: Summer Breeze
directions: Blend all ingredients together until smooth, serve frozen garnished with banana slice.

name: Sensation Passion
directions: Blend all ingredients together until smooth, serve frozen garnished with a pineapple slice.

name: OMG Tropical Smoothie
directions: Very simple instructions for this incredible tasting, thick texture, amazingly tasty smoothie Add everything in your blender.
Mix on"cream" setting for 30-45 seconds.
Makes enough for 2 big glasses full so you can share!
Enjoy it, I know I will.

name: Cherry Berry Smoothie
directions: In the container of an electric blender, add all the ingredients.
Cover and process until mixture is smooth and well blended.
Serve immediately.

name: Extra Healthy Tropical Fruit Drink
directions: place all ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth/all combined.

name: Yummy Orange Slushies ( Orange Julius )
directions: Add first 4 ingredient to blender,then add enough ice to fill.
Blend till frothy.
And enjoy!

Orange Julius Ain’t Got Nothing on Us Smoothie

directions: Blend all other ingredients in blender until smooth then add ice cubes.
Grind to blended milk shake stage.

name: Valentine Smoothie
directions: In a blender container, add yogurt, banana, jam, honey, and food coloring.
Cover and blend on high until smooth and foamy.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

name: Wombat Surprise Shake
directions: Add fruit to blender and blend.
Add tofu next and then the other ingredients.

name: Goldilocks and the Three Berries
directions: To the container of an electric blender, add all the ingredients.

name: Pear-Berry Smoothie

Start blending on low speed and gradually increase the speed until the mixture is well blended and smooth.
