Add remaining 1 1/2 cups milk; stir until blended.
Serve at once or refrigerate and stir before serving.
Mixture thickens as it stands.

similar.name: Ultra Thick Minty Vegan Chocobanana Bliss

name: Berry Cheesecake Smoothie
directions: Process all ingredients in your blender until completely smooth and creamy.
Drink slowly and enjoy.

name: Tropical Lime Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender Cover and whiz to a thick golden puree.
Pour into glasses and serve.

similar.name: Blimey Limey from Tropical Smoothie Cafe

name: Apple Milk Drink (Sharbat)
directions: Peel and cube the apples.
Place in the blender with sugar, rose water and milk.
Whirl at high speed 15 seconds.
Serve, with ice if desired, in small glasses.

name: Perfect Orange Julius Clone
directions: Place all ingredients except for the ice cubes into a blender.
Add the ice cubes one by one until smooth.
Serve immediately-- enjoy!

similar.name: Orange Julius With  the Secret Ingredient!
Frothy Orange Delicious (Julius Copy Cat :) from Food Network's

name: Yogurt Breakfast Drink
directions: In a blender or food processor, combine the first four ingredients; cover and process until smooth. Add ice cubes; cover and process until smooth.
Pour into glasses; serve immediately.

name: Bananarama Punch
directions: PLACE drink mix, 1 cup of the water and bananas in blender container; cover.
Blend on high speed until smooth.
POUR into large plastic or glass pitcher; stir in remaining 3 cups water.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Stir in club soda when ready to serve.
Serve over ice cubes.

name: Delicious Citrus Mint Icee
directions: In blender container, combine all ingredients; blend at high speed until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Tangy Tropical Smoothie
directions: In blender, combine all ingredients; blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Mango Lassi (Indian yogurt drink)
directions: Add everything together in blender.
Blend for about 30 seconds.
Makes about 2 cups, drink with a straw!

name: Chopped Bug & Beetle Juice (After School Drink)
directions: In a large pitcher, combine the pineapple juice, fruit& raisins.
Divide the ice cream between 6 tall glasses.
Pour the juice mixture over the ice cream.
Add a drop of food coloring if you wish to each glass.
Serve immidiately.

similar.name: Super Duper Healthy for You Smoothie/Juice

name: Coffeemaker Mochaccino Frappe
directions: Brew the coffee ingredients using your regular coffee maker.
When coffee is brewed, stir in the sugar and chocolate syrup.
Add the milk to the coffee, this will help temper and cool the coffee.
Add ice to a blender.
Pour coffee mixture on top of ice, then add the half and half.
Blend until well combined.
Serve in a tall glass with additional ice if desired.
Garnish with whipped cream and a straw if desired.

name: Tutti-Fruity Tofu Smoothie
directions: Dump all ingredients in blender.
Do not thaw fruit.
Use pulse feature of blender until fruit is crushed and smooth.
Use liquify feature of blender for about 2 minutes to liquify and aerate the smoothie.
Pour in pretty glass and enjoy your delicious protein!

name: Passion & Fruit Whizz
directions: Peel banana and break into four or five pieces, place in blender.
Cut the passionfruit in half, scoop out the pulp and add with the blueberries to the blender, process until finely chopped.
Add milk, icing sugar and almonds, process until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Creamsicle Smoothie
directions: Blend all in blender until smooth.

name: Mango Ice-Cream Smoothie- Thai Style
directions: In a small bowl dissolve the custard powder in 2 to 3 tablespoons of cold water.
Bring the coconut cream to a boil in a heavy bottomed pan.
Now add the dissolved custard powder and stir till the mixture thickens enough to coat the back of a spoon.
Take off the fire and cool completely.
Chop half the mangoes into bite sized pcs and mash the other half.
Whip the cream till soft peaks form.
Blend the cooled custard with the cream and mangoes.
Pour into a shallow freezerproof dish (I find aluminium containers very good but you can use plastic too) and freeze till slushy.
Remove from the freezer and beat till smooth and creamy.
Freeze again till firm.
Remove and beat again and then freeze again.
Remove from the freezer and place in the refrigerator for 20 minutes before serving.
Top with roasted flaked almonds.

similar.name: Soft and Delicate Strawberry Coconut Mango Smoothie

name: The Peckham Peach Palouser
directions: Place a cup of yogurt in a blender or smoothie maker.
Add a chilled banana that has been sliced.
Add a cup of apple juice.
Add a cup of diced peaches.
Add 3 strawberries, sliced.
Add 4-5 ice cubes.
Blend until smooth.

name: Pear, Kiwi, Berry, Flax Seed Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients in order starting with yogurt and ending with pear into a Vita-Mix or blender. Process till smooth and creamy.
If using a blender grind seeds in a coffee grinder first.

name: Brandi's Gain Weight Smoothie
directions: combine all ingerdients in a blender.
put the dry ingredients in last to avoid settling in at the bottom.
blend for a few seconds.

name: Paradise Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender, and process until very smooth, almost to the point of frothy.
give it a little test taste, you may want to add a little more Splenda.
You may serve at this point, but it will taste even better if you put it in the fridge or freezer for 30 minutes or so.

name: Daily Energy Protein Smoothie
directions: Put liquid ingredients into the blender.
Start the blender with the lid on (cuts down on spraying).
Remove the lid and add the Banana, Fruit, Spirulina powder AND/OR the protein powder or silken tofu.
The drink will become'green' in colour because of the Spirulina.
Drink it anyway and you will be pleasantly surprised and more healthy!
(If you find it too 'tart', add non-caloric sweetener to taste)

name: Creamy Strawberry Breeze
directions: Place half the strawberries and juice in the blender, cover, process.
Add half the whipped topping, cover process until blended.
Pour into glasses.
Repeat with other half of ingredients.

name: Pumpkin Smoothie
directions: Add to a blender, or if you have a hand held mixer, just use one blade so it will stir it up or if you've got the muscles stir by hand.
Enjoy, ahh!

name: Nick and Ken's Fruity Twisters Smoothie
directions: Place yogurt, sliced banana, juices, cantaloupe, and strawberries in a smoothie maker or blender.
Pulse or mix for 15 seconds.
Add ice cubes and blend until mixture is smooth.

name: Frosty Summer Watermelon Cooler
directions: In a blender pour the apple juice and add the frozen bananas.
Add the chunks of watermelon.
Blend on high until the consistency of a drink.

name: Pear-ginger Smoothie
directions: Combine all of the ingredients in a blender and puree until smooth.

name: J & J Smoothie Delight
directions: Place a cup of yogurt in a blender or smoothie maker.
Add a chilled sliced banana.
Add all the juices.
Add a cup of diced cantaloupes.
Add several ice cubes.

similar.name: Jamba Juice at Home Apricot Affinity Smoothie

name: Prune-apple Smoothie
directions: In a small bowl, cover the prunes with hot water and let stand until plump, about 15 minutes.
Drain the prunes and let cool.
In a blender, combine the prunes with the remaining ingredients and puree until smooth.

name: Banana Maple Flip
directions: Put the peeled and halved banana, thick yogurt, egg and maple syrup in a food processor or blender.
Add 2 Tbs chilled water.
Process the ingredients constantly for about 2 minutes or until the mix turns a really pale creamy color and has a nice frothy texture.
Pour the banana and maple flip into a tall, chilled glass and serve immediately.
Decorate the glasses with an orange or lime slice, if desired.

name: Black Kiwi O'mango Smoothie
directions: Place yogurt, sliced banana, juices, kiwi and berries in a smoothie maker or blender.
Pulse or mix for 15- 30 seconds.
Add small ice cubes and blend into mixture is smooth.

name: Yummy Iced Chai
directions: In your coffee pot place two chai tea bags in the portion where the coffee goes.
Pour enough water in to make three servings of tea.
You can also heat up the water in the microwave and steep the tea bags until you get the desired strength tea.
Put Ice cream in blender.
Pour chai tea over ice cream.
Blend until smooth and cold.
You may have to add some ice in order to make it good and cold.
Serve in a nice glass and garnish with a sprinkle of cinnamon on top.

name: Yummy Low Calorie Smoothie
directions: Place orange drink, followed by yogurt, fruit, (soy) and ice cubes in a smoothie maker.
Mix the ingredients, for approximately 30 seconds, then smooth for 30 more.
Pour into a large glass and enjoy!
Adding the protein powder makes this a long lasting breakfast treat!
Feel free to try different mixes of frozen fruit for variety.

name: Take Me to Jamaica Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender container and blend like crazy until drink is frothy enough to suit you.
You may wish to add even more ice cubes, if you want it a little thicker.
Sit back, imagine yourself on a white sandy beach with the breeze blowing through your hair.
Now drink!

name: Watermelon-berry Wonder
directions: Combine and blend in a blender until smooth.

name: Phytochemical Super Shake
directions: Blend the tofu, carrots, fruit, wheat bran, wheat germ, flax, soymilk and orange juice.
Process on low speed, then increase to high for 1-3 minutes or until fully blended.

similar.name: Super Protein Chocolate or Mocha Smoothie/shake

name: Morning Fruit Shake
directions: Put all ingredients into blender.
Process on high 4-5 minutes or until smooth.

name: Strawberries Romanoff
directions: Slice the strawberries.
In a large bowl, toss three quarters of them with the sugar and orange liqueur.
Refrigerate at least 1 hour to macerate.
Put the ice cream in the refrigerator to soften.
Put the cream and half the macerated strawberries in a cold mixing bowl.
With an electric mixer, whip to soft peaks, about 12 minutes.
Fold in the ice cream.
Distribute the cream among 6 chilled bowls.
Mix the plain sliced berries with the remaining macerated berries and place on top of the cream.

name: Raspberry-Peach Iced Tea Smoothies
directions: In blender, combine raspberry, milk, tea mix, and yogurt; cover and blend on high speed until smooth.  Add half of peach slices; cover and blend on high until smooth.  Add remaining peaches and cover and blend once more until smooth.
Pour into glasses.  Cut the reserved thawed peaches into halves crosswise and garnish with peaches.

name: Mixed Berry Fruit Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender container.
Cover and blend until smooth.
Serve immediately garnished with fresh mint leaves and additional strawberries.

name: Lime Frosty
directions: Add the limeade concentrate, water and banana to blender container.
Cover and blend until smooth.
Add frozen yougurt to container and blend until smooth.
Serve immediately garnished with fresh lime slices.

name: Silver Magic Romantic Roses Lassi
directions: Leaving the ice cubes aside, blend all the remaining ingredients together in a blender.
Add ice cubes and blend again for 2 minutes.
Once the mixture is frothy, pour it into tall glasses, garnish with rose petals and mixed nuts such as chopped almonds and cashews, and serve with a smile!

similar.name: Aarsi’s Ultimate Strawberry and Rose Lassi

name: Nana Strawberry Smoothie
directions: Place in blender 1/4 cup of water.
Add banana, strawberries, sugar, and vanilla.
Blend until pureed.
Add ice and blend until well blended, check to see if ice is well incorporoated.
Pour into a glass and ENJOY!

name: Citrus Dream Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in the blender or food processor; cover.
Blend for 2 minutes at low speed; continue to blend at medium speed until smooth.
Serve in tall glasses.
For a lighter smoothie use orange sorbet instead of vanilla ice cream.

name: Island Fun Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in the blender or food processor; cover.
Blend for 2 minutes at low speed; continue to blend at medium speed until smooth.
Pour into tall glasses.
Garnish the glasses with a thin wedge of pinapple.

name: Frosted Creamy Coffee(booze)
directions: Put all ingredients into a blender.
Blend till smooth and frothy!

similar.name: Creamy Coffee Ice Cream Brandy Smoothie Dessert

name: Iced Mocha Latte
directions: Combine the Splenda Granular, cocoa, and coffee in a small bowl.
Gradually whisk in boiling water, whisking until blended.
Stir in 1 cup fat free half and half.
Pour mixture into ice cube trays.
Freeze 8 hours.
Pour the remaining 1 cup half and half in blender.
Gradually add frozen mocha cubes, blending until smooth.
Serve immediately garnished with chocolate curls and frozen whipped topping.

name: Nectarine "smoothie" Margaritas
directions: All measurements are approximate.
Cut fruit into 1 inch chunks; lightly pack in a 2-cup measuring cup.
Add sweet&sour mix to the 2-cup level (the amount will vary according to how tightly the fruit is packed- somewhere between 1/2 to 3/4 cup).
Add Sugar/Splenda if desired- but we never do.
Put into blender and blenderize for 1 minute.
Add tequila and ice and blenderize for another minute.
Enjoy!

name: Banana Faux-lada
directions: Combine light rum, Malibu, lime juice, sugar, bananas, and coconut in blender jar; blend until smooth.
Add enough ice to fill the jar and blend again until smooth.
Pour into hurricane glasses and garnish with coconut and cherries.

name: Kiwi Honeydew Smoothie
directions: In blender, combine kiwi fruit, melon, yogurt, soy milk and apple juice concentrate.
Blend until smooth.
Serve right away.

name: Daiquiri Smoothie
directions: Place ice, fruit, juice and sweetener in blender.
Blend until smooth, about 30-40 seconds.

similar.name: Blimey Limey from Tropical Smoothie Cafe

name: No Milk Vanilla Milk Shake
directions: Put all the ingredients in a blender until smooth.
Use more soy milk if you are having trouble getting the ice to blend.

similar.name: Super Protein Chocolate or Mocha Smoothie/shake

name: Banana -Orange Daiquiri Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
Garnish with an umbrella, orange and cherry, if desired.

name: Le Conte Sunrise Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until frothy.
Serve immediately.
Preparation time does not include time for freezing fruits.

name: Caribbean Dream Shake
directions: In a blender, place the ice cream, sherbert, fruit salad, juice concentrate and extract or 1-2 tablespoons rum; blend on medium sped 1 to 2 minutes, or until smooth and well blended.
Pour into 2 serving glasses; serve immediately.

name: Super Protein Chocolate or Mocha Smoothie/shake
directions: Blend the syrup, coffee, yogurt, soy milk, vanilla and protein powder in blender until smooth.
Add ice, blend again.
Serve.

name: Super Protein Black Cherry Shake/smoothie
directions: Blend together cherries, Kool Aid, soy milk, soy protein powder, Splenda and yogurt.
Add ice cubes, blend until smooth.
Enjoy.

similar.name: Super Protein Chocolate or Mocha Smoothie/shake

name: Banana Pb Chocolate Shake
directions: Blend all ingredients until very smooth.
Variations:Leave out banana for a PB Chocolate Shake.
Leave out banana and PB and add 2 tablespoonss soy yogurt for a Chocolate Shake.

name: Apple Juice Frosty
directions: Combine ice cream and apple juice.
Beat until foamy.
Pour into glasses.
Top each serving with a sprinkle of cinnamon.

name: Calypso Smoothie
directions: In a blender, combine the coffee and banana and process until smooth.
Add the ice cream and rum, if desired.
Blend at high speed until thick and smooth.
Pour into a tall glass and sprinkle with cinnamon.

name: Mango, Peach Cream With a Hint of Mint
directions: Place all in a vita mix or blender and blend on high to get it nice and airy and smooth.
Garnish with slices of mango, peach and mint leaves.

name: Banana Kahlua Smoothie
directions: Place bananas and Kahlua in blender.
Cut frozen Cool Whip into chunks and add to the blender.
Blend at high speed until smooth.
Add half the crushed ice and blend again.
Add the remainder of the ice and blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.
**Thiscan also be frozen for several hours and served a a soft-serve style ice cream.
(Adults only, please).

name: Heart Healthy Smoothie
directions: Add ice to blender with juice.
Add remaining ingredients and blend until thick, ENJOY.

name: Lemon Frappe
directions: Combine first 3 ingredients in container of an electric blender; cover and process until smooth, stopping once to scrape down sides.
Pour into a serving pitcher; add ginger ale.
Serve immediately.

name: Cocoa Banana Smoothie (fat Free)
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender and mix.
Serve immediately.

name: Strawberry Daiquiri
directions: Combine all ingredients together in blender until all the ice is crushed.
Add more or less ice-cubes for the right texture.

name: Sierra Frozen Fruit Smoothie
directions: Place both ingredients into a blender or use a hand held blender and mix together until smooth.
Drink and enjoy immediately!

similar.name: Tangy Raw Smoothie Treat - Pomegranate & Berry

name: Orange Peach Smoothies
directions: In a blender, combine the peaches, milk, orange juice concentrate and extract; add ice cream, cover and process until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

name: Pineapple Pleasure
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender, and process until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Cherry Pineapple Smoothie
directions: Put the apple juice in a blender and'liquidify' for 20-30 seconds.
Add all the juice from the can of pineapples and 5 pineapple slices.
'mix'contents until the pineapples are no longer solid.
Add 8 maraschino cherries and 1/2 cup of the maraschino juice'blend or mix' until the cherries are liquid-like.
When this is done you should have a thick red liquid with some foam.
If you wish to make this drink last longer just add water, but don't add more than 1 1/2 cups or it will lose it's tangy taste.

name: Starbucks Frappuccino Blended New and Improved Recipe
directions: In your blender first add your ice cubes.
Then pour in 1/2 cup of whole milk.
Pour in 2 tablespoons of half & half or heavy cream.
1 tablespoon of sugar.
Blend on high until ice is crushed.
Top with 2 tablespoons of Redi-Whip heavy whipped cream.
Espresso should be used hot, as this makes the blending of the ice even easier and makes it creamier! You can use room temperature espresso also,.
This recipe makes a tall Frappacchino. Enjoy!

name: Pumpkin Smoothie
directions: Combine half and half,pumpkin,frozen yogurt or ice cream,sugar,1/4 teaspoon cinnamon and the nutmeg in food processor or blender;process or blend until smooth and creamy.
Divide among four glasses;top each with 2 tablespoons Cool Whip and sprinkle with remaining cinnamon.

name: Espresso Without a Machine Using a Single Serve Coffee Maker
directions: Place 1/4 cup of fine ground coffee in your coffee makers brewing basket.
Pour 1/2 cup of cold water into your coffee maker and brew, this recipe should give you 1/4 cup of brewed espresso.

name: Best Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients in order of appearance in a blender.
Blend on high for 1 minute.
Enjoy!

similar.name: The Healthiest Fruit Smoothie on Earth
Easy Breakfast Smoothie for Growth-Spurt Kids

name: Meal Replacement Fruit Smoothies
directions: Pour milk or fruit juice into smoothie maker or blender (ALWAYS add all liquid ingredients to smoothie maker or blender FIRST).
Add instant breakfast powder and Splenda, if using, to smoothie maker or blender.
Add frozen yogurt to milk mixture.
Add fruit to smoothie mixture.
Place top on blender or top and stir stick on smoothie maker and blend well.

Note: Larger chunks of fruit will not be as easy to measure, either measure them out before freezing and store in single-serving containers or use twice the amount of frozen fruit in blender or smoothie maker.
If mixture is too thick when blended add a little more milk or fruit juice until desired consistency.
Pour and enjoy!

name: Easy Strawberry Limeade
directions: Mix the limeade and ice in the blender until smooth.
Add the strawberries and banana.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into glasses.
Top with cherries.

similar.name: Strawberry Limeade Slush Weight Watcher's Style

name: Boozy Dirty Banana
directions: Fill blender 3/4 way with ice.
Add all the ingredients and blend well.
Note: simple syrup is a mixture of 1/2 water& 1/2 sugar that is simmered til sugar is dissolved& cooled.

name: Winter Smoothie
directions: In a blender combine all ingredients; blend until combined.
Pour into one tall glass.

name: Avocado Milkshake
directions: Mix everything in a blender until smooooooth.
If you want it thicker, add more ice, if you really like vanilla, add more!
this is a very flexible recipe and really satisfying!

similar.name: High Protein Strawberry Orange & Banana Shake

name: Avocado Smoothie
directions: Scoop out the avocado and put in a blender.
Add the cream and blend until smooth.
Gradually add milk, vanilla, honey and sugar.
Serve in chilled glasses.

name: Eggnog Smoothie
directions: Put banana pieces and egg nog in the blender.
Puree/Pulse mixture until smooooooooooth.
Garnish w/nuts of your choice,& a sprinkle of nutmeg if desired.

name: Em and Mommy's Need It Fast Smoothie
ingredients: fat-free sugar-free instant vanilla pudding mix
directions: Put the milk into the blender.
Add the pudding mix.
Add the frozen fruit and blend.
Serve immediately.

name: Emeril's Mango Lassi
directions: Blend all ingredients (BESIDES THE YOGHURT) on high speed for 30 seconds.
Toss in the yoghurt and process for 45 seconds or until frothy.
Chill and serve.

name: Canistel Milk Shake
directions: Mix the canistel and 1/2 cup of cold milk together in a blender.
Add the ice cream and the remainder of the milk and continue to blend.
Serve at once.

name: Strawnanna Smoothie
directions: Mix fruit, milk, yogart, and sugar until blended.
Add ice slowly and let blend.
Once finish serve out of the blender, or put in the freezer to make it extra cold.

name: Frothy Orange Julius
directions: Put all in the blender.
Blend till smooth.

similar.name: Frothy Orange Delicious (Julius Copy Cat :) from Food Network's

name: Cajun Banana Smoothie
directions: Place bananas& strawberries in a bowl and freeze.
Remove after frozen& place in a blender.
Add skim milk, yogurt, orange peel,& sugar.
blend at medium speed until thick.
Add rum& brandy.
Pour into a chilled champagne saucer.
Arrange strawberries,banana slices,& mint on long toothpicks.
Rotate into drink& serve.
Varation: you could use about any berry in this and it will still be great.

name: Healthy Coconut Parve Soy-Free "Milk"-Shake
directions: Mix everything except the frozen raspberries until blended.
Add the frozen raspberries and let blend.
Serve out of the blender, or put in the freezer.

name: Pineapple Punch
directions: You will also need: 1 large jug with a cover.
Simply put all ingredients in a large jug and mix well. Add ice cubes, mix again; place in fridge to keep cool and serve.
If you do find it a bit sweet, add some water but that is really what the ice cubes are for as well as cooling it down faster.
Always have the condensed milk at room temp as you will be able to work with it better.
This always goes down well at barbeques or large parties; make sure you make enough as they always ask for more.

name: Banana "Smoothie" for Babies Who Need Fattening Up
directions: Pour cold water into blender.
Add formula powder (using 1 1/2 times as much formula as is normal will both provide extra nutrition and help thicken the"smoothie").
Place lid on blender and blend until mixed.
Add fresh banana and blend until smooth.
Add frozen banana cubes one at a time and blend until smooth.

If bananas are not very ripe and sweet, you may add blackstrap molasses and blend to sweeten; blackstrap molasses is high in iron and calcium and is an ideal sweetener for babies who need extra nutrition, but if you're using very ripe bananas, you probably won't need it.
Serve cold in your child's favorite cup.
Refrigerate left-overs you haven't poured into the cup up to 48 hours, but discard anything your child leaves in the cup; anything exposed to her saliva is unsafe for future consumption.

name: Westglow Spa Health Cocktail With Tofu and Cantaloupe
directions: Blend well (in blender).
serve.

name: Fruit Smoothie for Babies or Toddlers
directions: Put all ingredients in blender.
Blend until smooth.

name: Orange Julius With  the Secret Ingredient!
directions: Add ice and water to blender and turn on high for a few seconds.
Add orange sections about 5 at a time, blending a little as you go.
Add the other ingredients in whatever order and blend until smooth.
Taste.
Add more creamer or sugar if necessary.
I use small to medium size seedless, sweet oranges.

similar.name: Frothy Orange Delicious (Julius Copy Cat :) from Food Network's
Orange Julius... a Special Twist on an Old Favorite

name: Bubble Lychee Banana Smoothie
directions: Cook tapioca pearls according to instructions on package.
(usually 2 parts water to one part of pearls; about 6 minutes for 1/3 cup large pearls).
After draining pearls, sprinkle them with the teaspoon sugar and brown sugar.
Set tapioca pearls aside.
Blend together lychee, banana, tofu, ice cubs, milk, yogurt, and sugar.
Put pearls in bottom of a cup.
Pour smoothie mixture over pearls.
Drink immediately with jumbo straw or spoon!

similar.name: One Honey of a Banana-Peach Smoothie

name: Afternoon Smoothie
directions: Put juice and ice cubes in a blender; mix until ice cubes are completely chopped.
Add raspberries and apples; mix until completely blended.
Scoop in yogurt and add Splenda; blend to desired consistency.

name: Smoothie - Quick Sob (No Dairy)
directions: Peel tangelo, section, and remove white strings.
Place in blender.
Hull strawberries and cut in quarters.
Place in blender.
Add Splenda or sugar to blender.
Peel banana and place 1 inch chunks in blender.
Place ice cubes in blender.
Blend (I use"food processer" speed on my Cuisinart) for 30-40 seconds until smoothie reaches desired consistency.
The blender may need to be jiggled at the beginning as there is no liquid in the bottom.

name: Guava Apricot -Nana Smoothie
directions: Place the apricots and the bananas in a container and frezze overnight.
Place all ingredients in blender and blenderize.
Stop and chop at fruit with a knife to help the blender.
Blend until smooth.
I think this would be even better with rum in it.
Pour drink in glass, insert straw-- close your eyes and imagine yourself on a tropical island.
Drink slow and enjoy.
I have since made this smoothie without the coconut milk and it is also good that way, just use 3/4 cup guava nectar.

name: Blueberry Soy Smoothie
directions: Place 1 cup juice in blender.
Place 1 cup of blueberries in blender.
Pulse several times.
Add 2 cups of soy milk in blender, and mix high speed until smooth.

name: Passionberry Smoothie
directions: Blend all until very smooth.
Enjoy.

name: Jessica's Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Put ingredients into blender.
blend until smooth; about 45-60 seconds.

name: Super Healthy-No Fat Smoothie
directions: Peel, seed and cut the apple and orange into large chunks.
Put the chunks in the blender with the water, and, honey, some sugar, or fake sweeetner, if desired.
Blend until it is thick, it takes a minute or two, and I went up to the higest blender setting to get it really smooth.
Pour into a glass and have as part of a really healthy breakfast.
Can use an apple and a pear, as an alternative.
Or other fruit would work as well.

name: Lori's Southern Style Lemonade Slushie
directions: You will also need: 6 straws, cut in half.
Place ice in a blender, add all ingredients except for the whole slicing/garnishing lemon, red raspberries, mint and empty lemon shells.
Blend all ingredients until completely smooth.
Fill each lemon rind shell full with the lemon slushie.
Place 3 red raspberries, mint sprig and lemon slice decoratively atop the lemon slushie.
Add straw.
Place in freezer (yes, the straw and all) for about 30-45 mins just enough to ice craze the slushie and allow the berries to slightly freeze.

name: Banana Oatie
directions: Mix ingredients.
Add ice to thicken.
Enjoy!

name: The All-day Protein and Energy Smoothie
directions: Mix everything in a blender (first liquids, then solids) and blend to desired texture.
Taste it.
Enjoy it.

name: "The Elvis" Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender.
Blend until very smooth.
Serve immediately.
For a vegan smoothie, make with soy milk and soy yogurt.

name: Peanut Butter Banana Protein Smoothie
directions: Break apart banana slices as well as you can, by using a butter knife or pounding them on counter.
It is not necessary to have all pieces separated, depending on the power of you blender (my Oster has no problem with this).
Put all ingredients in blender.
Start on low chop or grind setting, as if trying to blend ice.
When all of the banana slices have been blended and are no longer visible, blend for 30 seconds on blend mode.
Serve immediately.

name: Peachy Keen Smoothie
directions: Blend until very smooth.
Enjoy.

name: Avocado, Pineapple and Apricot Smoothie
directions: Peel and remove stone from avocado.
Cut into chunks and place in blender.
Add pineapple juice and apricot yoghurt.
Blend until smooth.

name: Guava - Mango Licuado (smoothie)
directions: Put all ingredients except mint sprig into blender.
Blend until smooth.
Strain to remove seeds and fibrous bits.
Garnish with mint spring.
Drink (with a straw if you like!).

name: Banana Smoothie
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a blender and liquidise into a smooth purée.
Serve immediately.

name: Berry Wonderful Berry-Banana Vanilla Soy Smoothie
directions: Starting with banana's put all ingredients except ice into blender.
Blend until smooth and creamy, about 3-4 minutes.
Add ice cubes, this will thicken and lighten the color of your smoothie.
Pour into glasses, and use a straw. YUM!

similar.name: Soy Delicious Strawberry Banana Shake or Smoothie

name: Creamsicle in a Glass
directions: Peel and break apart the orange and add to blender along with the zest, soy milk, tofu, vanilla, sweetner and ice cubes.
Blend until smooth and frothy, about 30 seconds.
Pour into tall, chilled glasses and garnish with an orange slice if desired.

name: Apricot, Cashew Smoothie
directions: Add all of the ingredients in order listed into a blender and blend till smooth.
Add more ice water if needed.

similar.name: Anything Goes Fruit and Nut Smoothie

name: Super Oatmeal Smoothie
directions: Put everything in blender and blend until smooth.

name: Tall and Tangy Tofu Thangy
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth. Enjoy!

name: Sugar-free Smoothie
directions: Hull and wash the Strawberries.
Peel and slice the Banana.
Put everything into the blender and blend on
high speed until smooth.
Pour into a glass and enjoy!

name: Atkins Yogurt- Strawberry Banana Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients to blender.
Use ice breaker mode on blender to chop fruit and ice.
Then finish blending and enjoy.

similar.name: Strawberry Banana Yogurt Shake  (Three Hour Diet)

name: Too Easy Smoothy
directions: Roughly chop strawberries.
Combine all ingredients in blender, and blend until smooth.
I like a slightly sweeter smoothy, and so I add 1 packet of sweet "n" low.  Then I put it in the freezer for about 5 mins to make it REALLY cold :).

similar.name: Easy Peasy Low-Fat Creamy Fruit Smoothie

name: Virgin Pina Colada Smoothie
directions: Blend ingredients until frothy and serve icy cold.
Makes about 3 cups.

similar.name: "if You Like Pina Coladas" Protein Smoothie

name: Strawberry Fling Smoothie
directions: Whir all ingredients in blender until smooth. Chill.
Makes about two 10-oz. servings.

name: Banana Bavaria Smoothie
directions: Whir all ingredients in blender.
Makes 1 serving.
Top with scoop of ice cream, if desired.

name: Papaya Mooed Smoothie
directions: Puree all ingredients in blender. Chill.
Makes about two 9-oz. servings.

name: Chilled Cucumber and Dill Smoothie/ Dip
directions: Whir all ingredients in electric blender until smooth and thick. Chill.
Makes about two 9-oz. servings, -or- serves up to eight if used as a dip.
Garnish with snipped fresh dill.

name: Avocado Pastoral Smoothie or Dip
directions: Whir all ingredients in blender until smooth.
Makes about 1 quart.
Makes a lovely refreshing drink, or serve as a dip for fresh veggies.

name: Tomato Mary Smoothie
directions: Whir in blender until carrots are pureed and mixture is smooth as possible.
Makes about 1 quart.

name: Vanilla-pear Smoothie
directions: Combine the pears, lemon juice, vanilla and yogurt in a blender and puree until smooth.
Use the apple juice or pear nectar to thin the smoothie to the desired consistency.
Sweeten to taste with maple syrup.

name: Vanilla Peach Smoothie
directions: In a blender, combine peaches, ice cream, ice cubes, rum and schnapps and blend until smooth.
Pour into 4 frozen glasses.

name: Orange Breakfast Dream
directions: In a blender, combine the orange juice, soy milk, tofu, honey, orange zest, vanilla and ice cubes.
Blend until smooth and frothy, about 30 seconds.
Pour into tall, chilled glasses and garnish each glass with an orange segment.

name: Pineapple-Lime Pacific Smoothie
directions: Blend or beat all ingredients until smooth.
Makes 1 1/2 quarts.

similar.name: Awesome Orange, Coconut and Banana Smoothie

name: Extreme Chocolate Low Carb Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients in a blender on ice-crusher mode until mixture is drinkable, but still chunky.

name: Creative Native
directions: Add all liquid ingredients in blender and set on frappe till the drink is the consistency of a smoothie.
You can serve this in a frosty hurricane glass and top off with whipped cream as desired.

name: Honey and Vanilla Breakfast in a Glass
directions: Combine all ingredients in a cup; whisk together thoroughly. Serve chilled.

name: Sylvie's Sunshine Smoothie
directions: Roughly chop all the fruit and put in a blender.
Blend until pureed.
Add yoghurt, juice and ice and blend for another minute or two until smooth.
Serve immidiately and enjoy!

name: Pineapple Coconut Juice
directions: Place ingredients alernating them through the hopper.

name: Blueberry-orange Whirl
directions: In an electric blender, whirl all ingredients until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Pink Panther
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
If you want you can freeze the yoghurt before using.
Serve immidiately.

name: Nut-nana Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender container in order listed.
Secure lid and turn on low increasing to high speed.
Blend for 30 seconds or until well blended.
Pour into 2 tall glasses and enjoy!

similar.name: Anything Goes Fruit and Nut Smoothie

name: P M S Smoothies
directions: Add yogurt, milk, and honey.
Add pineapple and blend.
Add mango and strawberries; blend until smooth.

similar.name: Easy Peasy Low-Fat Creamy Fruit Smoothie

name: Minty Yoghurt Drink
directions: Put all ingredients into a blender or food processor and process until mixture is smooth or frothy.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Mint and Spinach Power Smoothie (And so Tasty!)

name: Icee Frappe
directions: Drizzle caramel against the side of the inside of a clear glass.
Blend together all ingredients.
Pour into clear glass and serve.

name: Triple Berry Lime Smoothies
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients.
Blend until smooth.

name: Strawberry-papaya Passion
directions: In blender, combine yogurt and milk; add papaya, strawberries and honey. Add ice cubes. Cover and blend until nearly smooth.

name: Ginger Peach Smoothies
directions: Pour apricot netar into blender; add peaches, honey and ginger. Cover and blend until smooth.

name: Kiwi-Melon Coolers
directions: Line baking sheets with plastic wrap.
Arrange melon and kiwifruit in single layer on baking sheet.
Cover with plsatic wrap and freeze until firm.
Pour apple juice into blender; add fruit. Cover and blend until smooth.

name: Super Soy Smoothies
directions: In blender, combine soy milk and juice concentrate; add peach slices and banana. Cover and blend until smooth. Add ice cubes. Cover and blend until nearly smooth.

similar.name: Soy Delicious Strawberry Banana Shake or Smoothie

name: Citrus Sunrise
directions: Pour tangerine juice blend into blender; add grapefruit sections, lime juice, and honey. Add ice cubes. Cover and blend until nearly smooth.

name: Tofruity Sippers
directions: In blender, combine orange juice, mango, strawberries, and tofu. Cover and blend until smooth.

name: Cucumber Honeydew Smoothies
directions: In blender combine honeydew melon, cucumber, lime juice, and salt. Cover and blend until smooth.
If desired, garnish each serving with cucumber slices and/or lime wedges and honeydew melon chunks threaded onto skewer.

name: Carrot Apple Smoothies
directions: In covered small saucepan, cook carrot in the boiling water about 15 minutes or until very tender; do not drain. Cool slightly.
Transfer carrot mixture to blender. Add apple juice. Cover and blend until smooth. Chill before serving.

name: Pineapple Orange Wave
directions: In blender, combine yogurt and orange juice; add pineapple and banana. Cover and blend until smooth.

name: Peach Royale
directions: If desired, set aside four fruit slices for garnish.
In blender, combine milk and juice concentrate; add remaining fruit, sugar and vanilla. Cover and blend until smooth.
Add ice cubes. Cover and blend until nearly smooth.
If desired, garnish each serving with reserved fruit.

name: Brazilian Avocado Shake
directions: Add all ingredients into a blender and blend on high for about a minute.
Enjoy!

name: Papaya Strawberry Soymilk Smoothies
directions: In blender, combine soymilk and orange juice; add papaya, strawberries, and, if desired, protein powder and honey. Cover and blend until smooth.

name: Strawberry  Malted-smoothie
directions: 1.   Pour the water in the blender.
2.   Add powdered milk & mix well.
3.   Add the sugar, stir thoroughly.
4.   Add the vanilla,malted powder,stir.
5.   Slowly put in the frozen strawberries.
until the mixture looks thick.
6.   You can top this smoothie with a.
strawberry that has been dipped in
sugar.
**   Cut the fresh strawberries in half,.
& freeze in bags.

similar.name: Strawberry Smoothie With Hint of Chocolate

name: Strawberry Limeade Slush Weight Watcher's Style
directions: Fill 1 cup measuring cup with ice and then water to make one cup.
Blend in a blender or food processor and pulse until crushed.
Add the strawberries, sweetener and limeade. Puree until smooth and thick.

name: Summer Melon Smoothie
directions: Place ice cubes in heavy-duty plastic bag and pound with mallet or hammer until coarsely crushed.
In blender, combine melon, ice and powdered sugar. Cover; blend until almost smooth.

name: Strawberry Soup
directions: In a food processor or blender combine all the strawberries, 1 cup yogurt, confectioners' sugar, orange juice and extract process until smooth.
Garnish each serving with a dollop of remaining yogurt.

similar.name: Strawberry Orange Low Fat Yogurt Smoothie

name: Strawberry Yogurt Cooler
directions: Combine ingredients in blender or food processor.
Process until smooth.
Pour into chilled glasses and serve.

name: Dimpled Duchess
directions: Use a blender to make these drinks.
Blend the ice cream and liqueur together until thoroughly blended.
Pour into a pretty glass and serve.

name: Strawberry-maple Smoothie
directions: In a blender, whirl strawberries with banana, milk, maple syrup and ice cubes. Blend until frothy. Pour into a glass or for fun into a large marguerita glass.
Garnish with sliced Strawberry and banana.

name: Berry Banana Bliss
directions: Add all ingredients to blender.  Blend until smooth and thick.  Enjoy!

name: Strawberry Julius Copycat
directions: Blend all ingredients in a blender on high or 1-2 minutes.
Serve.

name: Almond Smoothie - Steak Shake
directions: place almonds in blender with water and leave overnight (if you forget this step, just do it all in the morning. It still works great.).
In morning, blend mixture on high for 3 minutes.
Add soy milk, carob powder and bananas (whole is fine). Blend 1 minute.
Add ice, blend half a munute.
Pour and enjoy!
LeChaim!
Have a great almond-powered day.

similar.name: Super Protein Chocolate or Mocha Smoothie/shake

name: Pineapple and Banana Smoothie
directions: Put everything into a blender and blitz until all the ice cubes have been crushed.  Poor into a large glass and drink through a straw - bliss!

name: Passionate Mango Freezer
directions: Put your mango, strawberries, passion fruit juice and ice in a blender for 45 seconds until fulling processed and creamy.
Pour into a glass and garnish with mint.

name: Cheery Cherry Smoothie
directions: If you're not used to wheat germ try 1 tbsp first. If you really like wheat germ you can increase amount for added fibre and nutrition content.
Put all ingredients in blender and blend to desired consistency.
If it's thicker than you like add additional orange juice a little at a time. If it's thinner than you like add additional ice cubes.
If you use frozen cherries instead you may need less ice cubes.

name: Orange Colada
directions: Blend ingredients, except garnish, together until smooth.
Serve with orange slice.

name: My Little Smoothy With Grapes
directions: Grind flax seeds in a coffee grinder for about 30 seconds.
Slice and peel apple, and save 4 thin slices.
Combine the ground flax with remaining ingredients in blender, and blend until smooth.
Pour into a plastic glass, and place in the freezer for about 2-5 minutes if you want it really cold.
Dip the remaining thin slices of apple into the smoothy, and enjoy!
(The "optional" ingredients are in there to make it more filling, and more healthy).

similar.name: Banana, Blueberry, Mixed Greens, Yogurt Smoothie
The Healthiest Fruit Smoothie on Earth

name: Sensational, Powerful, Strawberry Protein Smoothie
directions: Fill your smoothie maker with the 200mls of water.
Add your protein powder.
Then the banana.
Ditto the strawberries.
And finally the ice.

If your smoothie maker has the 'Mix' function, hit that for 10 seconds, then step up to smooth for 30 seconds. If your smoothie maker only has the smooth function, press that for roughly 40-50 seconds.
Serve in a prechilled glass (just to keep it nice and cold!).
And i hope you enjoy :-).

name: Peach-Raspberry Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients well in blender and drink.

name: Strawberry Lassi
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender canister.
Blend on high until smooth.

name: Strawberry Orange Low Fat Yogurt Smoothie
directions: Combine yogurt, strawberries, orange juice, mint, sugar and ice in blender.
Pulse until well blended and ice is crushed.
Serve in tall glass.

similar.name: High Protein Strawberry Orange & Banana Shake

name: Paradise Freeze
directions: Combine all in blender and mix until smooth & thick.
(Maybe a shot or so of Bacardi Limon might taste pretty good in it too!).

name: Virgin-Twisted Strawberry Colada
directions: Make this just before you are ready to serve.
Make both drink mixes according to directions substituting any alcohol for water.
Pour the two together in a tall glass, turning it to create a twist w/ the colors.
Place a squirt of whipped cream on top.

name: Blueberry-Banana Batido
directions: Place everything in blender.
Blend until smooth.
Serve and enjoy!

name: Banana Smoothie
directions: 1. Add the soy milk, banana and splenda
2. Add the ice.
3. Blend together and enjoy.

name: Iced Coffee Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients, in order, to blender or smoothie maker.
Blend until smooth.  This will be pretty thick because of the amount of ice.
Enjoy!

name: Strawberry Lemonade Slush
directions: Stir strawberries and sugar together and let stand 30 minutes.
Process half of strawberries, 1 cup water, 3/4 cup lemon juice and 2 cups ice cubes in a blender until smooth.  Repeat with remaining ingredients.
Serve immediately.

name: Watermelon Slurpee
directions: Place ingredients in order listed in blender.
Secure lid, flip the switch and quickly increase speed to high.
Run until smooth and ice is crushed.
Serve immediately.

name: Creamy Vanilla Orange Shake
directions: Add all the ingredients to the container of a blender.
Cover; pulse off and on to get the mixture started.
Blend on high for 20 seconds or until completely smooth.

name: Elegant Smoothie
directions: Cut the fruit.
Put in blender.
Blend till smooth
Enjoy.

name: Peaches N Berries N Cream, Oh My!
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
Pour into a glass and enjoy!

name: No-Alcohol Pina Colada
directions: put the pineapple in the blender.
pour milk over pineapple until it is just shy of covered over and add the extracts, adjusting to taste. Add sweetener if desired.
Blend until smooth, stirring occasionally if the top isnt blending.
Serve immediately.

name: Starbucks Frappuccinos
directions: Blend all ingredients in blender and enjoy!

name: Banana-Pineapple Slushie
directions: Combine pineapple, honey and ice in blender.
Blend till smooth.
Add banana.
Blend until desired smoothness is reached.
You may have to stop blender to stir slushie.
Add water if needed.

name: Island Fruit Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in blender until smooth.

name: Pineapple Colada Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender.
Process until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Creamy Coffee Ice Cream Brandy Smoothie Dessert
directions: In a blender, combine ice cream and brandy.
Blend until all very smooth.
Serve in glasses.
Garnish with chocolate on top.

name: Coffee / Chocolate Smoothie.
directions: Just add all of the ingredients above into a smoothie maker or blender.

name: Homemade Icee
directions: First put 2 cups of ice cubes into a blender. Then add 1 cup of water. Next add the del's dry mix or powdered drink to the ice and water. Then close the lid and put the blender on high and let it blend for thirty seconds or until ice is smooth!
Then the last step -- enjoy your homemade icee!

name: Strawberry Lassi
directions: Puree strawberries with sugar, cardamom, and a pinch of salt in a blend until smooth.
Add yogurt and ice, then puree until smooth again.

name: Blueberry Banana Soy Protein Smoothie
directions: Add plain lowfat soymilk and soy powder to a blender, blend for 10 seconds.
Add frozen blueberries and banana sliced in half and blend for 10 seconds.
Add Fiber One cereal and Splenda and blend until smooth and creamy.
Enjoy.

similar.name: Soy Delicious Strawberry Banana Shake or Smoothie

name: Chris Carmichael's Super Drink
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and puree until smooth.

name: Smoothie Princess' Morning Creation
directions: Peel and seed the orange.  Place it in your blender.
Add the blueberries and milk.
Blend until smooth.  This one will take a little longer then normal smoothies because of the need to break down the orange pulp.

similar.name: Gingerly's Sunrise and Shine Power Smoothie

name: Pomegranate Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender.
Blend until smooth.

name: Banana Mocha Smoothie
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients. Cover and process for 45 to 60 seconds or until frothy.
Pour into glasses; serve immediately.

name: C-Plus Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingrdients in blender and serve.

name: Mango Sunriser
directions: Place mango, banana and juice in blender. Pulse a few times. Add milk, yoghurt and orange rind. Blend for 1 minute.
Brush inside of each glass with raspberry coulis or jam. Spoon some passionfruit pulp into bottom of glasses.
Pour mango mixture over top and sprinkle with coconut. Serve.

name: Purple Cow Shake
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients and blend until frothy.
I like to garnish the drink with fresh strawberries.

name: Ultra Thick Minty Vegan Chocobanana Bliss
directions: Take out the bananas to defrost for a few minutes (as long as you can wait).
Place all other ingredients in blender first, then add bananas.
Blend like crazy -- you may want to use "ice crush" setting if you have one.
Drink up!

name: Mocha Frappuccino (Sugar Free)
directions: Add all ingredients to blender, and blend for about 30-45 seconds until completely blended and frothy.
Serve in a frosted glass and enjoy!

name: Hangover Cure in a Glass
directions: Toss everything in a blender and blend.
Drink and Enjoy!

name: Matcha Green Tea Smoothie or Iced Latte
directions: Mix 1/2 tsp green tea powder in 2 ounces of hot water in a bowl.  Stir with a whisk until completely dissolved.
Stir in 3 teaspoons of sugar or sugar substitute (can adjust to taste).
Add in 4 ounces of milk and stir.
(Optional) Add 1 teaspoon of vanilla syrup, such as Torani or DaVinci brands.
Add ice cubes and blend in a blender until smooth.
Enjoy!
Note:  You could also drink this as a Matcha Green Tea Iced Latte by just pouring the mixture over ice instead of blending.

name: Easy Breakfast Smoothie for Growth-Spurt Kids
directions: Mix everything in the blender until smooth. Measurements are variable - you can use a whole container of vanilla yogurt, more milk, more peanut butter, whatever your taste may be!
When you have bananas on their 'last legs', peel, break into chunks, and freeze in sandwich bags. They're great in smoothies, or, when defrosted, good for banana bread!

name: Orange Jupiter
directions: In a blender add all ingredients except the ice cubes, blend on low speed for 2 minutes. Add the ice cubes and blend on medium speed for a minute or more. Makes two tall drinks. Serve with a orange slice on side of glass with straw and if you have a mini umbrella.
Note: For those of you who like a night time cooler on the patio or deck, add your favorite liqueur or try Pernod ,Rum, or Vodka.

name: Diabetic Blueberry Fizz
directions: In a blender, whirl all ingredients until smooth.
Serve in a tall glass.

name: Peachy Peach Smoothie
directions: Approximately 15 minutes before making the smoothie lay the banana out of the freezer to defrost slightly.
Peel the banana add along with remaining ingredients to blender container.
Process until smooth and creamy, enjoy!

name: Purple Cow (Frozen Smoothie)
directions: Place all in blender and mix well.
Spoons into cups or bowls and serve immediately  or freeze for later.

name: Peach Cooler
directions: Puree peaches in blender.
Add milk, honey, and almond extract and process until smooth.
With blender running at high speed, add ice cubes one at a time and process until smooth. I would recommend shutting down the blender while you're actually adding the cubes!
Pour thick shakes into two tall glasses and serve with a sprig of mint.

name: Pecan Banana Yogurt Delight
directions: If you have time, soak the pecans for a couple of hours to soften them, but this isn't necessary.
Blend the pecans with the water till they're smooth.
Add all the rest of the ingredients as well as the ice cubes and blend till smooth.
Drink up and enjoy!

name: Frozen Fuzzy Navel - Grown up Orange Julius
directions: Place everything in a blender.
Whip until smooth.

name: Yet   Another Tropical Fruit Smoothie (Vegan)
directions: *NOTE: Blend all ingredients, taste and adjust. If the smoothie needs some sweetening, add the agave nectar.
In blender add all ingredients, except for agave nectar  and blend until smooth. Add agave nectar if necessary.
If you like your smoothies thicker, add another 1/2 of a banana.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Sommer's Dark Chocolate Banana Berry Smoothie (With a Tropical T

name: Praline Iced Coffee
directions: Freeze coffee in ice cube trays for 2 hours.
In a blender place half and half, sauce and cubes. Also Optional Liquour. Blend till smooth and creamy.

name: Pina Colada Drink Low Calorie High Protein
directions: Combine ingredients except ice in blender glass. Process mixture on HI until frothy and smooth. Add ice cubes. Crush. Drink. Makes about 2 cups.

similar.name: "if You Like Pina Coladas" Protein Smoothie

name: Lemon Breakfast Drink
directions: Combine lemon yogurt, o.j. concentrate and peach slices in blender glass. Blend on LO until smooth. Add ice cubes one at a time until crushed. Serve immediately.

name: Grasshopper Drink
directions: Combine ingredients in Blender glass. Process on HI until smooth. Enjoy!

similar.name: Chopped Bug & Beetle Juice (After School Drink)

name: Pumpkin Smoothie
directions: PLACE pumpkin, evaporated milk, orange juice, banana and sugar in blender; cover. Blend until smooth. Pour over ice. Sprinkle with cinnamon, if desired.

name: Pumpkin Banana Froth - Halloween
directions: Place all of the ingredients in a large blender (in batches if neccessary) and blend until thick and frothy.
Pour into chilled glasses.

name: Mango Healthy Wake-Up Drink
directions: Place fruit flesh in blender and pulse until pureed.
Add all other ingredients except passionfruit pulp.
Blend well. You can add ice-cream for a less healthy version if you want.
Drizzle passionfruit pulp in glasses, then fill with drink.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Banana and Ginger Wake-Up Call Smoothie

name: Monster Slush!
directions: Place the orange juice and ice cream in a blender or food processor.
Blend together until very smooth.
Pour drink into 4 glasses. ( It is usually quite thick.  If you want it thinner, process more or stir to melt).
Cut the ends off licorice twisters and cut to fit the glasses as straws.
Enjoy!

name: Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Put yogurt, fresh peeled ginger root, splenda and fruit into blender.  Puree up and enjoy for breakfast treat!

name: Pumpkin Fiber Shake
directions: Throw all ingredients in Blender.
Don't over blend, you want it like a consistency of melting ice cream.
Drink immediately.

similar.name: My Huge-Mongous Pumpkin Smoothie (Healthy, Low Cal)

name: Guiltless Pleasure
directions: Combine the strawberries, soy milk, and tofu in a blender.
Add the banana and pineapple concentrate.  Blend until smooth.

name: Lean' N Green
directions: Combine the honeydew, grape juice, and cucumber in a blender.
Add the grapes, blend until smooth.

name: School -Bus Breakfast
directions: Combine the yogurt and strawberry nectar in a blender.
Add the strawberries and banana.  Blend until smooth.

similar.name: Extra Sneaky Strawberry Breakfast Ice Cream

name: August Fruit Elixir (Smoothie)
directions: If banana is frozen, cut up and use a a food processor; if not frozen, you may use a blender.
Put all ingredients in either a blender or a food processor and pulse until pureed.
Enjoy!

name: Key Lime Smoothie With Grapes
directions: Add ingredients in order.  Blend until smooth.  Very refreshing!

name: Breakfast Smoothie Shake
directions: Throw in all the ingredients in a blender and drink a delicious smoothie made by yourself!

name: Duncans Dumb Easy Smoothie
directions: Thaw fruit, do not overheat.
Place juice, fruit and protein powder in blender, blend.
Place ice in blender and blend, adding ice to desired consistency.
Enjoy.

name: Chocolate Colada
directions: Blend all ingredients in blender till smooth.

name: Pumpkin Pie Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients except whipped topping.
Blend well.
Top with whipped topping and pinch of pumpkin pie spice.

name: Banana Eggnog
directions: Cut the banana into a blender, add remaining ingredients and buzz until smooth.
Pour into a tall glass and sprinkle with some nutmeg.

name: Orange Jubilee
directions: Process all ingredients in a blender until smooth, stopping to scrape down sides.
Serve immediately.

name: Orange 'n' Spice 'n' Everything Nice Smoothie
directions: Blend ingredients well in electric blender and serve immediately.
(Can add dash of holiday spice such as cinnamon, nutmeg, etc. and/or 1 tablespoon soy protein powder if desired.).

name: L'eggnog Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and blend until smooth.
If you wish, you can sprinkle the dash of nutmeg to the top of the smoothie instead of blending it in with the other ingredients.

name: Diet 7-Up Raspberry Ice
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients and blend until smooth.
Pour into glass and garnish with additional raspberries if desired.

name: Cranberry, Orange Cream Cheese Smoothie!
directions: Place all in a blender and blend till smooth.
Garnish with an orange slice.

name: Sic a Monkey on Your Pms (Moody Time of the Month)
directions: Using a blender: add all of the above ingredients.
Pulse on and off until bleded to a nice creamy texture.
Pour into a 16 ounce cup.
It is recommended that you drink this twice a day during PMS, so use the other half of the banana at the end of the day.
Regarding the fat and calories: your body actually burns more calories and fat during PMS, but due to bloating, women tend to diet during this sensitive phase.
Enjoy!

name: Salty Lassi
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and serve over ice.

name: Sweet Pure Decadent Smoothie
directions: Freeze fruit ahead of time.
Blend all ingredients till smooth.

name: Magic Bullet Smoothie
directions: Place peeled banana, frozen berries in container. Pour enough orange juice in to cover the fruit.
Blend until smooth. pour into chilled mug or glass.
Serve immediately.
Enjoy.

name: Going-Through-Chemotherapy Smoothies
directions: Run the tofu through a food processor or blender til smooth, adding milk as needed to thin.
Add the protein powder and fruit to the blender, scraping down sides as needed.
Frozen fruit may be added to thicken (like ice) without substantially watering down the mixture.
Add more milk to thin, as needed.
Combine the tofu mixture and the yogurt in a mixing bowl and thin to taste, if necessary, with more milk.
Pour into individual drink containers, cover and store in the refrigerator.
Only make as much as can be drank in one to two days; make a fresh batch as needed.

similar.name: Cocktail Therapy (I.e. Berry Smoothie for Adults)

name: Tropical Wave
directions: Arrange banana, pineapple, and mango in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Freeze until firm (about 1 hour).
Remove from freezer, and let stand 10 minutes.
Combine fruit, nectar, and juice in a blender.
Process until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Sweet Summer Fruit Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender container; cover. Blend on high.
speed about 1 minute or until smooth.
Pour smoothie into 2.
glasses and, if desired, sprinkle with additional wheat germ.

name: Mango Ginger Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Puree 'til smooth.

name: Blood Pressure Smoothie/Shake

For pina colada smoothie, substitute orange pineapple juice, 1 cup frozen, unsweetened pineapple, 1/4 cup coconut, and omit the spices.

name: Blueberry-Rum Milkshake

Drink and enjoy!
Note:  I wonder how adding something like peach schnapps to this would taste? Hrm.

Also if you want, you can add the topping last and just swirl it in your drink for some nice effect (I think, haven't tried it).  I think the topping would have to be near room temperature to swirl correctly though.  Or maybe even whipped cream?.
Another note:  Try adding 1/2 cup of cottage cheese to increase the protein!

name: Coco Coffee Smoothies

name: Smoothiezzz

Remove from the freezer 45 minutes before serving. For each serving, combine 1/2 cup slush mixture with 1/2 cup lemon-lime soda; stir well.

name: Blue Moon Smoothie

Toss in the frozen carrot cubes and blend again.
Add celery pieces, salt and pepper and blend.
Add ice cubes and lemon juice and blend again.
Pour juice into a long stemmed glass and serve chilled.
Enjoy!

Add 5 icecubes on top, and blend for 30 seconds.  Then add the remaining icecubes and blend until smooth.  Push the pulse button for 30 seconds to get an even consistency.
You may adjust the thickness by adding more icecubes for a thicker smoothie or make it thinner by using less icecubes.

name: Orange Slushy
directions: Put all ingredients in blender and blend for 30-45 seconds. Pour into glasses and serve.

Prep time is blending time.

directions: You may want more sugar- I like my coffee strong and dark!

Pour the drink into two plastic sports cups or other containers, filling to within once inch of the rims. Freeze overnight.
Remove the containers from the freezer just prior to leaving for the ball park.
When the beverage has thawed to a desired consistency, have your kids shake the cups vigorously.

name: My Cocoa Banana Pineapple Slurpie
directions: To freeze banana, peel, put in a ziplock bag and stick in the freezer overnight.
Chop up banana and put into food processor or blender. Put in the pineapple too. To make blending easier put in the water or milk. Blend until smooth.
Add ice one cube at a time. Then add sugar substitute and cocoa. Blend until even color all over.

name: Cool 'n Creamy Coffee Freeze
ingredients: vanilla flavor instant pudding and pie filling mix
directions: POUR milk into large glass measuring cup. Add enough ice to measure 3 cups. Pour into blender. Add frozen whipped topping, dry pudding mix and coffee; cover.
BLEND on high speed until smooth.
POUR into glasses. Serve immediately.

similar.name: Vanilla Bean Frozen Drink - Like Starbucks

name: Caramel Frappe for 2
directions: In warm water, dissolve sugar and coffee packet.  Allow to cool in refrigerator.  Add ice, milk, coffee, and ice cream in blender and process on high - you may have to stop periodically and stir as the mixture is cold and may not have enough liquid to keep it going. If a stronger coffee flavor is desired, you may add instant coffee granules to the warm(or hot) water.  You can also experiment by varying the amounts of milk and ice cream. I plan to try different flavors by using a regular coffee packet and the flavored coffee creamers like hazelnut and others.

name: Peach Party Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients except for the ice in a blender.
Cover blender and process until smooth.
Gradually add the ice through the blender feed tube and blend until almost smooth.
Each serving is equal to 1 cup.

name: Sugar-Free Banana Mango Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.  Blend to desired thickness.  Enjoy!  Fast, easy, healthy start to your morning.  And it's DELICIOUS!

similar.name: Soft and Delicate Strawberry Coconut Mango Smoothie

name: 5 a Day Smoothie
directions: Microwave sweet potato until soft.
Scoop out pulp and put in blender.
Peel orange and add to blender.
Add banana, chopped carrot,  and orange juice. Blend until smooth and creamy.
Add ice cubes and water until desired thickness is achieved.
Pour into glass and enjoy!

name: Amaretto Smoothie

Blend until smooth.
Pour over ice into 4 glasses.

name: Brown Sugar Iced Coffee
directions: Whip all ingredients in blender.
Note: if not using blender then use 1/4 cup hot water to dissolve the coffee and then mix in the rest.

name: Strawberry Daiquiris
directions: Put all but garnish berries in blender.
Mix until smooth.
Pour immediately into 4 glasses.
Garnish with strawberries.
Serve at once.

name: Italian Dream
directions: Blend with 1/2 cup of ice until smooth.
Serve in a parfait glass.

name: Frosty Mocha
directions: In blender container, place all ingredients except ice; blend until well mixed.
Add ice cubes a few at a time, blending well after each addition until smooth.

name: Three Fruit Smoothie
directions: Combine ingredients. Blend in blender until smooth. Pour into glasses and enjoy!
You may garnish with a strawberry, if desired.

name: Banana Breakfast Smoothie With Peanut Butter (Extra Thick and Cr
directions: Cut up the bananas and put them, along with the ice into the blender.
Add the two tablespoons peanut butter.
Pour in 1/2 cup soymilk.
If the smoothie seems to thick, or won't blend all the way, add a little more milk until it does.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Peanut Butter Banana Break Shake Smoothie

name: Jungle Juice
directions: Blend together at medium speed until smooth.
Suggestion: Can also add 8 0unces of non- fat vanilla yogurt for a breakfast on the go!

name: Strawberry Citrus Slush

If slush is frozen solid, let sit at room temperature for about 30 minutes before serving. To serve, spoon 1/2 cup slush mixture into each glass. Pour 1/2 cup ginger ale over each.

name: Yummy, Scrummy Banana Shake
directions: put milk in blender.
peel bananas and chop.
add to blender.
add honey and nutmeg.
add ice cream.
blend fast until smooth.
pour into tall glasses.
pop in a straw and serve.

name: Morning Wakeup Smoothie
directions: blend together till smooth.

name: Summer Fruits Smoothie
directions: Cut up the bananas and put into blender with half the yogurt, half milk and sweetener then blitx it till bananas are broken down.
Put in about half the berries (frozen)slowly, while it's blending.
Add the rest of the yogurt and milk to loosen up the mixture.
Add the rest of the berries, blend till completely mixed.

name: Cold Vegetable Soup
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender.  Begin briefly on ice crusher mode to break up the strawberry and peas--I wouldn't go beyond 30-45 seconds.
After frozen items are broken up, add the spices.  Feel free to experiment with whatever flavors strike your fancy.
Switch to pulse mode, and then alternate between pulse and blend until the drink is thick enough to suit.
When done, pour soup into a bowl and garnish with flax seeds(they can be sprinkled on top, or mixed in thoroughly for an added crunch).
The ingredient amounts are approximations, so feel free to add a little more of this or a little less of that if it seems necessary.
If you want a more substantial soup, want increase fiber intake, or accidently added too much liquid, try adding a tablespoon or two of ground flax seeds during the pulse & blend stage.

name: British Columbian Blueberry  Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender, starting with liquids,  until smooth.
Serve in a pretty glass with a straw, garnished with 2 or 3 fresh blueberries.

name: Blue Mountain Milk Shake
