name: Iced Cafe Latte Slush
directions: In a large freezer-safe mixing bowl combine the sugar and hot coffee; stir until the sugar is completely dissolved.
Add in 1 cup half and half cream; cover and chill for 9 hours.
Let thaw slightly in the refrigerator; add in the remaining 1 cup half and half cream; beat with and electric mixer until smooth.
Place in individual glass serving bowls or cups.
Drizzle with chocolate syrup.
Serve immediately.
Delicious!

name: Baja Blend Mocktail
directions: To a blender, add all ingredients (except garnish) and blend until smooth.  Pour into a coupette glass. Garnish with a fresh strawberry.

name: Banana-Rama Mocktail
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients. Blend until smooth. Garnish with a slice of banana or strawberry (optional).

name: Mocha Frappé
directions: Brew the 3 tablespoons coffee with 1 cup water.
Add in 1 tablespoon milk and sugar to taste; mix well; cool slightly or to room temperature.
Pour into ice cube trays and freeze for a minimum of 3 hours or until firm.
In a blender process the coffee ice cubes with 1-1/4 cups full-fat milk and the 2 tablespoons chocolate syrup; place into 2 tall glasses and dollop with whipped cream.
Sprinkle with chocolate shavings if desired.
Serve immediately.
Delicious!

name: Spirulina Goddess Smoothie
directions: Combine ingredients in listed order in a blender.
Blend on high until the mixture is smooth and there are no banana chunks.
Enjoy within 10 minutes of making for best flavor.

name: Peach Blackberry Smoothie
directions: Combine ingredients in blender and blend until smooth and thick.
Serve and enjoy!

name: Packs-A-Punch Raspberry Almond Smoothie
directions: Combine the almond milk, frozen raspberries, bananas, honey and almond extract in a blender; whirl until smooth.
Pour into 4 tall glasses and garnish with fresh raspberries and whole almonds, if desired.

name: Sweet Fizzy Smoothie
directions: Place in your blender the cantaloupe, the banana broken into pieces, the grapes, and the seltzer.  Blend until they come together as a smoothie.  Add a little more seltzer if you need it.  Enjoy!

name: Sammommi
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Best-Ever Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients into blender and blend.
If the smoothie is too thick, you can add some more juice.

similar.name: The Healthiest Fruit Smoothie on Earth

name: Banana Fig Shake
directions: cut up frozen banana and set aside.
Place yogurt in blender along with sliced dried figs.
Turn on blender and with blender running put in banana pieces into blender one at a time until shake is thick and creamy.
(I like chunks of figs in mine, soooo good).

name: Mango Shake
directions: place yogurt in blender.
turn on blender and with blender running drop mango pieces in blender one at a time until shake is smooth and creamy.
pour into a glass and enjoy!

name: Red Robin Drink Recipe: Hawaiian Heartthrob
directions: In blender, add all ingredients.

name: Blueberry Combo Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in the blender,  until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Blender Frosties
directions: In blender container, combine ingredients and blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.
Refrigerate or freeze leftovers.

name: Peach Lassi
directions: Make the peach puree: Pit the peaches, cut into pieces and put into a blender. Add the rest of the ingredients for the puree and mix until smoorth.
Put peach puree into fridge and cool.
Make the Lassi: put all ingredients for the lassi into a blender and mix until foamy.
Make the Peach Lassi: arrange the peach puree in 4 glasses. Carefully add the lassi on top of the puree.
Put peach wedges for decoration on skewer and decorate the peach lassi with it. Decorate each glass with a lemon balm leaf.
Don't mix the Peach Lassie. Serve them with a spoon, so that everyone can mix it or not.
Note: if you like the spicy notes, you can add more cayenne to it.
Note: you can sub the lemon balm leaves by peppermint leaves.
Note: cooking time does not include cooling time.

name: Cherry Supreme Smoothie Shake
directions: Place all ingredients in blender in order listed. Put on the lid and process until smooth.
Pour into glasses and enjoy!

name: Wendy's Frosty Copycat - 4 Ww Points
ingredients: fat-free sugar-free instant chocolate pudding mix
directions: Place everything in a blender and blend 3-4 minutes. Place in a glass. I put mine in the freezer for 4-5 minutes. Drink carefully as it will give you a brain freeze.
If you like strawberry shakes, try substituting the chocolate mix with cheesecake and use frozen unsweetened strawberries in the place of the ice.
Or pistachio pudding mix, with frozen unsweetened pineapple and 1 tsp of coconut extract (sort of like a pina colada).
Or banana cream pudding FF/SF of course, ½ a banana, 10 ice cubes, and of course Fat Free Cool Whip.

name: Bug Juice Smoothies
directions: Place half of each ingredient in blender.
Cover and blend on high speed about 30 seconds or until smooth.
Pour into 4 glasses.
Repeat with remaining ingredients.
Pour into remaining 4 glasses.
Serve immediately.

name: Extraordinary Fruit Salad Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients.
into a blender or food processor.
and blend until smooth.
enjoy.

name: Tropical Breeze Smoothie
directions: Place all ingerdients in blender. Cover and process 15-30 seconds till smooth, using on/off pulsing action to break up chunks.

name: Soy Mango Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender. Cover and process 30-45 seconds till smooth, using on/off pulse action to break chunks.

name: Blimey Limey from Tropical Smoothie Cafe
directions: Add ice.
Blend until smooth (Splenda is harder to blend than Turbinado).
Pour into 2 12 oz. servings (or 1 24 oz. serving if desired).
Enjoy!

name: Frozen Banana Chocolate Malted
directions: Slice banana and puree in blender with remaining ingredients.
Pour into a glass and drink!

name: Creamsicle Smoothie
directions: Basically, just toss it in a blender and wirl it.
Nothing to it!
If you like, add a sweetener.

name: Ice Cool Fruity
directions: place all ingredients into blender.
MIX for 20 seconds then SMOOTH for 20 seconds or if you don't have a top of the range blender, just blend until smooth.
serve straight away.

name: Coffee Smoothie
directions: put all ingredients in a blender (you don't have to use the sugar).
MIX for 10 seconds, SMOOTH for 20 seconds, or if you don't have a fancy blender, just blend until smooth.

name: Banoffee Smoothie
directions: place all in blender.
MIX for 10 seconds then SMOOTH for 20 seconds or if you don't have a fancy blender, just blend until smooth.
serve imediately.

name: The "sommer" Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients into a blender.
Blend until ingredients are a smoothie consistency.  Pour into a large glass and sip through a straw or enjoy without a straw, whichever you prefer.

Note:  I also added to this smoothie one scoop of Citrucel Clear Mix fiber supplement.  This is totally optional of course.  If you want, you might even try adding in your favorite powdered nutritional supplement instead, like protein powder, for example, but I don't know how anything else would affect the taste of the smoothie.  I know the Citrucel Clear Mix doesn't affect the taste at all and blends in well.
(I'm also going to try mango today.).

similar.name: Sommer's Dark Chocolate Banana Berry Smoothie (With a Tropical T

name: Blueberry Plum Buttermilk Smoothie
directions: Remove pits and cut plums into quarters or smaller. I just slice from top to bottom right beside the pit; do this all the way around.
Place water and sugar in small saucepan, dissolving sugar and bringing to just boiling.
Add plum pieces and turn heat lower in order to reach a simmer.
Wait 5 minutes after adding plums and add blueberries.
Cook all for 10 more minutes.
Strain fruit from pot and let cool to at least room remperature or chill until ready to make.
Place plums and blueberries in blender and mix.
Add buttermilk and vanilla, mix well.
Add crushed ice and blend well.
Add more more milk or vanilla to suit your taste (or a little of the sugar water for a sweeter drink).
Serve immediately over a few ice cubes to keep it good and chilled (it does go fast though!).
If you are over 21 and aren't driving-- you can go ahead and add some light rum.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Blueberry Pomegranate Smoothie With Honey & Orange

name: Zero Calorie Green Tea Freeze
directions: Combine ingredients [except for the lemon] and blend well.
Add the lemon wedge to garnish.

name: Frosty Bourbon Cappuccino
directions: In a bowl combine the cooled coffee with brown sugar, 1-1/2 half and half cream (or table cream) and cinnamon; mix well to combine; freeze in ice cube trays until frozen (about 5 hours).
In a blender, blend the frozen cubes with the 1/2 cup half and half and bourbon.
Serve in glasses.

name: Cherry Slush- Non Alcoholic
directions: Combine cherry juice blend and sugar in a medium saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until sugar dissolves and mixture boils. Reduce heat; simmer 3 minutes. Remove from heat.

In blender or food processor container, combine cherries, orange juice concentrate and lemon juice. Blend 1 minute, or until cherries are pureed. In a 6-cup freezer container, combine cherry mixture and sugar mixture; mix well. Cover tightly; freeze 5 hours or overnight.
Remove cherry mixture from freezer 30 minutes before serving. Put 1/4 cup slush in each glass; add 1/2 cup carbonated beverage to each glass. Serve immediately. Freeze remaining slush for later use.
A shot of your favorite alcohol may be added to individual glasses when adding the lemon-lime soda if desired.

name: Can't Wait Rainbow Smoothie
directions: Add sherbet first, blend a bit.
Add orange, blend.
Add only 3 tablespoons of pineapple chunks with juice, blend.
Add 1 tablespoon additional pineapple juice if needed, blend.
Add ice cubes and blend.
At this point you CAN'T WAIT! DRINK!
Will try to take picture next time but don't hold your breath!

similar.name: Orange Smoothie of Happiness and Whatnot

name: Vegetable Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and process until smooth, about 3 minutes.
Chill for at least 30 minutes.
Fill 4 glasses with ice and divide the smoothie mixture evenly among them.
Serve immediately. Enjoy!

name: Pink Panties
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender with half cup of crushed ice.
Blend until smooth.

name: Refreshing Cucumber Lemonade
directions: Peel and chop the cucumbers.
Place cucumbers in blender with water and sugar and blend until very smooth.
Add lemon juice and blend again.
Pour into frosty glasses and enjoy!

name: Anytime Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and purée until smooth.

name: Iced Coffee-Chocolate Soda Frappe
directions: In a large heat-proof mixing bowl stir together instant coffee granules with chocolate syrup, sugar and boiling water; cool to almost room temperature, then refrigerate for at least 8 hours.
Stir together the coffee mixture with half and half cream and 1 quart ice cream.
Stir in ginger ale soda; mix to combine.
Ladle the mixture into large tall glasses about 3/4 full, then top with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
Serve immediately.

name: Smoothie King Lemon Twist (Copycat)
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until slushy.
Serve and enjoy!

name: Brown Cow (Root Beer or Cola Float)
directions: Place 1 large scoop vanilla ice cream into 8 tall glasses.
Pour 3/4 cup root beer over the ice cream.
Drizzle each glass with about 1 tablespoon caramel syrup.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: No Ice Cream Root Beer Floats

name: Booster Sunrise Smoothie
directions: Combine ingredients in a blender. Serve.

similar.name: Easy Healthy Delicious Ovaltine Banana Smoothie Drink

name: Coconut Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender on high speed until well combined.
You may add more or less ice, depending on how cold you like a smoothie.

name: Special Breakfast in a Glass
directions: place first 5 ingredients in a blender or food processor, blend until smooth.
add cold milk (and in hot weather a generous scoop of ice cream) and process until mixed.

similar.name: Honey and Vanilla Breakfast in a Glass

name: Pineapple Melon Mint Cold Summer Soup
directions: Clean, peel and cut up all three very ripened fruits.  (The pineapple might even be a little light brown on the inside.)  Put in a blender or food processor and blend/process well.
Throw in ~1 cup of loose fresh peppermint leaves and pulse just for a moment.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Serve in either cup size or bowl size.
Garnish with a nice sprig of fresh mint.

name: Scented Babana Smoothie
directions: Blitz together the first 4 ingredients.
Add the pecans and give a final blitz.
Pour into a tall glass and dust with cinnamon.

name: Cherry Yogurt Flamingo
directions: Puree the first six ingredients until smooth in a blender or food processor. Taste and add more sugar if desired.  Pour into glasses and garnish with Orange wedge.

name: Vanilla Bean Frozen Drink - Like Starbucks
directions: make the syrup: combine sugar and water in a saucepan.
bring to a boil, then lower heat and simmer 5 minutes stirring occasionally.
off heat, stir in the vanilla paste, cool completely.
to make drink: place ice in blender, chop.
add milk and vanilla syrup.
blend until smooth.
you might need to stop and start the blender and scrape down the sides to get a smooth blend.
pour into chilled 8 oz. glasses.
top with whipped cream, if desired.
add a straw and enjoy!
remaining syrup can be stored in the fridge for up to 3 weeks.

name: Vegan Creamsicle Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and blend until smooth.

similar.name: Berry Wonderful Berry-Banana Vanilla Soy Smoothie
Fruit Coconut and Oat Milk Smoothie

name: Living Longer Diet Breakfast Drink
directions: Blend in blender till smooth.

name: Non- Alcoholic Apricot Slush Drink
directions: Poor the apricot nectar into blender.
Add the pineapple juice.
Add the fresh lime juice and cherry syrup.
Blend all together until slushy and pour into an attractive glass.

name: Fresh Banana Pudding Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender.  Enjoy!

name: Peach, Soy, and Almond Smoothie
directions: Combine peaches, soy milk, ice cubes, honey, and extract in blender. Puree until smooth.
Pour smoothie into 2 glasses. Top each smoothie with chopped almonds and serve.

similar.name: Peaches N Berries N Cream, Oh My!

name: Frozen Banana Rum  Smoothie
directions: Quarter the banana and place in blender.
Add Vanilla Ice Cream.
Add Ice.
Add Butterscotch.
Add Rum.
Blend on slower setting first to break things up, then switch to higher speeds until nice and smooth, adding some milk or rum if necessary to get things going.
You'll need a big glass.  Best served when hot (the person that is :).

name: Sundae Smoothie
directions: Combine the caramel yogurt and frozen french vanilla yogurt in a blender.
Peel and chop frozen banana and wash and chop strawberries and add to blender.
Finally add chocolate syrup to blender and blend until smooth.

name: Chocolate Shake Down
directions: Pulverize the Heath bar in a blender. Add all the remaining ingredients.
Blend mixture until thick and smooth.
Adjust flavors, if necessary by adding more cinnamon and vanilla as desired.
Pour into chilled glasses and serve immediately.

similar.name: Ultra Thick Minty Vegan Chocobanana Bliss

name: Avocado Green Tea Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients into a blender and whir.

name: Cinnabon's Strawberry Icescape
directions: Combine the water and sugar in a cup and stir until the sugar is dissolved.
Add this sugar syrup to other ingredients in a blender.
Blend on high speed until the drink is smooth. Serve in two 16-ounce glasses.

name: High-Fiber Breakfast Shake
directions: Combine ingredients in blender and mix until smooth.

name: Yummy and Healthy Smoothie
directions: Place banana, peach (cut into pieces), berries, Silk Soymilk, low fat vanilla yogurt, and wheat germ in blender.
Combine ingredients by blending.
Serve.
You can substitute any type of fruit you like.

name: Post Workout Shake
directions: Blend all ingredients in a blender until smooth. Serve cold.

name: Disneyland's Dole Pineapple Whip Version #2
directions: Variation: 2 tablespoons frozen pineapple concentrate plus 1/4 cup or so water can be substituted for the pineapple juice.
Place all ingredients in a blender and process until smooth. Please feel free to add or decrease the amount of juice/ice cream to get a consistency you prefer.
Enjoy, make slurp noices, wipe your mouth on your shirt sleeve! Repeat.

NOTE: Here are the ingredients for the {real} Dole Pineapple Whip-if you're interested: Water, High Fructose Corn Sugar, Sugar, Corn Syrup, Pineapple Juice Concentrate, Partially Hydrogenated Soybean Oil, Maltodextrin, Stabilizers (Cellulose, Locust Bean, Guar, Xanthan, Karaya Gum, Pectin), Citric Acid, Sodium Caseinate (A Milk Derivative), Mono & Diglycerides, Sodium Citrate, Salt, Dipotassium Phosphate. Where's my Latin dictionary when I need it?

name: Brazilian Pina Colada
directions: Mix in blender until all ingredients are incorporated, and pour over ice.
Garnish with a slice of pineapple and an umbrella!

name: Protein Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in blender and blend until smooth.

similar.name: Anything Goes Fruit and Nut Smoothie

name: Skinny Style Chocolatey Hot Cocoa
directions: add cocoa powder and splenda to bottom of mug and mix together.
add water (do not use hot water or this won't taste right).
microwave on high for 1 minute.
remove from microwave and add milk and syrup, stir.
microwave for 45 seconds more.
stir and enjoy!

name: Frozen Iced Tea
directions: In blender, combine sorbet and tea and blend until mixture is smooth. Pour into 4 glasses.

name: Blueberry Pomegranate Smoothie With Honey & Orange
directions: PLACE evaporated milk, blueberries, juice, concentrate, honey and ice in blender; cover.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into tall glasses and serve immediately.
* NOTE: Substitute Evaporated Lowfat 2% Milk for Fat Free Milk, and cranberry juice for pomegranate juice, if desired.

name: Chocolate-Mint Frosty
ingredients: chocolate flavor instant pudding and pie filling mix
directions: Pour milk into 1 quart measuring cup.
Add enough ice to measure 3 cups.
Add remaining ingredients; cover and BLEND on high speed till smooth.
Pour evenly into 4 glasses.
Serve immediately.

name: Ww  Berry Good Thing!
directions: Place all of the ingredients in blender, except for the whipped cream.
Blend on high speed for 30-45 seconds. Pour, and top with Fat Free Reddi-Wip.

similar.name: Hungry Girl's Strawberry Cloud Smoothie Hg
Chocolate Strawberry Clean out the Fridge Smoothie

name: Sweet Banana-Carob Shake
directions: If dates have been refrigerated, warm them a bit in the microwave, to make softer and easier to blend.
Slice the frozen bananas, this helps out your blender :-).
Combine all ingredients in a food processor or blender, and blend till very smooth (you'll have visible flecks of date skin but who cares).
Pour into 2 mugs and let them sit in the freezer for 20-60 minutes.
Enjoy your freezy treat!

similar.name: Ultra Thick Minty Vegan Chocobanana Bliss

name: Banana & Date Protein Smoothie
directions: Combine the almond milk, yogurt,a nd tofu in blender.
Add all remaining ingredients and blend until smooth.

similar.name: The All-day Protein and Energy Smoothie

name: Chemo Smoothies
directions: mix together and chill.

name: Mango-Banana Juice
directions: Mix all ingredients in the blender.
Add 1/2 cup of ice.
If juice is too thick, add 1/2 cup of water.

similar.name: Copycat Recipe:  Naked Juice - Mighty Mango Smoothie

name: Zoe's Organic Peanut Butter Smoothie
directions: Cut frozen banana into slices peel skin and discard (or slice then freeze).
Put banana slices, half&half, and peanut butter in blender.
Cover and blend until smooth. Yummy!

similar.name: Banana Breakfast Smoothie With Peanut Butter (Extra Thick and Cr
Peanut Butter, Banana, and Flax Smoothies
Peanut Butter Banana Break Shake Smoothie

name: Orange Blossom
directions: Mix everything (EXCEPT ICE) in blender.
Add some of the mix (as much as you want) to ice cubes and blend.

name: Chocolate Blast
directions: Combine all ingredient's in a blender
Mix till smooth.
Pour into glass and top with whipped cream.
Sprinkle cocoa over the whipped cream.

name: Banana Coconut Freeze
directions: Arrange banana slices in a single layer on a cookie sheet. Freeze about 45 minutes, or until frozen.
Combine with remaining ingredients in a blender and purée.

name: Incredibly Simple Yogurt Smoothie
directions: Combine the milk and yogurt in a sippy cup [or regular cup for older kids and adults].
Put the sippy cup lid on and shake, or stir with a spoon.
If your child is a slow drinker, add ice to keep it cold.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Fruit Smoothie for Babies or Toddlers

name: Rejuvenator Smoothie
directions: Place carrot juice in ice cube tray and and freeze until completely frozen.
Once frozen place in ziplock back and crush to desired consistency.
Place all ingredients in blender.
Blend until smooth.

name: Vitamin Packed Blueberry Smoothie
directions: Combine the yogurt and apple juice in a blender.
Add the blueberries and peaches and blend until smooth.

name: Abs Diet Ultimate Power Smoothie
directions: Put in smoothie machine and blend.

similar.name: Abs Diet "okay on the Oj" Smoothie

name: Peachy Coffee Smoothie
directions: Place nectar, peaches, ice cream, cream, water, coffee granules and vanilla extract in blender; cover.
Blend until smooth.
Serve in chilled glasses.

similar.name: Peach Smoothie With Dark Sweet Cherries

name: Pineapple-Banana Frappe
directions: Peel banana; break into chunks.
combine all ingredients in blender.
Cover & blend until smooth.

MODIFICATIONS  You can modify by adding a scoop of soy protein powder & 1 tablespoon of flaxseed oil; you can also add 1 cup of pineapple chunks (stored in water) or 1 cup of frozen mango chunks as a substitute for the sorbet.

name: Raspberry-Orange Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until smooth.

name: Double Apple Cinnamon Smoothie
directions: Combine in blender.
Cover & blend at high speed for 1 minute.
Pour into frosty mugs if desired!

name: Smucker's Triple-Berry Refresher
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients and blend until smooth. (If desired, strain to remove seeds.).
Pour into two tall glasses and enjoy!

name: Pumpkin Banana Pie Smoothie
directions: Combine ingredients in blender and puree until smooth.
Pour the smoothies into small glasses.

name: Gingery Autumn Butterfruit
directions: Peel and slice pears.
Put in blender then add remaining ingredients and blend until smooth.
Serve immed or place in a saucepan over low heat and serve warm.
Omit extract if using almond soymilk.

name: Judy Reynold's Persimmon Smoothie
directions: Place all smoothie ingredients in a 5 cup blender.
Cover and blend on low speed about 15 to 20 seconds.
Scrape down the sides of the blender.
Blend the ingredients on medium speed an additional 45 to 50 seconds until mixture is smooth.
Divide smoothie mixture evenly into 4 8-oz. glasses.
Garnish each serving with whip cream and vanilla bean.

name: Apricot Smoothie
directions: Pour rum, triple sec and apricot nectar in blender and mix.
Serve over crushed ice.

name: Creamy Dreamy Orange Smoothie
directions: Cut banana into pieces, cut orange into quarters.
Place all ingredients in blender and blend for 30 seconds.
Serve in tall chilled glass.

similar.name: Orange Smoothie of Happiness and Whatnot

name: Purple Smoothie
directions: Stick all ingredients in blender and blend.
Add water until desired consistency is maintained.

name: Power Punch
directions: In a blender, place banana, papaya, yoghurt and milk and pulse until smooth.
Add ice, almond flakes and whole grain wheat if using and pulse until mixed well and concoction is a good consistency that is easy to pour.
Serve immediately with a fresh stick of celery if preferred.

name: Quick Frozen Fruitie
directions: Blend the frozen fruit and the yogurt in a food processor about 1 minute, until smooth.
Add a spoonful or more of honey to sweeten slightly.
The amount of honey needed will depend on the sweetness of the fruit==taste as you go.
Serve immediately, or pour into a container and freeze until firm.
If desired, spoon fresh berries into four serving bowls.
Crumble crackers over the top, and add yogurt.

name: Vegan Eggnog
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and puree until smooth.
Serve at once or refrigerate for up to 6 hours before serving.

similar.name: Dairy Free Super Food Avocado Smoothie

name: Pumpkin Ginger Smoothie
directions: Slice banana into 1/2 inch chunks.
Blend banana, yoghurt, orange juice, ginger and pumpkin until smooth.
Pour into two glasses and serve with granola.

name: Pink Ribbon Smoothie
directions: Wash fresh fruit and place all ingredients in the Vita-Mix container (or blender) in the order listed.
Secure 2-part lid.
Select VARIABLE, speed #1.
Turn on machine and quickly increase speed to #10; then to HIGH.
Blend for 30 seconds or until smooth (or gradually increase your blender's speed and process until everything is smooth.

name: Razznana Smoothies
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients, cover and process until blended.
Pour into chilled glasses; serve immediately.

name: Bea's  Power Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients together in a blender.
until smooth.

name: Bea's Fruity Smoothie
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a blender until ice is completely chopped.
Chill in refrigerator until ready to drink.

name: Ww Core Orange Glorious
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Process on high speed until smooth and foamy.
Serve immediately.

name: Fiber One Fruit Smoothies
directions: In blender place all ingredients, cover and blend on high 10 seconds.
Stop blender, scrape down sides then blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Cantaloupe Cooler
directions: Put all ingredients in blender, in the order listed. And blend and enjoy!

name: Splenda Frozen Almond Cappuccino
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender in the order listed; process mixture until smooth, stopping to scrape down sides.

name: Mango Lime Smoothie
directions: Place mango, yogurt, milk and lime zest in blender.
Squeeze the juice of half a lime into the blender.
Add nutmeg and blend.
Add a little more milk if the consistency is too thick.

name: H2o Shake
directions: Take an ice cream flavor of your preference and leave it to melt in a glass.
Add your water on top.
Now add the flavor that matches the ice cream flavor you choose. I would go with 1 tablespoons but if you like it stronger then add more.
You can either blend it all or mix it by hand.
Drink up.
I am not sure yet if 1 tablespoons of vanilla is adequate but I imagine you could go with caramel ice cream topping as a substitute.
But on that note I imagine jellies or other toppings would be great to mix in with vanilla ice cream as well.
There's a while word of flavor, so try things until you like them.

name: Nut or Seed Milk for Smoothies
directions: If using water and whole nuts/seeds, soak overnight (optional).
Blend until very smooth and strain, if desired.

I use this for smoothies, hence I've never strained it--I think it's more healthful left as-is, but straining is probably a good idea for those who wish to use this as a milk substitute, e.g., as a topping for cereal; I imagine some use could be found for the pulp. Natural sweetener, i.e., honey; dehydrated cane juice; agave nectar, can be added to taste (I'd start with a teaspoon or less).

Since I posted this, I've come to realize that upping the nuts/seeds to 1/3 cup and straining if using the milk for drinking plain makes REALLY decadent milks. Also, a nut milk bag is useful; eBay has at least one seller with very reasonably priced food-grade nylon bags for this purpose.

name: Buz Cola Smoothie
directions: Peel, core and dice all the fruit.
Add the fruit to the blender with the applesauce and sugar.
Add the ice; blend everything together till smooth.

name: Persimmon Smoothie
directions: Measure liquid ingredients into blender using container's indicator--fewer dishes to wash!
Wash the persimmon(s), remove stem(s), and cut away any parts that look unappetizing.
Toss into blender with dry ingredients and blend until smooth.

similar.name: Carrot, Peach and Fresh Thyme Smoothie (Raw Food)

name: Monkey Shake
directions: Juice orange with papaya.
Place juice and banana in a blender or food processor, and blend until smooth.
Garnish with the orange twist.
Pour into a tall glass and enjoy!

name: Tutti-Fruity Smoothie
directions: In a blender container combine banana, berries, soy milk, juice, and yogurt.
Cover and blend until smooth.
Pour into glasses.

name: Green Tea Frappuccino
directions: Dissolve green tea in hot water.
add milk and syrup.
blend with a handfull or so of ice cubes.
top with whipped cream if desired.

name: Spiced Banana Licuado
directions: In a blender, combine chilled milk, cinnamon, ground cloves, and ground nutmeg.
Add banana chunks, ice cubes, and brown sugar.
Whirl until smooth.

name: X-Rated Rita
directions: In a blender add X-rated liqueur, tequilla, sweet and sour, lime juice and desired amount of ice.
Set to crush, or until the consistecy desired for a margarita - may turn watery if you over blend though.
Pour into margarita glass and topwith a splash of 7-Up and a lime wedge(twist) for garnish.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Honeydew Lime Cooler
directions: Put melon cubes in the freezer for about 15 minutes, until firm.
In a blender, combine melon, sherbet and lime juice and process until smooth.
Pour into glasses and garnish with strawberries.

name: Feijoa Smoothie
directions: Cut feijoas in half and scoop out the flesh, put in to blender.
Add remaining ingredients and blend until frothy.

similar.name: Anything Goes Fruit and Nut Smoothie

name: Raspberry Frappe
directions: In a blender, combine sorbet, white grape juice, raspberries and lemon juice.

name: Pineapple Passion

Remove both ends of can, push frozen pineapple onto cutting board.  Slice into chunks, transfer to blender.
Add fruit juice, yogurt, banana (peeled and cut into chunks) and ginger.
Blend until thick and smooth.  Pour into glasses.  Garnish with pineapple wedges and mint.
For a pina colada passion, omit the banana and ginger. Replace the yogurt with 1 pint coconut sorbet, lime juice.

Before eating, sprinkle with almond slivers or slices. This is a flavorsome, crunchy touch that to me really makes this special. Enjoy!

Pour into 4 glasses & add 1 ice cube to each glass.

NOTE: I entered this recipe as written, but dislike a watered effect from ice cubes. So I freeze the milk in a freezer container as my 1st prep step. Using very cold milk w/ice crystals that often form means no ice cubes are needed when prep is done & you are ready to serve.
VARIATION: Replace strawberries w/canned or fresh pineapple & use vanilla ice cream.

Strain through a fine mesh strainer and place in the freezer for about 50 minutes, or until very cold.
Place thawed whipped topping in a medium-size bowl; fold in yogurt and cooled fruit puree until just combined.
Serve immediately.

name: Healthy Protein Shake
directions: Pour soy milk in blender (may substitute skim milk for less fat, sugar).
Add banana.
Add raw whole grain oatmeal.
Blend flax seed in coffee grinder and add to blender.
Add frozen blueberries -- you can experiement with the frozen fruit -- use anything from strawberries, peach, mango, etc.
Blend until all fruit is smooth -- about 20 seconds or so.

Add protein powder and blend another 10 seconds.  Whey protein should add another 10-12 grams of protein/serving not listed in nutritional stats. Dont put protein powder in until after the fruit is blended -- otherwise it gets too thick for my taste.  The frozen fruit makes it cold enough for me -- if not, add some crushed ice.  Will yield about 2 to 2.5 cups -- if too much, adjust ingredients accordingly but leave protein powder same for taste.

Nutritional Tidbit:

Avocados are a super fruit and are more nutritious than any other fruit. They are especially high in protein, fiber, niacin, thiamin, riboflavin, folic acid, and zinc. They also contain Omega-3 fatty acids and monounsaturated fats for growing kids.
Cottage cheese is an excellent source of protein.
Wheat germ is a source of Vitamin E, B-vitamin complex, iron and the antioxidant selenium.

Add syrup, blend and serve. Smoothie may be kept refrigerated for several hours, but I recommend reblending it before serving. If you plan to make it ahead of time, you might want to omit the water.
Enjoy!
