name: Tangy Berry Melon Cooler
directions: Put all ingredients in blender.
Blend until smooth (different blenders will require a different amount of time).
Pour in a cup and ENJOY!

name: Mango Piña Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients into blender and fill almost to top with ice.
Blend until smooth. Garnish with a piece of mango and pineapple.
Serve immediately.

name: Rhubarb Smoothies and Shakes
directions: RHUBARB BASE:
In a non-reactive medium saucepan, stir together sugar and orange juice.
Stir in rhubarb and bring to boil over medium-high heat.
Reduce heat to medium and simmer, stirring occasionally, until rhubarb is tender, 5 to 7 minutes.
Transfer to airtight container.
Cool, cover and refrigerate for up to 1 week.
FOR EACH PICK-A-FRUIT AND RHUBARB MILKSHAKE:
Toss the 1/2 cup rhubarb base mix and chosen fruit into a blender.
Add some milk or frozen yogurt or ice cream for a thicker shake.
Blend until mixed well.

similar.name: High Protein Strawberry Orange & Banana Shake

name: Sugar Free Lemonade
directions: Place all ingredients in the Vita-Mix or other powerful mixer.
Put on the lid and mix at high speed for about a minute.
Serve in an old fashion glass or stemware. Garnish with fresh mint and a cherry with stem.  Or, add some water to the ingredients, reduce the the ice and serve on the rocks.

name: Strawberry Colada
directions: Blend all in a blender till smooth adding ice cubes as needed.

name: Berry Watermelon Slushy
directions: Put all ingredients into blender.
Blend until smooth.
Serve and enjoy!

name: Purple Jungle Juice
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender and mix until smooth.
For more vibrant color, add a few drops of purple food coloring.

name: Oprah's Chocolate Strawberry Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in blender and blend until very smooth.  Serve immediately.

name: Cantaloupe Dream Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.

name: Strawberry-Orange Smash
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and mix on low for 15-20 seconds.
Remove lid and stir well.
Cover and blend on medium until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Honeydew Smoothie
directions: Cut the honeydew into small pieces.
Throw into the blender with yogurt and blend.
Add a splash of milk and ice.
If it's not sweet enough, add some coolwhip to the mix.
Enjoy!

name: Andrea's Favorite Smoothie
directions: Put the 1st 8 ingredients in a blender. Blend till smooth.
Start adding ice cubes to the mixture as you're continuing to blend.
Serve cold. Keep extra refrigerated.

name: Banana Power Smoothie
directions: Combine all in a blender & liquify.
Pour into 2 cups & enjoy.

name: Raspberry-Peach Smoothie - Weight Watchers
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and puree until smooth. Pour into a tall glass and serve.
Note: *You can also used frozen, unsweetened peaches and raspberries instead of the fresh fruit.
For a thicker smoothie, add 1/4 cup of ice cubes before blending.

similar.name: Too-Good Two-Berry Citrus Smoothie - Sugar Free

name: Zippy Summer Green Smoothie
directions: Peel and chunk the avocado, put into blender or food processor.
Peel and seed pear and add. Process  or blend briefly.
Peel and seed cucumber, process  or blend again.
Add juices and sweetener, blend or process until creamy.
Serve in chilled mugs, with citrus twist if desired.

similar.name: Cooling Green Smoothie for Health Skin

name: Kiwi Coconut Frappé
directions: Peel the kiwi fruit, cut into chunks and place in a blender. Add the pineapple juice and coconut and whiz until smooth.
Serve garnished with a little extra coconut sprinkled on top.

name: Tropical Dairy-Free Smoothie
directions: Place the mango, passion fruit pulp, pineapple, lychees, lime juice and ice cubes in a jug blender.
Blend until well-mixed.
Pour into 2 glasses and serve at once.

name: Zack's Sweet Sweet Chocolate Smoothie
directions: Mix all in blender until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Chilled Almond  and Pistachio Milk Shake (Pista Badam Milk)
directions: Place the almonds and pistachios in a bowl and pour boiling water over. Leave for an hour.
Chop half the almonds and pistachios fine and place the other half in a blender.
Place the milk, condensed milk, cardamom powder and ice in the blender too.
Blend till well mixed and serve garnished with the chopped almonds and thinly sliced pistachios.

name: Iced Cappuccino
directions: Mix first 3 ingredients together to make a syrup, put into blender.
Add ice cubes and blend until slushy.
Add cream and blend until frothy.

name: Green Grape Smoothie
directions: Puree all ingredients in blender until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve.

name: The 3 P Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients together until smooth,.
Enjoy!

name: Banana and Ginger Wake-Up Call Smoothie
directions: Place the fruits and ginger in a blender with the milk and vanilla extract.
Blitz together, adding one ice cube at a time.
Pour into glasses, sprinkle with cinnamon and serve.

name: Grape Volcano Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender.
Blend at high speed for 15 seconds.

name: Peach Sunrise
directions: Pour boiling water over tea bag and allow to steep for 5 minutes, discard bag and allow tea to cool.
Blend peaches, syrup, tea and yoghurt until smooth.
Swirl grenadine into 2 glasses and pour in peach mixture.

name: Chocolate Raspberry Smoothie - Women's Health
directions: Add the raspberries, yogurt, milk, cocoa powder, ice cubes and almonds, if using, to the jar of a blender with ice-crushing ability. Make sure the lid is tight.
Using a "purée" or "ice crush" setting, blend the ingredients until they are relatively smooth. Then blend on "liquidify" or "high speed" setting for a few seconds until completely smooth.
Add Splenda or honey to taste, if desired. Pour the smoothie into a glass and serve immediately.

name: Tea Smoothie
directions: Steep tea to desired taste.
Add tea, milk, sugar and ice to blender.
Blend until smooth.
NOTE: Let the tea cool before you pour it in, otherwise it will just be iced tea with milk --  which is good too, but not a smoothie.

name: Frozen Hot Chocolate
directions: Combine sugar, cocoa, and 3 tablespoons milk.
Microwave on high 1 minute stir in vanilla.
Pour into freezer-safe container; freeze overnight.
Scrape into food processor.  Add milk and pulse 10 seconds.  Pour into glass.

name: Mixed Berry Juice
directions: Place the fruit into a blender with a handful of ice and liquidize. Serve immediately.

name: Mixed Fruit and Veg Juice
directions: Pass the carrots, tomatoes, cucumber, apples and oranges through a juicer.
Stir the resulting juice thoroughly, pour into 2 glasses and serve at once.

name: Berry Fruitful Morning!
directions: PEEL your orange and banana :) and donate both to the blender.
Add orange juice, blueberries and ice cubes.
Blend fully for approximately 54 seconds, or until the ice cubes are done clacking.

name: Super Easy Green Tea Smoothie
directions: Brew green tea in water. Steep to desired strength, and discard tea bag. Refridgerate 30 minutes, or until cool.
Puree tea, banana, ice, orange juice concentrate, and ginger in blender until smooth. Add sweetener. Drink immediately, or place in freezer for up to two hours, or until ready to serve.

name: Chef Joey's Young Coconut Smoothie
directions: Grind up the cacao nibs in a coffee mill until it resembles coco powder. Set aside.
Clean the berries and set aside.
With a hammer and pointed screw driver make three holes in the top of the  two young coconuts.  Drain the milk out into a large measuring cup through a sieve.
Cut the two young coconuts in half.  My hubby uses his table saw and it works very nicely for this.
Rinse the coconut insides to remove any of the outer shell that might have coated the coconut flesh.
Scrape out all the flesh, get every bit as it's so delicious.
Put the flesh and the coconut milk into a blender and process until well combined.
Put the coconut mixture through the sieve again to remove the little pieces of shell. Put the coconut mixture into a container and set aside.
Clean out the blender cup and lid and put the coconut milk/flesh mixture back into it. Add the one cup coconut milk or non-dairy milk, the banana, the ground cacao, vanilla, cinnamon and berries.
Process until smooth and creamy.
Drink ASAP!
Bon Appetit!

similar.name: Chef Joey's Vegan Coconut Peach Smoothie
Chef Joey Z's Mochacao Breakfast Smoothie

name: Pineapple Wine Whip
directions: Spread pineapple on a freezer tray & partially freeze.
Blend all ingredients until smooth.

name: Summer Fruit Smoothie Twister
directions: Put all ingredients into blender and blend until smoothie consistency is reached!
Enjoy!

similar.name: Nick and Ken's Fruity Twisters Smoothie

name: Spa Smoothies
directions: In blender, place all ingredients. Cover; blend on medium speed until smooth. Add more honey to taste if desired.
Pour into 3 glasses. Serve immediately.

name: Forever Young Smoothie
directions: Mix all in a blender.
Pour in glasses and enjoy.

similar.name: The Healthiest Fruit Smoothie on Earth

name: P'at Lassi (Indo-Korean Yogurt Drink)
directions: Pour all ingredients into a blender, starting with the beans at the bottom.
Blend thoroughly, making sure beans are chopped up and well incorporated.
If the mixture is too thick, blend in small amounts of water until desired thickness is reached.

name: Razberry White Russian
directions: Mix all ingredients and pour into your favorite cocktail glass.
Top with your favorite fruit and enjoy.
Variation:
Add 1 scoop of vanilla ice cream instead of milk.
Blend all ingredients in the blender until almost frozen.
Serve and enjoy.

name: Hot Summers Eve Cooler
directions: Blend all ingredients until frozen.
Pour into any type of cocktail glass.
You may need to add more Orange Juice if it becomes to thick.
Garnish with an orange slice & a cherry.
Variation:
You can substitute the vanilla ice cream for heavy cream or milk.

similar.name: Creamy Coffee Ice Cream Brandy Smoothie Dessert

name: Morning Commute Peach Smoothie
directions: Puree all ingredients in blender.

similar.name: Banana, Blueberry, Mixed Greens, Yogurt Smoothie

name: Banana-Mango Batidos
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and puree until smooth.
Pour into 2 stemmed glasses.

name: Cheryl's Soymilk Smoothy
directions: Blend all together in a blender till smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Berry Sweet Summer Shake
directions: Throw everything in a blender -- 56--45---23---HIKE!
Blend until smooth.
Enjoy this cool summer treat!:D.
NOTE: You can add protein powder of dried milk powder for more protein.

name: Yummy Starburst Smoothie!
directions: Place all ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth.

similar.name: Gingerly's Sunrise and Shine Power Smoothie

name: The Alfafara Avocado Smoothie
directions: Put the avocado and the milk and sugar in the blender.  Mix for a minute then stop and taste for sweetness; add sugar if necessary.
Add the ice and fill to the top of the blender.
Mix till the product forms a smooth consistency.
Remove from blender and pour into small 8 ounce glasses--and enjoy.

name: Key Lime Banana Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients except frozen yogurt/ice cream in blender and blend on high until smooth.
Add yogurt or ice cream and blend again until smooth.

name: Berry Smoothie
directions: Combine ice cream, milk, and fruit spread in a blender container.  Blend until smooth.
For a lighter, frothier option, and 1 cup of sugar free lemon-line soda to mixture prior to blending.  Garnish with mint leaves or fresh fruit, if desired.

name: The Yummiest Smoothie Ever!
directions: blend together till smooth.

name: Summer Breezes Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and puree until smooth.
Serve in a frosted glass.

name: Smoothberry Aust Ww 2 Pts
directions: Combine the milk, raspberries and nectar in a blender.
Blend until smooth and thick.
Pour into two tall glasses and serve.

similar.name: Yummy Yummy Raspberry and Banana Smoothie

name: I've Got a Date With Some Chocolate Shake
directions: Stew dates in hot water in a bowl or on stove top. Mush until they turn to a paste.
Combine the date mix and other ingredients in a blender and blend well. If you would like something more slushy, add a few ice cubes.
Enjoy this sweet and dense treat.:) Yum.

similar.name: A Date With a Banana Smoothie

name: Honey-Ginger Lassi
directions: Combine all of the ingredients except the ice in a blender. Blend for 30 seconds to froth the milk.
Add the ice cubes, and blend until the ice is pulverized. Pour the lassi into large glasses filled with ice, and serve.

Variation: The same ingredients can make a soothing warm drink. Increase the milk to 3 cups, and heat it almost to a boil. Add the honey, ginger, and nutmeg, and stir well. Omit the ice. Serve in mugs.

name: Quick Banana Eggnog for the Kiddies
directions: Wash the egg shells and mash the bananas.
Combine everything in a blender and blend well.
If you would like to warm this up, you may do so in a pan on stovetop over medium-high heat for 5 minutes or until hot.

name: Amaretto and Raspberry Smoothie
directions: Place half the raspberries in a blender with half the ice cream, 1 tablespoon almond liqueur, and 1 teaspoon orange zest. Pulse the blender until the mixture is combined. Add about half a tray of ice and blend until smooth.

Divide the smoothie between 2 highball glasses and continue making the other 2 smoothies with the remaining ingredients. Crumble the macaroon cookies over the top of the smoothies. Serve with long spoons and a straw.

name: Cool Melon Sipper
directions: Arrange 1 cup cantaloupe and 1 cup honeydew on a baking sheet. Freeze for 2 hours.
Remove melons from freezer.
Place all ingredients in a blender and process until smooth.

name: Berry and Banana Frullato
directions: Combine first 4 ingredients in a blender.  Add 1 tablespoon maple syrup and blend until smooth, adding more maple syrup to taste if desired.  Pour smoothie into 2 glasses.  Top each with additional berries for garnish and serve.

name: Minted Tomato, Rhubarb and Lime Cooler
directions: Combine rhubarb, sugar & water in a med pan. Cover, simmer about 10 min or till rhubarb is tender & allow to cool.
Just b4 serving, blend or process rhubarb w/remaining ingredients till smooth & serve immediately.

similar.name: Pineapple Melon Mint Cold Summer Soup

name: Chaos Forest Beverage
directions: Add ingredients to blender! BLEND.
Sometimes ice is hard to crush so, if you wish, crush ice first on high speed, then blend smoothie in with ice.
Freeze banana's ahead of time. Or save old, dying bananas by freezing them and using them for the chaos smoothie.
Since it IS a chaos smoothie, please feel free to make it more chaotic and add more things.

name: Cheeky Chocolate Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients to blender and blend until smooth.

name: Julie's Julius
directions: Hull strawberries and slice in half.
Put all ingredients into blender.
Blend until smooth.

name: Papaya Pick Me Up
directions: Place all ingredients into blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour and enjoy.

name: High Protein Strawberry Orange & Banana Shake
directions: Blend until smooth.

name: Mango Madness
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender and cover.
Process until smooth on high speed.
Serve immediately.
This looks lovely with a garnish of raspberries and an orange slice on the side.

name: Julie's Instant Breakfast
directions: Slice banana and put all ingredients into the blender.
Blend until smooth.

name: Vodka Smoothie
directions: In a blender, mix the vodka, orange juice, strawberries, orange sherbet, and ice.
Blend until smooth.

name: High Protein Pina Colada Shake
directions: Add all the ingredients into a blender and blend on high speed until completely smooth.
If the pineapple isnt frozen i advise adding ice cubes instead of the 1/2 cup of water! as my first attempt was quite warm and a struggle to drink!
Enjoy!

name: Vegan Coconut-Citrus Julius
directions: Blend all ingredients in a blender.
Taste to adjust sweetness.
If desired, add 6 ice cubes, one at a time.
Serve in a tall glass with a lemon slice.

similar.name: The Orange Creamsicle - Vegan / Non-Dairy Smoothie

name: Homemade Meal Replacement Powder or Mrp
directions: combind all ingredients in blender or shaker cup.
grind oats in a coffee grinder to very fine or just use oat flour.
use a higher quality protein like Whey Isolate for best results.
mix with 1 cup of water or skim milk.
mix with fresh or frozen fruit, sugar free flavored syrups, or anything else you want to add.
mix well and enjoy!

name: Raspberry Banana Protein Smoothie
directions: pour all ingredients into blender in order listed. blend on high for 1 or 2 minutes.
pour into glass and serve immediately.
makes 1 16oz glass or 2 8oz glasses.

similar.name: Yummy Yummy Raspberry and Banana Smoothie

name: Spiced Chai Tea Smoothie
directions: Pour milk into glass measuring cup; warm in microwave for 1 minute.
Add tea bag; let steep 10 minutes.
Remove tea bag and refrigerate for 5 minutes.
In blender or food processor, combine milk mixture and tofu.
Add sugar substitute, both extracts, and ice.
Process until ice is crushed and mixture is frothy.
Sprinkle with cinnamon and serve immediately.

name: Breakfast Fruit Julius
directions: Make tea and strain.
Combine tea with pineapple juice.
Blend bananas and yogurt together till smooth then add tea/pineapple mix, orange juice and lime juice.
Serve cold.

similar.name: There's No Fruit in the House Smoothie
Awesome Orange, Coconut and Banana Smoothie

name: Cappuccino Protein Smoothie
directions: pour water into blender.
add protein powder and oat flour. blend on medium for 15 seconds. (you can use a meal replacment powder like MetRx or Myoplex instead).
add coffee and half the cinnamon. blend for 30 more seconds.
add ice cubes and blend on high for 30 seconds.
pour into tall glass, top with cool whip and remaining cinnamon, serve.

similar.name: Apple Pie a La Mode Protein Smoothie

name: Key Lime Pie Protein Smoothie
directions: add cold water to blender.
add protein powder and oat flour. (can use meal replacement powder like myoplex or MetRx instead). Blend for 15 seconds on medium.
add frozen limeade, blend for 30 more seconds.
add ice and blend on 30 seconds on high.
pour into tall glass, top with cool whip, serve and enjoy.

similar.name: Apple Pie a La Mode Protein Smoothie
"if You Like Pina Coladas" Protein Smoothie

name: Razzed up Raspberry Protein Smoothie
directions: add yogurt and protein powder to blender. blend on low for 30 seconds.
add raspberries, lime juice, and sugar substitue. blend on medium for 30 seconds.
add ice and blend on high for 30 seconds.
pour in tall glass, serve and enjoy!

similar.name: Yummy Yummy Raspberry and Banana Smoothie

name: "if You Like Pina Coladas" Protein Smoothie
directions: pour water into blender.
add protein powder and oat flour (you can use a meal replacement powder like myoplex or metrx instead). blend on medium for 15 seconds.
add pineapple and coconut extract(can use shredded coconut instead, about 1 tbsp). blend for 30 seconds.
add ice and blend on high for 30 seconds.
pour into tall glass and serve.

similar.name: Apple Pie a La Mode Protein Smoothie

name: Sparkling Orange Protein Smoothie
directions: pour soda into blender.
add yogurt and protein powder. blend on medium speed for 15 seconds.
add peeled orange and blend for 30 more seconds.
add ice and blend on high for 30 more seconds.
serve in tall glass and enjoy!

similar.name: Awesome Orange, Coconut and Banana Smoothie

name: Strawberry Cheesecake Bubble Tea
directions: Whisk cream cheese frosting into milk and set aside.
Place thawed frozens strawberries into food processor along with splenda and process until smooth.
Crush ice in blender until partially crushed.
Add liquids and blend on highest setting until all ice cubes are crushed.
Place tapioca into a tall glass and pour blended mixture over pearls. Serve with bubble tea straw and enjoy!

name: Bewitching Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender; process until smooth.
Add any color combination of food coloring depending on how gross or cute you want it to look!

name: Cookies and Cream Bubble Tea Slushie
directions: To make oreos from scratch I used a recipe called "Faux-Reos" from www.kingarthurflour.com under recipes.
Melt chips in microwave for about 20 seconds, stir then microwave for another 20 seconds. Mix 1/4 cup of water with melted chocolate until sauce is formed.
Mix crushed oreos with 1/4 cup of water.
Crush ice until partially crushed.
Pour all liquids into blender and blend on highest setting until all remaining ice chunks are crushed.
Place tapioca pearl at bottom of tall glass and serve with bubble tea straw.

similar.name: Matcha Green Tea Smoothie or Iced Latte

name: Apple Pie a La Mode Protein Smoothie
directions: pour water and apple juice into blender.
add protein powder and blend on medium for 15 seconds.
add butter buds and half the cinnamon and blend for 30 more seconds.
Add ice and blend on high for 30 more seconds.
Pour into tall glass, top with cool whip and remaining cinnamon.
Serve and enjoy!

similar.name: Apple Pie in a Glass- Smoothie

name: Ww Strawberry Frosty
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until thick and frothy.

name: Frozen Pineapple Smoothie
directions: Pour juice, milk, and vanilla into blender. Add allspice and Splenda.
Add ice to fill blender up to the 5 cup line.
Mix on whatever speed your blender’s manual recommends for crushing ice until creamy and slushy.
Serve in tall glasses dusted with additional allspice if desired. Can be garnished with a dollop of whipped cream and a split ring of pineapple hung on the glass if desired.
Adults may enjoy adding a shot of spiced rum.

name: Chef Joey's Vegan Coconut Peach Smoothie
directions: Wash and slice the peaches and remove the pits.
Place them into the blender cup and add the rest of the ingredients and process.
This makes a huge amount so if you're using a smaller blender maybe cut the recipe in half.
Bon Appetit!

name: Malted Honey and Apricot Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend until frothy. Drink immediately.

name: Strawberry-Citrus Refreshers
directions: In a blender, combine strawberries, orange, lime juice and sugar substitute. Puree until smooth.
Stir in water.
Fill 4 (10oz) glasses with ice cubes.
Pour blended juice over ice.
Garnish with fresh strawberries, orange slices or lime slices if desired. Fresh mint would probably be good with this too.

name: Tiramisu Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients except cumbs till smooth.
Pour into glasses and top with graham cracker crumbs.
Give each glass a stir to incorporate crumbs.
Enjoy.

name: Delicious Vegan Shake (Guilt Free!)
directions: Toss the ice cream and milk into the blender.
Coarsely cut up fruit if needed.
Top with vanilla extract, sweetener and flax if desired.
Bland for about 30 seconds.
Enjoy!
Feel free to experiment with the basics, it always turns out tasty. If you want a smoothie texture fruit should be room temperature or chilled, if you want a thicker treat, freeze fruit beforehand.

similar.name: Super Protein Chocolate or Mocha Smoothie/shake
Ultra Thick Minty Vegan Chocobanana Bliss

name: Melody’s Citrus “smooth-See”
directions: In a blender or food processor, combine the orange zest and orange sections, grapefruit, carrot, yogurt, raspberries, papaya, wheat germ, lemon juice and sugar.
Blend until smooth.
Serve and enjoy.

similar.name: Raw Food Green Cilantro Citrus Smoothie

name: Blueberry-Kiwi Extreme
directions: Pour hot or boiling water over the dates in a small bowl and let soak for 5-10 minutes, to soften. Note: if using another, less sweet type of date, such as medjool, I'd suggest using one or two extra.
Transfer dates (without water) and other ingredients to the blender. You can reserve some blueberries for garnish if you like. Blend until smooth. Stir in the extra berries.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Jamba Juice at Home Apple Kiwi Kosmo Smoothie

name: South African Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients in a blender on high power until smooth.
Pour into a collins glass, garnish with chocolate shavings and a cherry, and serve.

name: Mango Papaya Smoothie
directions: If you like a sweeter smoothie feel free to add your favorite no calorie sweetner. I like 'stevia plus'.
put all of the ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth. Then enjoy!
This smoothie has 155 calories.

name: Pear Perfection Smoothie
directions: Blend until creamy then serve. Add water or ice cubes if the mixture is too thick.

name: Chef Joey Z's Mochacao Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Grind up the coffee beans, cinnamon and cacao nibs in a coffee grinder until finely ground.
In the cup of a large blender add the non-dairy milk, coconut milk, bananas and the coffee bean/cacao mixture.
Blend on high until well incorporated.
Serve in a tall glass and enjoy.
Bon Appetit!

similar.name: Chef Joey's Vegan Coconut Peach Smoothie

name: Sexy Starter Smoothie
directions: Blend until smooth and creamy then serve.

name: Papaya Milk Drink
directions: Peel papaya.
Cut papaya in half, remove seeds, and chop fruit coarsely.
Combine the papaya, milk, cinnamon and ice in blender.
Blend on high speed until the mixture is smooth and thick.

similar.name: Creamy Papaya and Coconut Milk Smoothie (Refresco De Lechosa)

name: Razz-P-Blue Smoothie
directions: Add the fruit into a blender (hand crank blender will work too.).
Whir.
Add in the milk and the yogurt.  Simply free pour the milk.  It just helps to smooth the drink out a bit.  If you want it quite thick, only put in a tad or omit it altogether.
Whir again.
Drink up!

name: Malibu Magic
directions: Blend all ingredients and pour into a tall glass(suggested 10oz footed hi-ball glass or other talllarge flute).
Garnish with strawberry,straw and serve.

similar.name: Creamy Coffee Ice Cream Brandy Smoothie Dessert

name: Any Flavor Crystal Light Protein Smoothie
directions: Add milk to blender. add protein powder and blend on medium for 15 seconds.
Add remaining ingredients and mix on high for 30 seconds.
Pour in tall glass and serve!

similar.name: Anything Goes Fruit and Nut Smoothie

name: Extra Creamy Vanilla Protein Smoothie
directions: Add milk and protein powder to blender and blend for 15 seconds on medium speed.
Add remaining ingredients and blend on high for 30 seconds.
Pour and serve!

similar.name: Peanut Butter, Banana, and Flax Smoothies

name: Booberry Punch
directions: In blender combine blueberries, apple juice, ice cream, milk and cinnamon until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Orange Julius... a Special Twist on an Old Favorite
directions: Slice two oranges and put in blender. Do the same with a kiwi.  Be sure to remove all seeds (for the oranges) and outer skin (for both).
Blend fruit with 1/2 cup, plus 2 tablespoons, of vanilla yogurt.
Finally blend in twelve icecubes.
Pour into glasses, relax, and enjoy. ^_^.

similar.name: Orange Julius With  the Secret Ingredient!
Frothy Orange Delicious (Julius Copy Cat :) from Food Network's

name: Alexandra's Lime Juice
directions: Squeeze the lime and put the sugar inches  Put the water in and mix in blender for 4 minutes.
ENJOY!

similar.name: Awesome Orange, Coconut and Banana Smoothie

name: Seans Waffle Smoothie
directions: Blend until smooth.

name: Sparkling Peach Splash
directions: Combine first 3 ingredients in a blender; process until smooth. Freeze 1 hour.
Pour Champagne into a pitcher. Spoon peach mixture into pitcher; stir to combine.
Garnish with peach slices, if desired. Serve immediately.

name: X-Rated Tropico Cooler
directions: For the perfect drink, add all the ingredients to your blender.
Blend until all the ice is chopped up and no large chunks are left.
Pour your  Tropico Cooler into a hurricane glass or martini glass and serve.

name: Pear and Cinnamon Milk
directions: Mix all ingredients in a blender.
Pour into a balloon shaped glass.

similar.name: Apple Pie in a Glass- Smoothie

name: Coconut Cocktail
directions: Shake all ingredients together with ice.
Strain into a champagne glass.

name: Blood Sugar Balancing Orange Cream
directions: Add all ingredients into blender.
Blend until smooth and creamy.

name: Eye-Protecting Mango Dream
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until smooth and creamy.

name: My Huge-Mongous Pumpkin Smoothie (Healthy, Low Cal)
directions: Dissolve your sweetner of choice in one tablespoon of hot water.
Add all ingredients except the ice to the blender.
Whiz it a couple of times and then add the ice.
Blend on highest setting until ice is completely crushed.

name: Alice's Basic Fruit Smoothies
directions: In a blender, layer 1 cp strawberries, 1/2 cp blueberries, 1 cp yogurt, approx 1/2 cup milk, or more for thinner smoothie, and vanilla extract.  Start out by mixing it til blended, then set on puree for one minute, longer for more processed smoothies.
This also freezes VERY well.  I'll make a double batch and put 1 gallon away in the freezer, so I don't have to make it so often.

name: Strawberry Blender Blast
directions: Throw all the ingredients into the blender and mix until smooth!

similar.name: Berry Blast Protein Shake -- Fruit Smoothie

name: Clapp Family Smoothie
directions: Blend together and pour into a frosty glass and enjoy!

name: Super Healthful Carrot Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients (in the order listed) and blend until smooth.  Serve immediately.

similar.name: Carrot, Peach and Fresh Thyme Smoothie (Raw Food)

name: Green Goodness Smoothie
directions: Pour all in blender, blend and enjoy.

name: Great Shakes
directions: Cut frozen banana into 4 or 5 pieces.
Process all ingredients in a food processor or blender into smooth and creamy.

name: Black Currant Smoothie
directions: Put all of the ingredients into a food processor or blender and blend until smooth.
Pour into a glass and serve.

similar.name: Yummy Yummy Raspberry and Banana Smoothie

name: Extremely Easy Fruit Smoothie
directions: Combine fruit and milk (or juice) in blender.
Blend until smooth.
Add sugar, if neccesary, and blend again.
Serve immediately.

name: Ultimate Power Smoothie
directions: Mix well in blender until smooth.

name: Fuzzy Orange Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender in the order listed; process mixture until smooth, stopping to scrape down sides.

similar.name: Blimey Limey from Tropical Smoothie Cafe

name: Banana Bubblegum Slushie
directions: Place ingredients in blender.
Pulse to crush ice then blend until all the ingredients are liquidised.
Pour into a tall glass and enjoy!

name: Apple Cream Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender & blend until smooth.

name: Allegria (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Put the mango pieces in a blender, add the other ingredients, except the water. Blend until smooth.
Fill a goblet with ice and pour blended mixture in until the glass until is 3/4 full.
Add the water to dilute the mixture a little. Stir.
Garnish with a slice of orange and a maraschino cherry.
Serve with a straw.

name: The Best Banana Smoothie Ever!
directions: Blend until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Jay's Too Far Juice
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender. Cover and blend until smooth.
This recipe can be doubled.

name: Pineapple Passion Smoothie
directions: Put all the ingredients (except for pineapple sliced decorations) in a blender and blend well for about 1 minute.
Pour the smoothies into fancy glasses and add straws. Place a wedge of pineapple on the rim of the glass and serve promptly.

similar.name: Pineapple Smoothie - Delicious, Easy and Healthy

name: Golden Kiwi Smoothie
directions: Slice kiwi into halves and spoon the fruit out into a blender or food processor.
Add the banana, orange juice and yogurt.
Blend, until smooth, taking care not to crush the kiwi seeds, as this can make your smmothie bitter.
Pour over ice cubes into 2 long glasses.

name: Pineapple Carrot Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and blend until smooth.

name: Mixed-Berry Breakfast Boost
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth. Pour into two tall glasses and serve.

similar.name: Berry Blast Protein Shake -- Fruit Smoothie

name: Vanilla Coconut Frosty
directions: Lightly dip the rim of each glass in water and shake off excess. Dip glass rim in sugar to coat.
Pour ice cream, cream of coconut, and milk into a blender until smooth.
Serve frosty in sugar-rimmed glasses.
*Its also fun to color the sugar for glass rims by putting sugar and a few drops of food coloring in a ziploc bag and shaking before rimming glasses.

name: Pucker up Smoothie
directions: Place all items into blender, and blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Vegan Spiced Squash Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in food processor/blender/smoothie maker and blend until smooth.  (Note: Add spices to taste).
Enjoy!

name: White Cranberry Peach Banana Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender.
Blend for a few seconds on high speed or until ingredients are.
thoroughly combined.
Pour into a glass.
Makes 1 12-ounce serving.

similar.name: One Honey of a Banana-Peach Smoothie

name: Luscious White Cranberry Peach Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender.
Blend for a few seconds on high speed or until ingredients are.
thoroughly combined. You may want to taste to see if it is sweet enough for your liking at this point.  I had to add a bit of sugar to mine because it was a bit tart.
Pour into a glass.
Makes 1 11-ounce serving.

name: Orange Slush
directions: In a blender combine all ingredients except ice cubes until smooth.
Then add a few ice cubes at a time until it reaches your desired consistency.
Serve in chilled glasses immediately.

name: Rise & Shine Strawberry Smoothie
directions: In blender, mix together vitamins and orange juice so that the vitamins will be evenly distributed.
Add frozen fruit, rice milk and water.
Blend together until smooth.

similar.name: Gingerly's Sunrise and Shine Power Smoothie

name: Fruity White Tea Smoothie
directions: Steep 2 white teabags in 1 cup boiling water and let chill in refrigerator OR chill with ice. (You can stir in sugar now or later).
Pour tea into blender.
Add the other ingredients and blend. I leave mine just a little chunky.
Serve immediately and enjoy!

name: Pb & Banana Breakfast Smoothie
directions: combine all ingredients in blender
blend until smooth.

similar.name: Pb + J Smoothie, With a Twist

name: Country Chronicle August Cooler
directions: In a saucepan, bring water and sugar to a boil; remove from heat, add fruit & lemon juices.
Pour mixture into ice cube trays OR loaf or cake pans to PARTIALLY freeze.
Remove from trays or pans and whip or blend until smooth.
Refreeze or use immediately.
SERVE:  fill tumbler half to two-thirds full of slush, then cover with gingerale.

name: Ultimate Power Smoothie
directions: Nuke the oatmeal with water.  Include all ingredients in the blender and blend until smooth.  For more volume add more ice.

name: Breakfast in a Glass
directions: In a spice or coffee grinder finely grind flaxseed and sunflower seeds. Set aside.
In a blender or food processor, blend together soy milk, berries, banana and yogurt until almost smooth.
Add seed mixture, protein powder and lecithin, is using, to soy milk mixture. Blend just until mixed, about 5 seconds.

name: Morning Burst Smoothie
directions: Cut all fruit into small chunks, place in blender. Next add water and orange juice concentrate, then blend for approx 20-30 seconds adding ice for texture as desired.

name: Pear Batido
directions: Cut 4 thin slices of pear, crosswise and set aside.  These are for garnish.
Peel, halve and core both pears.
Using a blender, puree the pears, rum and condensed milk until smooth, about 30 seconds.
Add the ice cubes and blend until smooth, about 1 minute.
Pour into martini glasses and garnish with a pear slice.
Enjoy!

name: Banana Twinkie Shmoothie
directions: Place Twinkies, banana and ice cream in the blender one at a time.
Blend until smooth.
Serve at once.

name: Java Joe Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients together until smooth.

name: Kiwi Pear Smoothie
directions: Combine the yogurt, pears, banana and honey in a blender. Pulse until smooth and blended.
Add ice cubes one at a time and process until smooth.
Slice kiwifruit into halves and spoon fruit into the blender with the rest of the smoothie. Pulse until just blended.

similar.name: Pear, Kiwi, Berry, Flax Seed Smoothie

name: Apricot Health Drink -Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients in a blender until smooth.

name: Caramel Peanut Butter Smoothie
directions: Process apples, bananas, yogurt, dip, peanut butter and ice in blender until smooth, stopping once to scrape down the sides.
Top with slice of strawberry and drizzle of caramel, if desired. Serve immediately.
Note: You can use T. Marzetti Old Fashioned, Light or Fat Free Caramel Apple Dip.

name: Nutella-Banana Milkshake
directions: Put ingredients in a blender until desired consistency.  You could use a variety of ingredients instead of or in addition to the milk.  (ie. soy milk, ice cream, yogurt)  Get creative you'll love it.

name: Quick Start Breakfast Drink
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and process until smooth and foamy or whisk with wire whisk until smooth and foamy.
Serve.

similar.name: Honey and Vanilla Breakfast in a Glass

name: Traffic Light Smoothie
directions: Slice green kiwifruit into halves and spoon the fruit out into a food processor or blender with 1-2 tablespoons of orange juice.
Process until just smooth, taking care not to crush the seeds. Pour into one or two long glasses.
Slice the gold kiwifruit(or peach and pineapple) into halves and spoon the fruit into a clean food processor or blender with 3-4 tablespoons of orange juice. Purée, until just smooth.
Carefully pour the gold purée over the back of a spoon on top of the green purée to form two distinct layers.
Purée the raspberries in a clean blender with 2 tablespoons of orange juice, until just smooth. Pour red purée over the back of a spoon on top of the gold purée to make the third layer.
Serve immediately.

Note: ripe kiwifruit works best for this recipe, as the green kiwifruit can be a bit too tart. If you feel this recipe needs more sweetening, then a spoon full of honey can be added to any of the three fruit purées.

name: Spinach Mango Smoothie
directions: Peel and slice mango.  Combine with spinach and orange juice in VitaMix blender on high for 1 minute.  Enjoy your "green drink!".

NOTES: For a thick smoothie, use 1/4 cup orange juice.  To thin, just add a little more to get the consistency you like.  Also, you do need to use a ripe mango.  A not-quite-ripe firm one will not yield a very smooth smoothie!

name: Toddler " Hidden Veggie" Smoothie
directions: Pour milk into the blender.

Add banana, sugar/honey/other, and then whatever frozen veggies AND a fruit to the blender.  ***The key is you want to not go higher than halfway up a 5 cup blender or it gets too thick. Add milk or OJ if it gets too thick.
Put blender on a high setting and let it go at it for a good minute or two.  Pulse a few times to make sure it's at the "right" consistency (too your liking).

Serve in a toddler friendly container--preferably something with a STRAW as they a) like straws and b) it helps with the intake of the smoothie.  Do NOT put it in a sippy cup.  Last warning -- my son had fresh kale in the first 3-4 of these I made and had some wicked black poo for days.  Lets just say that was the end of the kale episode. ;).

similar.name: Fruit Smoothie for Babies or Toddlers

name: Dr. Oz's Green Drink
directions: Put all ingredients in blender and blend until smooth.
This recipe makes 28 to 30 ounces or about three to four servings. This will be very thick and you may need to add water - If you have a juicer this may work better.

The green drink has a strong taste and if you are used to drinking soda or sweet tea, the taste will take some getting used to. Dr. Oz suggests adding other items at first to sweeten the green drink to your taste.

name: Banana Pineapple Eggnog
directions: Slice banana into blender and blend until smooth.
Add remaining ingredients and blend thoroughly.
Pour into chilled glasses and top with ice cream if desired.

name: Indian Buttermilk Lassi With Cardamom
directions: Stir to dissolve the sugar in the water.
Crush the cardamom seeds (with a rolling pin or pestle and mortar) and add them to sugar-water.
Add all the rest of the ingredients; stir to blend.
Chill and serve.

name: Strawberry Burst Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender.
Blend until smooth.
Serve in chilled or frosted glass with fresh strawberry garnish (optional).

name: Cappuccino Delight
directions: In a blender, combine coffee, ice cream, and chocolate syrup.
Blend until smooth.
Pour over crushed ice.
Add whip cream on top and surround your scenes with chocolate and coffee.

name: Lava Flow (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Combine all ingredients except the strawberries in blender with 1 cup of ice and blend until smooth.
Put strawberries at the bottom of a parfait glass, then quickly pour in blended mixture for a starburst effect.

name: Peach Melba (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender on low speed.
Pour into highball glass and garnish with raspberries if desired.

similar.name: Peaches N Berries N Cream, Oh My!

name: Strawberry Wonderland (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender with 1 cup ice and blend until smooth.
Pour into snifter.
Top with whipped cream and garnish with a strawberry if desired.

name: Summertime Barbarian (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and blend until smooth.
Pour into collins glasses.
Garnish with kiwi fruit wheels if desired.

name: Morning Smoothies for Two
directions: Mix all ingredients in a blender until there are no chunks.  Enjoy!

name: Chocolate Orange Green Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients well.  If you have a very powerful blender, such as the Vitamix, you can simply blend for one minute.  If you have a standard blender, blend for one minute, stop, push any stray spinach down into the smoothie mixture, then blend for another 2 minutes, or until smooth.
Pour into a glass and enjoy!

name: Persimmon Apple Smoothie
directions: Blend.  I also add 1 tablespoons agave nectar/honey or 2 packets Splenda/stevia, but the software just wouldn't let me add it for some reason.  So add sweetener to taste.
Drink and enjoy!

name: Brownie Batter
directions: Begin by blending the dates, cocoa powder, protein powder, soymilk, and water (if needed to help your blender along).  The mixture should be completely smooth.
Next, add 2-3 oz spinach to the blender.  Blend again, stopping to push the spinach down into the blender container if necessary.
Add the next 2-3 oz spinach, and blend again until the mixture is completely smooth.
Pour into a glass and enjoy your antioxidant-filled treat with 2 servings of fruit and a whopping 4-6 servings of vegetables!

similar.name: Banana, Blueberry, Mixed Greens, Yogurt Smoothie

name: Most Quenching Smoothie Ever!!
directions: Purée the frozen mango chunks until they are completely smooth in a food processor or a blender.
Slowly add the orange juice while blending.
The amount of juice is actually totally up to you depending on how thick or thin you like your smoothies.

This smoothie is so good, I love it -- but it can also play host to numerous other frozen fruits and/or juices. Just be sure to blend any other fruits with the mango at the beginning and then add the juice. I often add a quick squeeze of lime to the orange juice.
Enjoy!

name: Mandie's Super Healthy Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients in a blender until smooth.
I usually blend the soy milk, spinach, and tomatoes together first so that the spinach is completely liquified.

Mix and match ingredients.  We usually use what ever kind of fruit we can find on sale.  Strawberries and bananas are a staple, but I have been know to add blueberries, apples, starfruit, mangoes, pureed pumpkin, and even peanut butter.

name: Dosha Balancing Smoothie
directions: Pulse almonds in blender until thoroughly ground. If necessary, use a spatula or a spoon to scrape the sides of the blender.
Add yogurt and blend.
Add bananas and blend.
Add honey and blend.
Pour over ice if desired and serve.

name: Tyler's Awesome Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender.
Don't forget to put the cover on the blender.
Blend for about a minute.
Taste; add more Splenda if necessary.
Top with whipped cream if desired.

name: Paradise Island Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients into a blender.  Blend. Pour into tall glass and add crushed ice.
Enjoy!

name: Breakfast in a Blender
directions: Blend all ingredients.

name: Berry Delicious
directions: In the blender, combine the mixed berries, strawberry yogurt, banana, milk, and sugar.
Cover and blend until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve.

name: Pineapple-Orange Colada
directions: Place all ingredients in blender.
Cover and blend on high speed, stopping blender to scrape sides if necessary, until smooth.

name: Lime Freeze (Non-Alcoholic Beverage)
directions: Place soda, ice, sherbet & limeade in blender.
Blend at high speed till mixture is slushy, stopping blender 2-3 times to push mixture down.
Pour into frosted tumblers & serve.

name: Frozen Strawberry Banana Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients to blender and blend until smooth.

similar.name: Berry Wonderful Berry-Banana Vanilla Soy Smoothie

name: Vodka, Orange & Raspberry Crush
directions: Blend together vodka, orange juice, ice cubes and  raspberries, reserving a few raspberries for garnishing.
Pour into tall glasses and garnish with extra raspberries.

name: Perfect Pineapple Strawberry Smoothie (Healthy Too!)
directions: Place all ingredients in blender.
Blend until smooth and lump free.
Pour into glass and enjoy!

name: Tastes Like Thanksgiving Smoothie
directions: Peel and segment navel orange into slices.
Place all ingredients in a blender, starting with the milk, banana, and yogurt (for consistency purposes).

Puree on high 1 minute, or until all ingredients are blended well.  Pour into two tall glasses and enjoy!  If you have only 6 ounce containers of yogurt, add ice cubes to thicken the smoothie if desired.

name: Creamsicle Smoothie
directions: Brew orange spice and peppermint tea in boiling water. Allow to steep for 4 minutes then remove bags and allow tea to cool.
Pour the cooled tea into your blender, and add the orange juice, honey, ice cream, and ice.
Mix tea in blender until mixed and smooth.
Pour into glass and garnish with whipped cream, if desired.

name: Orange Yoghurt Drink
directions: Blend both ingredients until smooth and frothy, and drink immediately.
Notes & tips.
Tip: Try using tasty low-fat peach and mango yoghurt. Change the yoghurt to cherry and add a scoop of berry ice cream.
Other combos to try: Mixed berries such as strawberries and raspberries.

name: Paradise Freeze
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender or food processor container.
Cover, blend until thick and smooth.

name: Love Potion
directions: Place the first 3 ingredients in a blender and Puree on High until you have a uniform color.
To make the potion thicker, add more fruit; to make it thinner, add more juice.
Garnish with cherries.

name: Jungle Cooler Mocktail
directions: COMBINE ingredients in a cocktail shaker. Serve.

name: Linda's Fantabulous Frozen Slushy
directions: Whiz everything in a smoothie machine until blended.  If you want a more liquid smoothie just add a bit more juice.
Have fun mixing and matching fruits.  Use frozen peaches in place of the mango for a different taste.
Serve in tall chilled glasses.
For a grown-up drink add some vanilla rum or vodka to taste.

similar.name: Sommer's Slushy Strawberry Mandarin Brain Freeze

name: Oatmeal Protein Shake
directions: Blend all ingredients, added ice to adjust consistency of a smoothie.

name: California Strawberry Smoothie!!
directions: Place strawberries in a plastic container and freeze for about an hour.
In a blender, combine frozen strawberries, yogurt and orange juice. Blend until smooth. Pour into a tall glass and serve.

name: Blackberry Tea Smoothie
directions: Boil water and let all three tea bags steep for five minutes.
Remove teabags and allow tea to come to room temperature.
Combine tea and all remaining smoothie ingredients in a blender, and blend until smooth.
Pour into glasses. Optional garnish: whipped cream, berries.

name: Blueberry Baby Smoothie (Fwdgf)
directions: Mix the blueberries in a blender with the milk, honey, and lemon juice.
Add a sprinkle of cardamom just before serving.

similar.name: Blueberry Pomegranate Smoothie With Honey & Orange

name: Abs Diet "okay on the Oj" Smoothie
directions: add all ingrediants to blender and blend until smooth.

name: Tropical "fruit Bowl" Shake
directions: Blend all in a food processor, adding more o.j. if you like, till smooth. This would also be great with some "superfood" (i.e. flaxseeds or ground nuts) sprinkled on top.
Enjoy!

name: Busymomma's Amazing Smoothie!
directions: Blend and enjoy!

name: Ww Banana Peach Smoothie (Ibs Safe)
directions: Blend all ingredients in blender or magic bullet until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Banana Protein Smoothie/Shake (Ibs Safe)
directions: Blend all in blender or magic bullet until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Banana Vanilla Milkshake
directions: Blend it until it's all smooth.
Serve right away.

name: Pumpkin Pie Smoothie (Ibs Safe)
directions: Combine all in blender and blend until smooth.
Add additional milk if too thick.

name: Dancer's Pro Boost Fruity Milkshake
directions: Place ice cubes in a one cup measure, add water up to the one cup mark. Combine the ice water and all the other ingredients in a blender, and process until the ice has completely melted.
Serve in a glass, and garnish with a strawberry or mint leaf.
Serves one.

similar.name: High Protein Strawberry Orange & Banana Shake

name: Pango-Berry Smoothie
directions: Blend all till smooth and enjoy!

name: Bone-Building Smoothie
directions: PLACE ice, evaporated milk, berries and/or banana, yogurt and Carnation Instant Breakfast in blender; cover.
Blend until smooth.
Kid-Favorite Variations:
- Use 1/2 cup Berry or Apple Flavor JUICY JUICE in addition to evaporated milk and proceed as above.
- Use 2 tablespoons NESTLÉ NESQUIK Strawberry Flavor Syrup in addition to Carnation Instant Breakfast and proceed as above.

similar.name: Long Run Recovery Banana Berry Smoothie
High Protein Strawberry Orange & Banana Shake

name: Quick Breakfast in a Glass
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large glass and whisk.
OR combine all ingredients in a blender and process until frothy.

name: Quick Eggnog Breakfast Drink
directions: Add milk a little at a time to powdered milk, stirring or whisking until smooth.  Then add remaining ingredients and stir or whisk.
OR combine all ingredients in a blender and process until frothy.

similar.name: Quick Banana Eggnog for the Kiddies

name: Tofu Banana Breakfast Smoothy
directions: If you remember, you may wish to peel and freeze your banana the night before. I rarely remember tho.
Place all ingredients into a blender.
Blend.
Drink and enjoy.
This is also good with 1/2 cup OJ and 1/2 cup cranberry juice.
Use the wheat germ with honey for extra sweetness.
Some yogurt (about 1/2 cup) of your favorite flavor (I like blueberry) is a nice addition.

name: Purple Pomegranate Smoothie
directions: Whirl together all ingredients in blender.Enjoy! :).

similar.name: Tangy Raw Smoothie Treat - Pomegranate & Berry

name: Abs Diet Better Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Put all ingrediants into blender and blend until smooth.

similar.name: Abs Diet "okay on the Oj" Smoothie

name: "need a Pick-Me-Up" Banana Peanut Butter Smoothie (No
directions: Cut banana into chunks.
Combine 1/3 banana chunks and milk and use hand blender or regular blender to mix well.  I use a hand blender and blend in a hard plastic cup.  Slowly add rest of banana and blend.
Add peanut butter.  Blend well.
Add cocoa powder and push powder underneath liquid so as to not splatter when turning on blender.
Blend well.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Banana Peanut Butter Chocolate Milk Shake

name: Mandarin and Apricot Smoothie
directions: Roughly chop the apricots and place in a bowl.
Pour over the grape juice.
Cover and chill for 2 hours, or overnight if preferred.
Put the apricots and grape juice into the blender or smoothie maker.
Add the mandarin segments.
Blend for about 40 seconds or until it is the consistency you require.
Serve in chilled glasses.

name: Very Berry Smoothie for Breastfeeding Moms
directions: Add soy milk to blender.
Add banana, berries, and honey.  I freeze my over-ripe bananas.  Using a frozen banana makes the smoothie a little thicker, but use what you have.
Blend until smooth. Pour into glass and enjoy!
Makes two small servings or one big smoothie.

name: Peach and Pear Smoothie
directions: Add the fruit and water to the blender.
Blend until smooth and creamy, then serve.

similar.name: Pear, Kiwi, Berry, Flax Seed Smoothie

name: Vitamin C Cocktail – Pineapple, Strawberries and Various Berries
directions: Blend the pineapple chunks and strawberries until smooth and creamy.
Put your choice of berries in a tall  glass.
Pour the smoothie over the berries and serve.

name: Magenta Madness Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients in blender on high, until smooth.
Push mixture through sieve to remove most of the seeds.
Enjoy!

name: Mengo Smoothie
directions: peel mango, then slice it right over the blender jar to catch all the juices.
once you've cut off the big hunks of mango, just squeeze your hand over the whole thing to get as much of the flesh and juice as possible.
add all the other ingredients to a blender and puree until smooth. pour into 2 glasses and enjoy!

similar.name: Shannon and Mark's Mondo Mango Smoothie

name: Double the Milk Shake
directions: Freeze an overripe banana, peeled and wrapped, 12 to 24 hours before making this shake.
Puree all the ingredients in a blender. Serve immediately.
BERRY VARIATION: Add 1/2 cup berries, fresh or unsweetened frozen, and 1 tablespoon frozen apple juice concentrate (thawed) before blending; omit the cinnamon, if desired.
"CREAMSICLE" VARIATION: Add 2 tablespoons frozen orange juice concentrate (thawed); omit the cinnamon.

1 shake = 2 Calcium servings; 2/3 Protein serving; 1 Other Fruit serving. Berry Variation adds 1 Other Fruit serving, 1 Vitamin C serving if strawberries are used. "Creamsicle" Variation adds 1/2 Vitamin C serving.

similar.name: Ultra Thick Minty Vegan Chocobanana Bliss

name: Coffee Freeze
directions: Pour milk into large glass measuring cup.
Add enough ice to measure 3 cups.
Pour into blender.
Add frozen Cool Whip, pudding, and instant coffee.
Cover.
Blend on high speed until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

similar.name: Vanilla Bean Frozen Drink - Like Starbucks

name: Berry Smoothie
directions: Put frozen banana and berries on microwave-safe dish and defrost in microwave approximately 1 minute (I keep it hi-power). This makes it easier to blend, but still keeps it chilled.
Put one container of yogurt, the banana (peeled & sliced), cinnamon and sweetener in blender or "Magic Bullet" and blend until smooth.
Add remaining fruit and the second container of yogurt and blend until smooth and pink or purple!
Add walnuts(optional) and blend until smooth.

name: Strawberry 'nana  Yogurt Shake
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender.
Serve immediately.
Refridgerate leftovers covered no more than 3 days.  (You may need to mix again before serving.).

similar.name: Strawberry Banana Yogurt Shake  (Three Hour Diet)

name: Jamba Juice Peach Pleasure
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and blend on high until all the ice is crushed and the drink is smooth.

similar.name: " Jamba Juice at Home" Strawberries Wild  Smoothie

name: Easiest Berry Smoothie Ever
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and blend until smooth.
If too runny, add more fruit; if too thick add more juice.

similar.name: Green and Berry Smoothie by Jennifer Loganathan

name: Peanut Butter Nanna Smoothie
directions: Place the fist six ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth. Pour into glass, dust with nutmeg or cinnamon and garnish with mint.

similar.name: Peanut Butter, Banana, and Flax Smoothies

name: Soy Hot Chocolate
directions: Pour chocolate soy milk into a microwave-safe mug.
Microwave the soy milk for about 90 seconds.
Add non-dairy creamer to taste (I like to use the french-vanilla flavored kind).
Enjoy!

similar.name: Super Protein Chocolate or Mocha Smoothie/shake

name: The Incredible Mocha Frappe
directions: Pour milk into blender and add the cocoa powder, sugar and instant coffee into a blender or smoothie maker.
Blend until fully mixed together.
Add ice cubes.
Blend until there are only small parts of ice left, or until fully dissolved depending on how you prefer it.
Pour into mug, glass or cup.
Add whipped cream and sprinkle a small amount of cocoa powder on top for presentation if wanted.
Enjoy!

name: Rawzilla's Date Shake Smoothie
directions: You may want to chop the dates first (I did).
Put everything in your blender and blend until smooth.
Pour in a glass and enjoy!

name: Whey Fruit Smoothie
directions: Put ingredients in blender in order given and blend until smooth.

name: Fruit Cocktail Smoothie
directions: Mix all ingredients, except ice and cinnamon in blender for 30 seconds or until smooth.
Add ice and pulse until mixture becomes smooth and slushy.
Add cinnamon and pulse again for 2-3 seconds.
Serve cold.

name: Dole's Berry Fruit Smoothie - 100% Dv of Vitamin C
directions: Slice bananas into blender or food processor container.
Add pineapple and strawberries.
Cover; blend until smooth.
Add yogurt; blend until thick and creamy.
Enjoy!

name: Yo Pumpkin! Smoothie
directions: It's best if you start with chilled ingredients, but OK if only the yogurt is cold.
Combine all ingredients in blender.  Blend until smooth.
Pour into glasses and enjoy!

similar.name: My Huge-Mongous Pumpkin Smoothie (Healthy, Low Cal)

name: Oatmeal Breakfast Smoothies
directions: Bring the oats and milk to a rapid simmer over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook, stirring constantly, about 10 minutes, until the oatmeal is thickened. Add sugar to taste and set aside to cool slightly.
Transfer the oatmeal to a bowl; cover and refrigerate at least two hours or overnight.
Process in blender with sliced banana and cinnamon. Strain the liquid and add the vanilla. If desired, add more milk for a thinner consistency.

name: Rockmelon  Malted Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth. Serve.

name: Tropical Smoothie - Detox
directions: Place all of the ingredients in a juicer or blender.
Process until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Strawberry Ginger Smoothie
directions: Blend the liquids, honey, ginger and almonds together until smooth.
Add the strawberries.  Puree.  Add a little extra juice, if necessary.

name: Strawberry Julius
directions: Place all ingredients into a blender and mix until well blended. Serve in a tall glass with a straw.

Sometimes I will add orange slices, bananas, or blueberries if I have some extras needing to be eaten. I also have made it a bit more like a smoothie by substituting 1 cup vanilla yogurt for one cup of milk. I have also used Splenda in place of the sugar with success.

name: Wild Thing Island Smoothies
directions: Place all ingredients in the blender and let it ROAR!
For added fun, after pouring into glasses, make beastly face with cherry eyes, blueberry noses, and a lemon slice smile.

name: Ultimate Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients on high until well blended.
Serve immediately.

name: Fruit Smoothie Ala Buzby
directions: Peel the bananas (and mango if you're using it) then add everything to the blender and blend until smooth.  Depending on how robust your blender is you may need to use more liquid.

similar.name: " Jamba Juice at Home" Strawberries Wild  Smoothie

name: Ina Garten's Smoothie
directions: Place the strawberries, watermelon, peach, sorbet, and orange juice in a blender and puree until smooth and creamy. Add more orange juice if you'd like it a little less thick.
Serve immediately in tall glasses with straws.

name: Mango-Lime Spritzer
directions: Puree the fruit of mango in a blender. Add the lime juice and club soda and mix just to blend.
Strain. Pour over ice and garnish with thin slices of lime.

name: Aaron's Energy Fruit Smoothie
directions: In a blender, puree all ingredients on low, to get the ball rolling.
After 5 seconds or so, crank it to high and puree for another 10 seconds.

name: Mango-Strawberry Daiquiri
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients until smooth and frothy.
Pour into chilled glasses and serve with strawberry garnishes.

name: Sloshed Strawberries for My Valentine
directions: Mix honey, wine and brandy until smooth.
Pour berries & preserves into blender; whirl for 15 seconds; add wine mixture; whirl again until well-blended.
Pour into a 13x9 pan; freeze for 3-4 hours.
SERVING SUGGESTION #1: scrape spoons-ful into tall glass, cover with choice of gingerale, Sprite or 7-Up; stir to mix; add a straw or long-handled spoon; serve.
Garnish with fresh strawberry on a pick-stick or sliced mid-way & perched on the edge of the glass.
SERVING SUGGESTION #2: scrape spoons-ful into blender jar, add 1 cup gingerale and whirl until smooth, pour into glasses and serve with spoon or straw.
Garnish with fresh strawberry on a pick-stick or sliced mid-way & perched on the edge of the glass.

SERVING SUGGESTION #3: scrape spoons-ful of the frosty confection into pretty serving dishes; pour 2-3 T. gingerale or WHITE WINE over; serve with a spoon--eat slowly to avoid brain-freeze (you've been warned).
Garnish with fresh strawberry on a pick-stick or sliced in half top to bottom and arranged artfully on the top.
VARIATIONS: Other berries work magnificently for this, too, as well as mangos.

name: Strawberry Orange Julius Smoothie
directions: Place orange sections or juice, strawberries, egg, milk,1 Tablespoon honey, coffee creamer, and vanilla extract into a blender and blend until smooth.
Add additional honey to taste. Add 1/4 cup water to thin if desired. Serve in a pretty glass and enjoy.
Note: Pregnant women, children, the elderly or people with compromised health should use the egg substitute in place of the raw egg.

similar.name: High Protein Strawberry Orange & Banana Shake

name: Low Fat Chocolate Berry Smoothie

name: Prenatal Strawberry Banana Smoothies
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.

name: Negative Calorie Smoothie

ingredient [ICE].
You are already to serve the delicous treat.They can be served in a glass with a straw [for drinking].

name: Ugly Green Slime Detox Smoothie
directions: For the spinach, it's easiest to partially defrost one 10 oz. package by leaving it out for a short amount of time, or putting on the microwave defrost setting for three minutes or so. It should easily break in half. Do not completely thaw or squeeze dry. If you're only making one smoothie, you can wrap the other half and put it back in the freezer.
Add all ingredients to a blender and process until milkshake consistency. You may need to stop the blender and help it along if any of the frozen pieces get stuck in the blade.
Serve, garnished with a single strawberry if desired.

name: Fuzzy Navel Smoothie
directions: Throw it all in the blender.

name: Ultimate Alexander

similar.name: Creamy Coffee Ice Cream Brandy Smoothie Dessert

name: Another " Sommer" Smoothie
directions: Place frozen banana slices, frozen mixed berries, and frozen whole strawberries in blender with the unsweetened soy milk.  Blend, blend, blend, stopping to scrape sides occasionally.  Blend until no more large chunks remain and mixture is smooth, but thick like soft-serve ice cream consistency.  Add more milk if needed, but try to keep it thick.
Add vanilla and blend a few seconds more.
Add apple juice, cinnamon, and honey.  Blend some more.

Add in the 6 oz container of yogurt.  Blend some more.  Keep blending until everything is smooth but still thick.  Serve immediately or refrigerate or freeze and partially thaw for drinking later.  Mine is in the fridge right now and is still fairly thick, creamy, and drinkable.  I just shake my container a couple times.  I don't think I'll have enough left over for tomorrow, lol.  Enjoy!

similar.name: Sommer's Dark Chocolate Banana Berry Smoothie (With a Tropical T

name: Strawberry Banana Fantastico

Slice every strawberry in half,and drop them into blender.
Now drop the 4 tablespoons of yogurt.
Last but not least, drop in the ice cubes.
Close lid, and blend for about 1 minute.

name: Simple Smoothie

name: Delishious Healthy Morning Start!!!
directions: Put raw oats into bottom of blender. Add just enough juice to cover oats. Blend on low until oats are completely broken down.
Add the vanilla yogurt and blend on medium until blended.

Add frozen rasperries or other desired fruit and blend on high. (You may want to add more juice to this step, depending on how easily the fruit will blend into the previous mixture.) You may add more frozen fruit if it isn't thick enough or more vanilla yogurt to make the smoothie a little more creamy.
Add honey to taste and Enjoy!

add all ingredients and blend until smooth.
float extra Orange Curacao on top for an extra sweet kick.

name: Peachy-Keen Cooler (Kids Drink)
directions: Using can opener, open can of peaches. Place peaches with liquid in blender container.
Add Yogrut to peaches, using a rubber scraper to get yogurt out of carton.
Measure and add vanilla (or almond extract) and milk.
Place cover on blender, blend at medium speed until the mixture is smooth and bubbly, about 1 minute.
Pour into glasses. Serve right away.

name: Campbell's Banana Strawberry Smoothie
directions: Dump the yogurt into a blender and turn on for 5 seconds.Then add 8 slices of banana.
and milk. Turn on for ten seconds. After fully mixed add the sugar. And eat!

name: Avocado Smoothie

Taste the smoothie if you think you need more sugar add it.  It will really depend on the size of the avocado.  This is best eaten right away, because if you store the smoothie in the fridge it will turn a slight brown on top and alter the taste.

name: Harvest Moon Smoothie
directions: Prepare the sweet potato and put it and its boiling-water in the refrigerator to cool.  (If you don't have time for this, use tap water and some crushed ice to cool down the smoothie.).
Put everything in the blender and puree.

name: Gingered Apple-Acorn Smoothie
directions: Wash the squash, cut it in half, and scoop out the seeds.  Place it, cut side down, in a dish with about 1/2 an inch of water and microwave it for about 10 minutes.  Let it cool in the refrigerator.
Peel the apple, core it, and chop it up into a blender.
Scoop out the squash from the skin and place it into the blender.
Add the apple juice and the ginger and puree.
Pour and serve.

name: Healthy "creamsicle" Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in blender and blend.

name: Chocolate Intemperance
directions: In a medium saucepan, whisk together the cocoa, sugar, cornstarch, and salt. Slowly whisk in the water, then the flavor of your choice, if using, and the milk or cream. Bring to a boil over medium heat, whisking constantly. Remove from the heat and stir in the chocolate, whisking till chocolate melts. Pour into a bowl, and stir ooccasionally as it cools, to prevent a skin from forming. Pour into a jar or other storage container, and lay a piece of plastic wrap right on the surface of the chocolate, again to prevent a skin from forming. Store in the refrigerator for up to a week.
To serve:

Serve as is in very small glasses; it's thick and it's rich. To make one frozen smoothie, place 1/3 cup of chocolate base in a blender. Add about 1 cup ice cubes(and 1 oz. of the spirit of your choice, if desired, and blend till smooth. Alternately, blend with chunks of banana, or a scoop of ice cream.
Feeling intemperate? Add vodka and coffee liqueur to 1/3 to 1/2 cup chocolate base for the best sweet martini ever! To rim glass with cinnamon sugar, mix
1 teaspoons cinnamon with 2 tablespoons sparkling sugar and 1 tablespoons granulated sugar. Wipe the edge of the glass with a wet cloth, then dip it into the sugar mixture.

name: Pomegranate Berry Protein Smoothie
directions: Simple combine all ingredients into blender, and blend on medium speed until smooth.

directions: Pour in 2 cups of the milk, the pudding mix, & banana into a blender.  You can also add ice cubes if you'd like.  Blend on medium for about a minute  It will appear fairly thick.

Make them pretty with some banana slices, if you'd like or, do as I do sometimes and toss in a few cheerios and a couple of chocolate teddy grahams to crack up my 6 year old.  He loves to make them try to swim to their "rafts".  Gummy sharks get to cold and are hard to chew, so skip those.  LOL!
Lastly, enjoy!

name: Almond Milk
directions: After the almonds have soaked overnight, drain and discard soaking water.
In a blender, blend almonds with 2 cups of fresh water and dates.
Once well blended, strain the mixture to remove any almond particles that may be left.  The best way is to strain through a fine mesh strainer lined with cheesecloth.
Once prepared, the milk should be refrigerated.  Can keep for up to 4 days.

name: Sommer's Slushy Strawberry Mandarin Brain Freeze
directions: Add first three ingredients to a blender and let thaw slightly.
Add a tsp or so of honey (or to your taste), if desired.

Blend, blend, blend until slushy, stopping occasionally to scrape down sides with spatula.  Use the spatula to mash the mostly frozen fruits together, too.  Don't worry if it's not totally blended together, it looks really pretty marbled red and orange.  Add more water if needed, but try to keep it to a minimum so the flavor doesn't get watered down and the slushy stays fairly thick.  I didn't need more than 1/2 cup of water.  You can probably replace the water with fruit juice of your choice, also.  I wanted to keep the flavors to the strawberry and mandarin orange, so I didn't use fruit juice.  This may be eaten with a spoon or a straw, as it thaws.  If desired, refreeeze before serving, as the blending action will thaw the fruit a bit more.
This makes one large serving, or two small ones.

MERRY BERRY:  In blender, combine one scoop of frozen strawberry mix (about 1/4 cup), 7-8 ice cubes and Rum or Tequila to desired strength.
VIRGIN BERRY:   In blender, combine one scoop frozen mix with 7-8 ice cubes, 1/2 pkg vanilla Instant Breakfast, and Ginger Ale to desired thickness.

When ready to make your smoothie, pull off the potato peel.
Blend all ingredients together until the mixture is smooth.
Enjoy!

name: The Most Tropical Smoothest Smoothie
directions: Chop the bananas into fourths. Peel the kiwis the cut into small pieces. Peel the skin off the mangoes cit into chunks.
In a blender add 1 cup orange juice, bananas, pineapple, 1 cup coconut, 1/2 tsp lemon juice, 1/2 tsp lime juice, 1 cup strawberries, 1/2 tbsp honey, 2 mangoes and 2 kiwis. Blend tell smooth.
Add the orange juice, lemon juice, lime juice, honey, yogurt and ice cubes. Blend until as smooth as you like.
Sprinkle the rest of the coconut over the smoothie. Add whipped cream if you like.

SMOOTHIE TIPS.
• Keep Europe’s Best fruit frozen when preparing smoothies.
• Adjust texture by adding more or reducing amounts of ingredients.
• For a creamier Europe’s Best smoothie, add yogurt, soy milk, ice cream or milk.
• Add a little honey or brown sugar for a sweeter beverage.

similar.name: " Jamba Juice at Home" Strawberries Wild  Smoothie

name: Cuban Batido

name: Ww Core Chocolate Banana Smoothies

similar.name: Walden Farms Chocolate Banana Smoothie - Sugar Free

name: Chilled Lemon Sunset
directions: Combine 1/2 cup water and sugar in small saucepan ovr medium-high heat.
Bring to boil, stirring to dissolve sugar.  (this makes the syrup).
Cook 1 minute, transfer mixture to bowl.
Cool to room temperature; chill 1 hour.
Combine remaining 1 cup water, sugar, syrup, sorbet, orange juice and lemon juice in blender container; puree.
Pour 1 teaspoon grenadine into bottom of each of 4 glasses.
Pour in sorbet mixture and garnish each with 1 lemon slice.
Serve immediately.

name: Mango Papaya Shake

Blend and enjoy.

name: Speedy Sunrise Smoothie - Weight Watchers

name: Chocolate Blueberry Protein Shake

If desired, you could replace the blueberries with either strawberries or a bit of banana, or replace the fruit period with a shot of espresso.  You can also use soy milk rather then the almond milk, or just use 8 oz. of water.  It all depends on your tastes and what you're looking to achieve!

name: Chai Cream Smoothie

ADD milk to flavored drink mix in measuring cup, stirring until dissolved. Pour over ice cream. Gradually add club soda, stirring untl ice cream is melted and mixture is well blended.

name: Slurpee Smoothie

similar.name: Super Duper Healthy for You Smoothie/Juice

name: Mandarin Orange Yogurt Smoothie / Drink
directions: Crush ice cubes with liquid in a blender.  Add yogurt and orange segments in juice, and blend until smooth.

name: Mixed Fruit Spinach Smoothie
directions: Place all of your ingredients into your (Vitamix) blender.
Run your blender on variable or high.

Serve as soon as possible.

similar.name: Mint and Spinach Power Smoothie (And so Tasty!)

name: Mango Masterpiece

name: Pineapple Green Tea Smoothie

Add fruit. (I used pineapple- you can use whatever fruit you think would taste good with green tea, and more or less fruit depending on how "fruity" you want the drink).

Pour milk on top to cover fruit.
Add around another 1/2 cup frozen yogurt.
Blend until smooth, enjoy!
(If you don't find it perfect- next time you can make adjustments to suit you).

name: Frothy Chocolate Espresso Shake

Place the frozen yogurt and vanilla in a blender. Pour the chocolate mixture into the blender and blend until smooth and frothy.
Pour the shake into 4 (8-ounce) frosted glasses and serve immediately.

similar.name: Starbucks Frappuccino Blended New and Improved Recipe

name: Tropical Breeze Slushy

When ready to serve, remove the container from the freezer.  Break the frozen mixture into pieces.
Spoon the frozen pieces into the food processor.
Add the quarter cup of orange juice to the mixture in the blender.  Blend until the mixture is slushy.
Pour the slushy into a tall glasses and garnish each glass with an orange slice, a banana slice, a maraschino cherry or all three.

NOTE: In case anybody needs to know, the pomegranate juice adds about 80 calories and 7 grams of sugar to the above nutritional totals. I know, that seems like a lot; but it IS fruit and it's so healthy! Hope you give it a try!

name: Best Beach Bushwacker

Then grab the light and dark Creme de Cocoa bottles and do the same.
All this 1 oz stuff like shot glasses is for trainees, tee hee!
We put our coco lopez in a squeeze bottle so that it didn't clump - and you just do a squeeze depending on how coconutty you want it.
Then fill it up with milk until you can see it about a couple inches down in the ice.
Crank up that bar blender and wait until it forms like a wind tunnel and has the consistency of a milkshake.
Pour it into 16 oz styro cups with fat straws.  For the big boys and girls, you can top it off with a 151 Rum floater.
Enjoy getting bushwacked!  Don't worry about falling, most folks tend to bounce!

Add frozen banana, broken into pieces -- blend until smooth.  If you want your frozen treat thicker, add crushed ice (or frozen coffee)-- blend until smooth.
Makes one large serving.
This recipe can easily be doubled in most blenders to make enough for 2-3 people.
An addition of 1/4 tsp nutmeg or cinnamon or cardamon is a great flavor in this shake.
*TIP: You must blend the cottage cheese until smooth before adding the frozen fruit.
NOTE: If you have a strong blender, you can also freeze coffee ahead of time in ice-cube trays to add and it makes it coffee-lishous!

name: Lemony Sip-It
directions: Dissoolve creamer in 1/4 cuop warm water, and mix well. Add 1 1/4 cups cold water and the Crystal light. Mix well. Place mixture in a blender with the ice. Stop blending occasionally to add a cube or two, and then continue blending---repeat until desired consistency is reached. Pour into a tall glass, and then spoon and/or sip your way to lemon satisfaction! For an even slushier and less liquidy consistency, place in the freezer for about 20 minutes before enjoying.

name: Italian Fruit Shake - a Taste of Italy Without the Passport
directions: Peel the apple, the pear or peach, the banana, and the orange.
Slice/core the fruit; put in a blender with the sugar, the milk and the ice. Blend for 2 minutes (process until smooth and thick).
Serve in tall glasses OR this fruity concoction can travel in a thermos on the way to work or school.
Other delicious frullato versions include:

Version #1:  Put in the blender 4 pineapple slices (fresh or canned) and 3 bananas, all sliced. Add the juice of 2 oranges (if possible red), the juice of 1 lemon, and a chilled simple syrup (Preparation:  1 part water and 2 parts sugar -- Bring the water to a boil, then dissolve into this the sugar. Once the sugar is fully dissolved, remove the pan from the heat and allow it to cool.)  Blend fruity mixture for 2 minutes and serve in chilled tall glasses.  If desired, add ice and decorate with orange or lemon slices.

Version #2:  Put in the blender the juice of 4 oranges and 1 lemon, the zest of  1/2 an orange, 1 apple (peeled and sliced), 2 cups Kirsch or any other liquor (adjust to your taste), and 6–8 ice cubes. Blend for 1 minute and serve immediately.

Version #3:  Peel and cube 1 melon (honeydew, watermelon or cantaloupe); put in blender.  Add 3–4 teaspoons sugar (adjust to taste), the juice of 1 lemon, 2 teaspoons of your favorite liquor (option), 4 cups of dry chablis and 3 ice cubes. Blend for 2 minutes slowly increasing the speed. Serve in tall, frosted glasses.

name: 1+1+1+1=2 Smoothie
directions: *Our blender/smoothie machine has markings by ounce on the side of the glass.
Set blender pitcher in stand.
Pour in orangeade to 8 oz mark.
Spoon in enough yogurt to rise to 16 oz mark.
Spoon in fruit to rise to 24 oz mark.
Put lid on blender.
Put blender switch on low.
Push button for puree and run for about 30 seconds.
Turn off blender.
Add 1 ice cube.
Switch blender switch to high.  Push smoothie button/icy drink button and blend til frothy.
Pour into 2 glasses.  Fill blender with water. Whirl on quick clean and pour out what remains and then put blender jar and lid in sink to soak with soapy water.

This is a relatively thin, frothy smoothie, but good for my daughter who can't seem to eat much when she first gets up.  It is easy for her to measure out and gets a couple servings of fruit and a dairy into her without totally blowing calories and it is easy for her to clean up after herself.  Plus she can deliver the second glass to me or Dad which definitely starts our day with a smile.
