name: Pina Ghoulada
directions: Pour the corn syrup into a shallow bowl.
Dip a toothpick into the red food coloring, and stir a very small amount of the food coloring into the corn syrup; stir until it looks like blood.

Turn glass upright.  Allow the syrup to drip down the sides of the glass (to resemble dripping blood).  Dip the remaining glass in the same manner.  Set the glasses aside.
To make the pina colada mix, whisk together the pineapple juice, cream of coconut, cream, orange juice and rum (if using).
Place about 2 to 2 1/2 cups of ice cubes in a blender, and add 1 cup of the drink mixture. Blend until smooth.  Add more pineapple juice (not more pina colada mix) if mixture is too thick.
Carefully pour the pina colada mix into the cocktail glasses, being careful not to disrupt the "bloody" red rims.
Repeat with remaining drink mixture and ice.

name: Frozen Smoothie Pops
directions: In a blender or using a submersion blender, combine fruit and honey or sugar (as called for, to taste) and milk; purée until smooth.  Add yogurt and pulse just until combined.  Pour into ice-pop moulds and insert sticks, or pour into 3 oz. paper cups.  If using paper cups, freeze until partially firm then insert sticks, straws, or plastic spoons.  Freeze until solid, for 2-4 hours, or up to 2 weeks.
COOKING TIP:  If using paper cups, once the smoothies are frozen solid, transfer to an airtight container to make sure they don't get freezer burn.

name: Too-Good Two-Berry Citrus Smoothie - Sugar Free
directions: Place frozen fruit in the blender and allow it to thaw slightly (about a minute or two). Meanwhile, dissolve powdered drink mix and sweetener in 10 oz. of cold water. Stir well, and then pour drink mixture over the fruit in the blender. Blend at medium-high speed until thoroughly mixed. If blending slows, stop blender, stir mixture, and blend again.
Pour into a tall glass and enjoy!

name: Celtic Homemade Eggnog
directions: Separate eggs. Set egg whites in a metal bowl and place in the refrigerator.

In a small mixing bowl, beat egg yolks until blended. Gradually add 3 tablespoons of sugar, beating at high speed until thick and lemon-coloured. Stir in the milk, rum or brandy, vanilla, and salt. Place egg yolk mixture in refrigerator to chill thoroughly, about 2 hours.

Whip the cream. Remove the egg whites from the refrigerator and beat until soft peaks form (if using same beaters, make sure they are thoroughly washed). Add remaining sugar, beating the mixture into stiff peaks. Fold yolk mixture and whipped cream into egg whites. Mix in cinnamon, nutmeg, or pumpkin pie mix to taste.
Note: Make sure you put the eggnog in a container you can shake, as it tends to settle.

similar.name: Creamy Coffee Ice Cream Brandy Smoothie Dessert

name: Eggless Eggnog Smoothie

name: Avena Breakfast Smoothies
directions: Place the oatmeal and milk in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat and bring to a rapid simmer. Reduce the heat to medium-low and cook, stirring constantly, until the oatmeal is thick, about 10 minutes. Add sugar and cinnamon to taste and set the oatmeal aside to cool slightly.
Transfer the oatmeal to a container and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight. Strain the liquid, add the vanilla (if using), and add more milk if you want it thinner. Serve cold.

name: Delicious Avocado Smoothie
directions: Put everything in a blender, and enjoy!

Note: I tend to wing it when I make this recipe, and usually just pour in some milk, so just do what seems to work for you. Also, I think it tastes gross with honey, but I do believe that's the authentic Brazilian way to do it. I use two packets of Stevia sweetener instead.

name: Iron Crazy Juice
directions: Chop the apricots finely, cover with 1/2 cup boiling water and let sit for 10 minutes.
Carefully chop the seeds with a large knife. Roughly chop the carrots.
Drain the water from the apricots. Put the spinach through a juicer, followed by the apricots and carrots. Mix in the lemon juice, seeds, and kelp powder.
Pour into a glass and top off with a littler mineral water. Serve immediately for maximum benefit.

name: Ginger Juice

similar.name: Digestive and Healing Carrot And Ginger Zinger Juice

name: Clean Sweep Juice Drink

name: Papaya Juice

name: "emerald Ecstasy" Green Smoothie
directions: Turn the machine quickly from variable speed 1 to 10 then flip the switch to high.  Push the ingredients down into the blades until the entire mixture is blending.  I find it easier to push the food continuously down one corner of the container and eventually it begins to blend.  The apple may require a bit of "pounding" before it begins to mix (this is a great anger management recipe! :-).

When the mixture is first blending it should be so thick and slushy (from the ice) that it is thick like a thick "slushy".  If it is too liquid at the beginning, add more ice so it is thick and "slushy".  This allows you to blend for 1-2 minutes without warming the drink up from the friction of the blades.  It also allows you to break the foods down to the most bioavailable (cellular) level.
This is a "beginner" Green Smoothie that 98% of the population will love!

AS SOON AS THE BANANAS ARE BLENDED, stop the blender. If blending goes on too long, the mixture will get warm and runny rather than cool and creamy.

directions: Mix the instant coffee with the filtered, cold water, and the sugar.
Put the now-made coffee, milk, and syrup into your VitaMix for about 5 seconds.  For a normal blender do the same thing.

Now, with your VitaMix/blender OFF, add in the ice.  If you are using a VitaMix, start off with variable 1, speed 1, quickly going to speed 10, then variable 2.  Blend on variable 2 for about 20-25 seconds.  For a normal blender, blend for about 35 seconds, then pulse about 5 times.
Enjoy!

name: O.j.-Banana Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until smooth, and serve.

name: Strawberry and Banana Preparado
directions: Hull the strawberries and cut them in half.  Peel bananas and cut into chunks.
Put the fruit in a food processor or blender, add in coconut milk and water.  Process until smooth, scraping down the sides as necessary.
Add the rum, grenadine and ice.  Blend until smooth and thick.
Serve immediately, garnish with sliced strawberries if desired.

name: Smoothie Stir-Ins
directions: For each smoothie blend 6 ounces plain yogurt with the second (and third) ingredient then stir in garnish and enjoy.
Orange:  Blend yogurt, carrot juice, celery; garnish with fresh grated ginger.
Green:  Blend yogurt, honeydew melon, kiwifruit; garnish with green grapes.
Coconut:  Blend yogurt, coconut milk, lime juice; garnish with fresh mint.
Kids:  Blend yogurt, peanut butter, banana; garnish with a swirl of chocolate syrup.
Dreamsicle:  Blend yogurt, orange sherbert, tangerine, vanilla wafers; garnish with whipped cream.
Spice:  Blend yogurt, rice milk, caramel sauce; garnish with cinnamon and nutmeg.
Flower:  Blend yogurt, watermelon, and hibiscus tea.
Peachy:  Blend yogurt, peaches, and raspberries.
Purple:  Blend yogurt, blueberries; garnish with pomegranate seeds.
Add 1/2 a cup or more ice to blender for a frozen smoothie.

similar.name: Anything Goes Fruit and Nut Smoothie

name: Strawberry Buttermilk Smoothie, 2nd Time Around
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender & process until smooth, 1 or 2 minutes.
Pour into chilled glasses & serve.

name: Almond Energy Blast Smoothie (South Beach Diet)
directions: Place ingredients in a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Serve cold.

name: Spice Island Smoothie
directions: Mix the yogurt, rice milk, caramel sauce, dates(if using) and cinnamon  together in the blender and puree. If you want a little more thin, add more rice milk.
Pour into a glass and sprinkle nutmeg over the top. Drink and enjoy!

name: Cranberry & Yogurt Healthy Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in order listed into the blender.
Blend by pulsing on highest setting for about 45 seconds.  You may need to tilt blender to crush more evenly the ice cubes.
Serve & enjoy!
Hints & Variations.
Garnish with mint leaves & slices of strawberries floating on the top of the  smoothies in frosted mugs for looks.
Try different flavors of yogurt such as vanilla with a few drops of orange extract.
Buy the canned cranberries in the Thanksgiving season when they cost a lot less and they are great for emergency preparedness too!

similar.name: Jamba Juice at Home Cranberry Bogs Forever Smoothie

name: Honeydew Horchata
directions: Cut the honeydew in half and scoop the flesh, seeds and liquid into a blender.
Add a couple tablespoons each of the lime juice and sugar, along with the 2 cups. water.
Blend until very smooth, adding a little more water if necessary.
Add more lime juice and sugar to your taste now.
Serve immediately over ice, or refrigerate up to a couple hours before serving.

name: White Gazpacho (Gazpacho Blanco)
directions: Add all the ingredients up to and including the salt into a blender or food processor and blend thoroughly.
Dilute, using as much of the remaining 2 1/2 cups water as needed, to reach the consistency of thick milk.
Taste and season, adjusting as needed (vinegar, sugar, more salt, etc.).
Chill for at least 1 hour.

Pour into a small glass; float a small grape as a garnish and (optionally) put a small bunch next to the glass to contrast with the heat of the garlic; also optionally, add some ice, either as cubes or crushed.
Remember to warn your guests about the "strong garlic surprise".

name: Avocado Shake
directions: Cut the avocado in half, remove the pit, scoop out the pulp, and place in a blender with the milk, sugar and ice cubes.
Blend until smooth and frothy.
Taste and add more sugar if you like.
Serve immediately.

name: Banana Buttermilk Lassi
directions: Pour chilled buttermilk into blender.
Break banana into chunks and add that too.
Add Splenda or sugar.
Blend.
Pour into glass over ice cubes and enjoy.
Double quantities to serve 2.

similar.name: Banana Peanut Butter Chocolate Milk Shake

name: Orange Delicious
directions: Pour 6 1/2 ounces of orange juice into an ice cube tray and freeze until solid.
Store the remaining 2 ounces of juice plus the zest in an air-tight container in the refrigerator.
After orange juice cubes have solidified (approximately 2 hours) - combine them with the reserved juice and zest, milk, powdered sugar and vanilla into the carafe of a blender.
Blend until smooth and slushy (about 30 - 45 seconds).
Serve immediately.
*Cooking time is freezing time.

similar.name: Orange Julius With  the Secret Ingredient!

name: Shake Me up Banana Baby! (Raw)
directions: Blend the ingredients, except the eggs, until smooth.
Gently stir the eggs into the blended mix as blending and mixing the eggs damages the fragile protein structure.

name: Chocolate Tofu Milkshake
directions: Cut up ripe banana into chunks, place at bottom of blender, follow with tofu, sugar or sugar substitute, milk, syrup and any optional extra ingredients.
Another good combination is to leave out the chocolate syrup and use no sugar added maple syrup instead, which goes great with the banana and regular white milk or vanilla soymilk.

name: Chocolate Mint Smoothie
directions: Put all of the ingredients into a blender and blend for about 15 or 20 seconds.
Pour into a big glass and stick in a straw.

similar.name: Mint and Spinach Power Smoothie (And so Tasty!)

name: The Caribbean Mango Fool
directions: Put mango pieces in blender & liquidize (or mash well in a bowl with a fork).
Stir the lime or lemon juice into the mango puree, mixing well.
In another bowl, whisk the cream until it starts to thicken, but not enough to form peaks.  Set aside.
Stir in the yogurt & coconut milk (if using) into the mango mixture.
Gently fold the cream into the mango mixture.
Pour the fool into bowls or glasses and put them into the refrigerator to chill until serving time.
Decorate with slices of mango before serving.

name: Pineapple Orange Smoothie - Caribbean Style
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.

name: Nif's Banana Mango Smoothie
directions: Place all the ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.

similar.name: Soft and Delicate Strawberry Coconut Mango Smoothie

name: Acadia's Fruit Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients in a blender and blend on high 1-2 minutes or until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Got Milk? Vanilla-Banana Wellness Soothie Smoothie!
directions: In a blender container combine all ingredients,   except mint.
Blend until smooth, about 20 seconds.
Pour into glasses.
Garnish with a fresh mint leaf if desired.

similar.name: Walden Farms Chocolate Banana Smoothie - Sugar Free

name: 4-Berry Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender.  Process at high speed until smooth, pulsing a few times to break up pieces of fruit.

name: Watermelon Sherbet Smoothies (Better Than Sprinkler- Jumping!)
directions: Chill the glasses if you'd like to really impress your guests and if impressing isn't important, you can skip this step!
Combine all but the chips in a blender; process for 30 seconds; scrape sides & stir if necessary.
Pour mixture into (un)chilled glasses; sprinkle chips and serve.
Viola!   You are soooo cool!
And now I am too!

name: Caribbean Sherbet Smoothie
directions: In a blender, combine; sherbet,strawberries,lime & papaya.
Pour into chilled 16 oz. glasses, garlish with coconut.

similar.name: Creamy Papaya and Coconut Milk Smoothie (Refresco De Lechosa)

name: Banana Rum-Raisin Smoothie
directions: Plump the raisins by soaking them in the rum for at least 30 minutes, and as much as overnight.
Put all of the ingredients in a blender or food processor and puree.
Divide between two tall glasses and serve at once.

name: Strawberry Banana Smoothie (Try It--It's Delicious)
directions: Cut all the raspberries in half then put in the blender.
Cut the 5 strawberries in quarters, then stick in the blender.
Cut the banana down the middle stick in the blender.
Put the 4 scoops of vanilla ice-cream in the blender.
Now mix that all together.
Then add your strawberry jelly.
And now add your milk.
Blend it all up
Now get your cup and put 1 scoop of your vanilla ice cream in the bottom of the cup.  Now pour and taste.
ENJOY!

name: V8 V-Fusion Mixed Berry Smoothies
directions: Place the juice, yogurt and blueberries in a blender.  Cover and blend until mixture is smooth.  Serve immediately.

name: Easiest Smoothie
directions: Fill a glass about halfway with frozen fruit.
Barely cover with soy milk.
Blend with a hand blender.

similar.name: Fruit Smoothie for Babies or Toddlers

name: Strawberry Smoothie With Hint of Chocolate
directions: Blend all ingredients in blender just until smooth and creamy.

name: Power Smoothie
directions: warm 1 cup of milk on top of the stove.
place the warm milk into the blender.
add the vanilla.
add the rolled oats.
add the flax seed.
add the couscous.
cut up and add the peeled banana.
cut up and add the peeled apple.
grate and add the nutmeg.
blend at a low speed at first, then increase the speed until well blended.
add the cold milk.
blend on high again.
pour and serve.

similar.name: Peanut Butter, Banana, and Flax Smoothies

name: Iced Coffees
directions: CARAMEL-CHOCOLATE COFFEE COOLER:.

In a blender, combine espresso, half-and-half, coffee ice cubes and vanilla and caramel syrups.  Puree until smooth, then transfer to a tall glass.  Top with whipped cream and drizzle with caramel sauce.  Serves 2.
MOCHA ORANGE FREEZE:.

In a blender, combine half-and-half, coffee ice cubes, chocolate syrup and sugar.  Purée until smooth.  Transfer to a tall glass, then top with whipped cream.  Sprinkle with orange zest, then drizzle with chocolate zest.  Makes 2 servings.

name: South American Jugo - Fresh Fruit Drink
directions: Place all the ingredients in a liquidizer & blend until completely smooth.
Add more sugar if you like --
Serve immediately in tall glasses.

name: Low Calorie Fruit Smoothie
directions: Add 1/2 - 3/4 cup  of your favorite crystal light beverage (I like fruit punch), 1/2 bananna, 4-5 ice cubes in a blender.  Blend on high until smooth.  Pour in a glass and enjoy.
Adjust ingredients to your preferred consistency. Try your favorite fruits.

name: Dairy Free Mocha Cappuccino Smoothie
directions: Place all the ingredients in a blender & whizz for 1 minute until smooth & frothy.
Pour into a tall glass & serve immediately.

name: Berry Bliss
directions: Mix six ice cubes with the first two ingredients. Blend the remaining ingredients with the first mixture until desired consistency.

name: Tropical Treat
directions: Mix six ice cubes with the first two ingredients. Blend the remaining ingredients with the base mixture until desired consistency.

name: Banana Coffee Crunch
directions: Mix six ice cubes together with the first two ingredients. Blend the remaining ingredients with the first mixture until desired consistency.

name: Just Peachy
directions: Blend all ingredients together with six ice cubes until desired consistency.

name: Virgin Chi Chi
directions: Mix ingredients together and blend with a little crushed ice.
Strain over ice into a tall glass.
Garnish with pineapple slice, orange slices, or maraschino cherries as desired.

name: Raspberry Bomb Shake
directions: Place all ingredients into a blender; whirl until smooth.
Pour into chilled glasses.

similar.name: Yummy Yummy Raspberry and Banana Smoothie

name: Fat Blasting Berry Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender, and beat, or frappe, for 5 minutes, and your smoothie is ready to enjoy.

name: Triple Vanilla Extraordinary Treat
directions: get all ingredients into the blender.
(you dont have to use the cinnomin sugar and powder if you dont want to it doesnt make that much of a difference).
blend all until smooth.
sip and ENJOY!

similar.name: Creamy Coffee Ice Cream Brandy Smoothie Dessert

name: Ban-Ini
directions: Blend until smooth and creamy.

name: Jenn’s Incredible Honey Chai Frappe
directions: Place all ingredients in blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

name: A  Breakfast Pick Me up - Try My Starburst Smoothie
directions: Place pineapple chunks, orange quarters, apricot quarters, banana chunks, frozen apricot yogurt, honey, and ice cubes in a blender and combine until silky, smooth and creamy.
Pour the smoothie into prepared glasses and garnish to your personal preference.
Add straws and call everyone in for breakfast, they will be so surprised.

similar.name: Super Duper Healthy for You Smoothie/Juice

name: This Treat is a Purple Passion Cooler
directions: Put the prepared blackberries, pineapple chunks, mandarin oranges and mandarin juice, frozen yogurt, honey, coconut milk and ice cubes in the blender and process until smooth and creamy.
Pour into a chilled glass, garnish with pineapple and serve immediately.

name: Soft and Delicate Strawberry Coconut Mango Smoothie
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a blender.
Cover the blender and process until all fruit are well blended and mixture is creamy and smooth.
Serve the smoothie in chilled glasses.
For the garnish, sprinkle the vanilla sugar on the 12 mango chunks.
Then garnish each glass with three chunks of mango on a stick with a side sprig of mint.

name: Tri Color Breakfast Parfait Smoothie
directions: In a blender add all the ingredients except for the strawberries, whipped cream and lime rind.
Cover and combine until the mixture is smooth and silky.
You should have a lovely thick, pale green drink.
Next drop the strawberries into the blender and blend until half the mixture in the blender is pink and the other half is green.
Pour slowly into chilled glasses, half filling each glass with the green mixture.
Add a squirt of whipped cream and top with the pink mixture.
Garnish the pretty pink and green smoothie with another squirt of whipped cream and sprinkle with the lime rind.

similar.name: Awesome Orange, Coconut and Banana Smoothie

name: Delicious Organic Green Smoothy
directions: Tear the Swiss Chard leaves from the stem, discard stem.
Rough chop all ingredients.
Add to food processor/blender & it will do the rest.

name: Feels Like a Raspberry Dream
directions: Put all the ingredients in electric blender.
Blend on low speed to start, gradually increasing speed until the fruit mixture is smooth and well blended to your personal preference.
Add or delete ice cubes as you prefer, if you find it too thick add more juice, a little at a time.
Pour into glasses and if using the garnish option, top with whipped cream sprinkle with sugar and garnish with fresh raspberries, add straw, sit back and sip.
I dare you not to enjoy this tasty treat.

name: Tangy Raw Smoothie Treat - Pomegranate & Berry
directions: Place the pop, frozen strawberries, blackberries, honey and ice cubes in blender.
Cover and combine until smooth and thick.
If you prefer a thicker consistency, you may add additional ice cubes, one at a time, until desired thickness is achieved.
Pour the smoothie into chilled glasses and garnish with the lime slices.
You will want to squeeze the lime into your glass and stir with your straws.
Then grab a seat, close your eyes and Enjoy, Enjoy, Enjoy, let the cares of the day slip away!

name: Banana and Rum Smoothie (Alcoholic)
directions: Place milk, rum, creme de cacao, banana liqueur & bananas in a blender & process until smooth.
Add yogurt & continue to process until mixture is again smooth.
Pour into cocktail glasses & ENJOY!

name: Date With a Melon Smoothie
directions: In a container, combine dates & boiling water, then set aside for 15 minutes before covering & chilling in the refrigerator for 2 hours.
When chilled, drain the dates, then in a blender, combine the dates & all the other ingredients, processing until smooth.
Pour into 2 tall glasses & ENJOY!

similar.name: A Date With a Banana Smoothie

name: Creamy Strawberry Daiquiri Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender & process until smooth.
Pour into cocktail glasses & ENJOY!

name: Cherries Jubilee Smoothie
directions: Put all the ingredients in a blender & process until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses & ENJOY!

similar.name: Peach Smoothie With Dark Sweet Cherries

name: Bananas Foster Smoothie (Alcoholic)
directions: Place milk, rum, banana liqueur, honey, bananas, brown sugar & cinnamon in a blender & process until smooth.
Add yogurt & continue to process until again smooth.
Pour into brandy balloon glasses & ENJOY!

name: Cherry and Papaya Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender & process until smooth.
Pour into two tall glasses & ENJOY!

name: Creamy Mango Parsley Green Smoothie
directions: Combine ingredients in blender and enjoy your creamy and healthy dessert!

name: High Fiber, Low Calorie Raspberry Pear Green Smoothie
directions: Cut up pears.
throw everything in a blender and voila, a healthy, tasty, green/(purplish) smoothie!

name: Candy Bar Frosties
directions: In blender container, combine Eagle brand and other remaining ingredient; blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.  Garnish as desired.  Refrigerate or freeze leftovers.

name: Pineapple and Mango Smoothie
directions: Put pineapple and mango chunks in smoothie maker or blender.
Add juice and 3-4 ice cubes at first.
Blend together.
Add more ice and sugar, if not icy enough or sweet enough.

name: Immunity Smoothie
directions: Blend together all ingredients for about 30 seconds.

similar.name: " Jamba Juice at Home" Strawberries Wild  Smoothie

name: The Blue Green Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients for 30-40 seconds.

similar.name: Green and Berry Smoothie by Jennifer Loganathan

name: Smoothie Suspension
directions: Blend together all ingredients.

name: Citrus Cocktail (Juicer)
directions: Using a juicer, process all ingredients except yogurt and wheat germ or almonds.  Pour into a glass and whisk in yogurt and wheat germ or almonds.

name: Mocha Locomotion Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients to blender or magic bullet and blend. Start Sippin' :).

name: Made You Pucker Mango Smoothie
directions: Cube the Mango and Pineapple,put the rest of the ingredient in the blender and blend until smooth. Enjoy!

similar.name: Soft and Delicate Strawberry Coconut Mango Smoothie

name: Cran-Berry Green-Tea Smoothie
directions: In a blender, whirl all ingredients until smooth.

name: Green Tea-Kiwi and Mango Smoothie
directions: Place mango, 1/2 cup yogurt, 2 tablespoons honey, 2 tablespoons water, and lime rind in a blender; process until smooth, stirring occasionally.
Divide mango mixture into each of 4 serving glasses; place glasses in freezer.
Rinse blender container. Place 1/4 cup yogurt, 2 tablespoons honey, kiwifruit, and next 3 ingredients in blender; process until smooth, stirring occasionally.
Gently spoon green tea-kiwi mixture onto mango mixture in reserved glasses, working carefully around inside of each glass to create a clean horizontal line.
Garnish with kiwifruit slices, and stir to combine flavors, if desired. Serve immediately.

name: Easy Peasy...peach Smoothie...
directions: Throw all ingredients into blender,blend until smooth.Enjoy!

similar.name: Spinach, Pear and Peach Smoothie....don't Knock It Till You Try

name: Yummy Yummy Raspberry and Banana Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients into blender and blend!
Enjoy.

name: Best Smoothies Ever
directions: Blend ice cubes 4 at a time.
Add 1/4 cup of milk and water.
Add lemonade mix.  Blend.
Add strawberries.
You may put in the freezer for 20 minutes to make frosty.

name: Sunrise Smoothie
directions: Place cubed kiwifruit and banana pieces in a large zip-top plastic bag; seal and place in freezer for 30 minutes or until almost firm.
Place the tea bags in a medium bowl. Pour the boiling soy milk over tea bags, and steep for 3 minutes.
Strain the tea mixture through a fine sieve into a bowl, and discard the tea bags.
Stir in honey, and cool. Combine the kiwifruit, bananas, and tea mixture in a blender, and process until mixture is smooth.

name: Siesta Key Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Combine yogurt, orange juice, honey, banana and ice cubes in a blender and process until smooth.
Pour into long stem glasses and serve immediately.
(You may substitute 3/4 cup fresh berries for the banana.).

name: Kool-Aid Slushies
directions: Place 1 cup of water and 1/2 cup of your favorite Kool-aid mix and 1 cup of ice cubes in blender.  Cover and blend on high speed until smooth.
Add additional 2 cups of ice.  Cover blend using pulse action until smooth.

name: Soy Protein Power Smoothie - Vanilla
directions: Put the Yogurt in blender.
Add the Milk to the blender.
Add 2 TBS Wheat Germ.
Add 2 TBS Vanilla Soy Protein Powder.
Blend for about 30 seconds.
Add 1 Cup crushed ice.
Blend about 1 minute.
Enjoy.

similar.name: Peanut Butter, Banana, and Flax Smoothies

name: Fruity Frozen Lemonade
directions: Blend all ingredients in a blender.
Pour into a tall glass, pop in a straw and enjoy!

name: Kiwi Etc. Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients and "smoothie-ize" in a food processor, blender or with an immersion blender (that's what I used, since my banana was fresh).

name: Acadia's Fruit Smoothie 2
directions: In blender add strawberries, pineapple, non-dairy creamer and orange juice and blend until smooth.
Poor into frosted glass and enjoy!

name: Tropical Ensure Smoothie
directions: Put the ice in the blender.
Add fruit, yogurt, and Ensure.
Blend.
Top with Whipped Cream, cherries and nuts (optional).
Enjoy!
**Refreezing the blended mixture for 2-4 hours makes a nice "ice cream" as well. Top with chocolate syrup, whipped cream, cherries and nuts for a banana split sundae.
**Add a shot of espresso to the smoothie for a Starbuck's Vivanno-like treat.

name: Double Strawberry Blender Blast
directions: Blend strawberries and milk together in blender until fairly smooth.
Add sorbet; blend until smooth and thick.
MODIFICATIONS:.

Decrease simple carbohydrate load by adding a scoop of soy protein powder with one tablespoon of flaxseed oil; or, add 1 cup of canned pineapple chunks (stored in water) or 1 cup frozen mango chunks as a substitute for the sorbet.

name: Banana and Weetabix Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients to your smoothie maker/blender, blend until smooth making sure to put the lid on :-).

name: Tropical Twister Smoothies
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and process until smooth.
Serve at once.

similar.name: Nick and Ken's Fruity Twisters Smoothie

name: Mango Tango Lassi
directions: In a blender, combine mango, evaporated milk, gelato, yogurt, lime juice, and sugar.
Process at high speed until smooth, pulsing a few times to break up pieces of fruit.
Garnish with mint leaves.
TIP:  When shopping for mangoes,select fruit that yields slightly to pressure.  If planning to use fresh mangoes, shop ahead so they can ripen if not quite ripe.

name: Avocado-Mango Smoothie
directions: Blend mango nectar and avocado in blender.
Add in ice and honey. Blend until smooth.
Eat and enjoy. =).

name: Splenda Strawberry Blueberry Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and blend for 1 minute, and then press the liquify button for another minute or until mixture is the consistency you like.
Enjoy.

similar.name: Soy Delicious Strawberry Banana Shake or Smoothie

name: Berry Patch Smoothie
directions: Place Eagle Brand and cranberry juice in blender; blend until smooth.
Add frozen berries; continue to blend until well combined.  Serve immediately.  Garnish as desired.

name: Raspberry Coffee Frappe
directions: Place Eagle Brand, coffee, milk and syrup in blender container; blend until smooth.
Serve over crushed ice.  Garnish with whipped cream and chocolate, or as desired.

name: Healthy Frozen Fruit Smoothie
directions: Put yogurt and frozen fruit in a blender.
Blend on "ice crush" until the fruit is broken up, and continue to blend on medium speed until smooth.  You can skip "ice crush" if it's not an option on your blender.
You may need to add yogurt and stir occasionally to get the mixture to blend.
Add Protein Powder, Stevia and Flax Seed Meal.
Good fruit combinations include: banana-raspberry-pineapple; banana-strawberry-mango; bananas-blueberry-raspberry (high fiber).
Notes:.

You can buy most frozen fruit, but not bananas.  Peel them and break them in thirds or quarters by hand, and put in a freezer bag.  Don't slice them into small pieces or else they will stick together.
I recommend peeling and cutting up ripe mangoes instead of buying them frozen.  Be sure to break them apart in the freezer bag a few hours after putting them in the freezer.
This recipe is low-sugar because of the Stevia and the plain yogurt.  If you're not concerned about sugar, you can use flavored yogurt and/or honey in place of Stevia.
Flax seed meal adds fiber and Omega-3 fatty acids.  Be sure to use Flax Seed Meal or "Milled" Flax seeds.   Not "Ground" Flax seeds.

similar.name: The Healthiest Fruit Smoothie on Earth

name: Bass Lake Fruit Smoothies
directions: In a blender, add 5 ice cubes, the fruit juice of your choice, and the yogurt, blend until smooth.
Add fruit and remaining ice cubes, and blend again until smooth.
Break out the straws and enjoy!

name: Orange Creamsicle Smoothie
directions: place in blender and blend until smooth.  Can substitute 1 cup of milk for the dry milk powder and water.

name: Dole's Paradise Smoothie
directions: Combine tropical fruit, yogurt, pineapple juice, banana, and ice cubes in blender or food processor container.  Cover, blend until smooth.

name: Mixed Fruit Smoothie (Magic Bullet)
directions: Add all ingredients til smooth. I added the splenda in last so i could taste it as i went.
*TIP* (if using magic bullet) add the frozen fruit after banana but before the milk so they blend better.

name: Strawberry Daiquiri Mix Smoothie (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Place all ingredients in the blender and blend/pulse until smooth.

name: Bloomer Droppers
directions: In blender combine frozen peach slices, 6 oz. frozen pink lemonade concentrate and ice cubes.  Blend until desired texture is achieved.

Note:  If your frozen peaches are store bought they will be very tart you will need to add sugar or I sometimes use canned slice peaches in heavy syrup mixed in with them I put them in the fridge so everything is cold and then add a few spoon fulls of the syrup.
add your sprite and vodka and pulse just to mix.
Set your pitcher in the freezer in between fill ups to keep it slushy.  Enjoy!

name: Tasty Tropical Green Smoothie
directions: Throw in a blender and enjoy!

name: Sunrise Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender.  Process until desired consistency.

name: Pineapple Sage Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients in blender in the order ingredients are listed.
Process until smooth.

name: Cia's Cappuccino Smoothie
directions: Place espresso, ice cream, ice and milk in a blender or food processor and secure lid.
Process  for 20 seconds, untill smooth.
Serve at once in chilled tall glasses garnished with a dollop of whipped cream and a sprinkle of cinnamon. Enjoy!

name: Peachy Parsley Green Smoothie (Raw Food)
directions: Pit and chop up the peaches and the banana.  Put the fruit in the blender with just enough water to let the blender work.  Process until smooth.  Add the greens and puree until very smooth.  Enjoy!

similar.name: Fruit Smoothie for Babies or Toddlers

name: Purple Explosion
directions: In a blender, combine evaporated milk, yogurt, juice, blueberries and grapes.
Process on high speed until smooth, pulsing a few times to break up pieces of fruit.

Frozen or bottled grape juice can be substituted for pomegranate juice.  Pomegranate juice is now found in combination with blueberry juice, and other fruits.  Any of these can be used for the juice ingredient.

name: Healthy Chocolate Banana Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender and process until smooth.
You can tailor this recipe to suit your tastes by:.
- using your choice of milk: low fat or whole milk; soy, almond or rice milk.
- using your choice of protein powder: whey, soy, or rice.

name: Avocado and Fig Smoothie
directions: Cut figs into little pieces.  In a blender, add the 1/2 peeled and seeded avocado, figs, milk and sugar.
Blend until smooth.  Serve in a glass decorated with a fig.

similar.name: Awesome Orange, Coconut and Banana Smoothie

name: Oatmeal Date Shake
directions: Blend oatmeal with milk of your choice, add the vanilla, banana and dates and blend until smooth,  Add ice and blend until smooth.

name: Simple Avocado Smoothie
directions: Scoop out the avocado flesh and add to blender.
Add in the mango nectar and ice cubes.
Blend.
Add honey (optional) and then blend again.
Serve and Enjoy =).

name: Buttermilk Frozen Florida Refresher
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender container; cover and blend until frothy. If desired, garnish with additional strawberries.

name: Troy's Frosty Fruit Smoothie
directions: Quarter bananas into bottom of blender, add the rest of your fruit and pour in juice.  Cover and blend until frosty and smooth.  If it's too thick, add a little more juice.

name: Nectarine Juice / Smoothie
directions: Pit peaches or nectarines.

Run the blender for roughly one minute, adding more soy milk until you like the consistency. You don't want lumps of frozen banana in the drink, so make sure it is all smoothiefied. Don't run too long, or the almonds will disappear.
Enjoy.

name: Easy Slush or Sorbet (For Adults)
directions: Place unopened can in the freezor for at least 12 hour or until frozen solid.  (It can be left frozen for several months).  Submerge the unopened can in hot water for a few seconds to loosen the edges, then open the can and transfer contents to a food processor, using a kitchen knife to cut it into several chunks.
Add lemon juice and liqueur.  Process, pulsing on and off until smooth.  Serve immediately in glasses or scoop the sorbet into balls and refreeze for up to 8 hours before serving.
OTHER CANNED VARIATIONS.
Apricots with Amaretto.
Figs with marsala or Sambuca.
Pears with Poire Williams or green creme de menthe.
Peaches with Bourbon.
Plums (remove pits) with Creme de Cassis.
Crushed Pineapple with Dark Rum (and 2 tablespoons canned cream of coconut for a pina colada).
Blueberries with Creme de Cassis.
Sweet Cherries with Kirsch.
Mangoes with Light Rum.

name: Caribbean Way Smoothie
directions: Mix the first 4 ingredients in a blender until pureed, then add ice until the mixture becomes a smooth and thick consistency, at least 1 minute Pour into cups and enjoy. Also, it is essential that you use the Turbinado Sugar, and quality Papaya juice to achieve the same flavor of a Caribbean Way Smoothie from Smoothie King. You can use fresh or frozen fruit for the Strawberries and Bananas.

~TIP~I've found that when I buy fresh fruit if I freeze it, it lasts a lot longer and I get a better consistency in my smoothie. If you freeze the bananas, peel them first, then slice them into fourths, and put them into a freezer Ziploc baggie. Their a lot easier to deal with if they are already ready to go into the blender as soon as you get them out of the freezer.

name: Lime in the Coconut Smoothie

name: Peachy Peach Smoothie (Vegan)

name: Fall Harvest Smoothie

(To steam the squash quickly, cut the acorn squash in half.  Remove seeds.  Place in a microwave safe bowl upside down -so the inside of the squash is facing DOWN.  Add about 1 inch of water to dish.  Microwave on high for 12-15 minutes until skin peels right off the squash and it is soft to touch).
Add squash, carrot chunks, apple juice and apple to blender/smoothie maker.  Completely puree to a smooth creamy texture.
Add pumpkin, yogurt, spices, honey and brown sugar to mixture.  Blend until smooth.
Serve with a little whipped topping chilled in a glass, or serve hot as a "pumpkin soup".

I also added some mango and papaya, sort of omitting the peaches almost all together. The amounts aren't important in this recipe, you may adjust as you like.  The way it's written will give you a smoothie that tastes mostly of grapefruit and cilantro.

similar.name: Orange Julius Ain’t Got Nothing on Us Smoothie

name: Love Yourself Breakfast Smoothie
directions: A frozen banana is the first building block of this magical breakfast smoothie. The second is fresh citrus juice (I prefer oranges).  And the third is a bit of yogurt.

Note about freezing bananas - if you have bananas that are getting past their use-by date, peel them, wrap them in plastic wrap or put in a freezer bag and freeze them.  They will keep for weeks.  If I forget to freeze one for breakfast the night before, I freeze my banana at least 1 to 2 hours before use.  I usually freeze a few (or up to 6) at a time. Warning: For this recipe, do not freeze bananas in their skin because they are not easy to peel when they are frozen.
Prepare optional fresh fruit before taking your banana out and slicing it.
I typically use whatever fruit I have on hand for this smoothie.

Once my pineapple, apple, pear, berries, and/or mangoes are washed and cut up I juice my oranges.  Any of the these fruits can also be frozen before use (except the oranges).  Just make sure they are cut up before freezing them.  You can also use store-bought frozen fruit but I really prefer fresh seasonal fruit.  I never use canned fruit for this because FRESH is living and that's better for you!
When other fruit is ready, I take my frozen banana out and slice the whole thing in to 1/2 inch pieces.  Use only half the banana for a smaller smoothie.
To prepare smoothie:  add all fruit, juice, and yogurt to your blender, Magic Bullet, or other mixing appliance.

I usually layer fresh fruit in with the frozen pieces as it helps the machine blend it a bit easier.  In the Magic Bullet I give it all a bit of a shake to mix the juice and yogurt around a bit, again this helps the smoothie blend better.
Mix on HIGH for a half a minute or so and then check to see if it's blended to a smooth consistency.  If not, repeat.
If too thick to blend properly, add a bit more juice or a bit of water.

Once it's at the consistency you like, pour into a pretty serving glass/dish. I use a stemmed clear glass dessert dish because it's a decadent breakfast and it's a great way to celebrate the beginning of a new day.  You won't be able to fit all the smoothie in the dish at once so add some and put the rest of the smoothie into the freezer until you are ready for your top-up.

Top smoothie with a handful or 2 of your favorite crunchy muesli, granola, or other cereal.  You can mix chopped nuts either right into the blended smoothie or add on top with the granola or muesli.  I like to use a healthy muesli that's got some bits of dried fruit and/or nuts.  Feeling healthy yet?  I am!

Take your magical breakfast smoothie and park yourself in a sunny spot and enjoy your kick-start breakfast!  I take mine outside on the deck and read a healthy recipe magazine and begin to imagine all kinds of great dinner ideas for the week!
I'll often have to top up the smoothie with another small handful or 2 of crunchy stuff.
Enjoy your smoothie and enjoy your day!  You deserve only the best!

name: Chicha De Arroz
directions: Directions.

Wash the rice in 2 cups of water and let it soak overnight. Discard the water and put the rice into a pot with the remaining 7 cups of water and the cinnamon stick.  Let the mixture boil for 35 minutes.  Remove from heat and Blend everything on high speed until well-blended.
Let it cool down and serve with a lot of ice.
Add or garnish with cinnamon to taste as desired.

Blend thoroughly. Keep it going a little longer than you think you need to --  it will get creamier and you'll get rid of any banana chunks left over.
Enjoy! You could use frozen bananas for a colder drink, but I don't think it's necessary.

name: Raagi Malt
directions: First take the ragi flour in a cup. Add half glass water slowly. Combine to smooth, lump free paste. This is essential. Do not add the flour directly to boiling water, it will clump into lumps.
In a vessel, take one glass of water or milk. Preparing this drink with milk alone is too rich for me so I usually add few drops of milk to water.

Heat till the water reaches boiling stage. Then add the dissolved ragi flour solution slowly to the boiling water (milk), continuously stirring with a spoon. This will prevent the formation of lumps. If you add the flour mix to water before the boiling stage, the flour will separate and it won’t be suitable to drinking. You have to throw it away, so wait for water (milk) to start boiling, then add the flour mix. This step is very important in preparing the good raagi malt.
Add sugar or jaggery per your taste and pinch of cardamom (Elachi) powder. Reduce the heat to medium level, and simmer the ragi malt for 5 minutes, stirring in-between. Turn off the heat.
Let it cool to warm, and then pour into a glass or cup.

When the coffee has chilled, peel the bananas & put them in a blender along with the coffee & almonds. Process until smooth, then add the ice & process until ice is roughly crushed.

name: Coffee Concentrate 2

cold stew in the refrigerator for 36 - 48 hours.

pour the concentrate into a serviceable airtight pitcher and keep in the refrigerator for up to three months.

Early in the morning go out into the garden and gather up your greens.
