name: Almost Famous Orange Milkshake
directions: Mix the orange juice concentrate with 1 cup water in a large measuring cup or bowl. (You can sub 2 cups orange juice in place of this mixture).
Transfer the orange juice to a blender. Add the milk, vanilla, both sugars and 1 cup of ice and blend until smooth and frothy.
Divide among 4 chilled glasses.

name: Watermelon Cooler
directions: Cut watermelon into cubes (without seeds) and put in a ziploc bag into freezer.
Freeze for 8 hours.
Take out of freezer and let stand for room temp for 15 minutes.
Process half of watermelon, half of gingerale, and half of limeade in a blender until smooth.
Pour into pitcher.
Repeat procedure with the other half of ingredients.
Serve immediately.

name: Pineapple Banana-Oat Smoothie
directions: Blend oats, flax seeds, almond milk and agave for a two to three minutes on high, just to really blend the oats and the seeds.
Add fruit and blend until smooth.

name: Berry Julious
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients; blend for one half minute or until ice cubes are crushed.

name: Shelly's Peach Melba Protein Shake
directions: Put it all into your blender and whiz in blender till smooth -- early post-ops remember to let it sit for a LONG time before you drink it if you use the blender.  My support group leader Deb suggests to our newbees to make their protein shakes the night before and allow them to sit over night in the fridge -- IF you have to use the blender for it, that is --   Why is this?  Well, you see, the blender creates air in the shake -- LOTS of foamy air -- and well, frankly that air and your pouch -- not really great friends, those two. Eh-uh. nope. Not exactly --
Pour it into a cute-n-fancy glass, top with whippage and enjoy every last sip of it -- !

name: Long Run Recovery Banana Berry Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender, and blend on high.
Chill in refrigerator overnight.
Drink slowly, alternating with a lot of water as a part of your post-run recovery routine.

name: Antioxidant Fizz
directions: Place frozen berries in a blender with the Pomegranate juice. Use pulse setting to grind until semi-smooth. Add ginger ale and blend on high until smooth.

name: Blueberry Pie Protein Shake
directions: Blend!
Enjoy!

name: Chocolate Banana Smoothie
directions: Mix in a blender.
Banana can be left out for a simple chocolate smoothie.

name: Yummy Tofu Smoothie
directions: Put all these ingredients in blender.
Enjoy!

name: Jello Smoothie
directions: Freeze a sugar free jello cup.
Place it in your bullet or blender at home with a 1/4th cup of your favorite juice and blend it until smooth!

similar.name: Fruit Smoothie for Babies or Toddlers

name: Hearthy Healthy Berry Smoothie (Ww Pnts=5)
directions: Blend all ingredients until smoothe.
Enjoy!

name: Strawberry Blast
directions: In blender, blend all ingredients until smooth.
Add more ice for thicker consistency.

name: Clementine Banana Smoothie
directions: Combine in blender until frothy and serve.

similar.name: Easy Peasy Low-Fat Creamy Fruit Smoothie

name: Sassy Strawberry Banana Smoothie!!
directions: BLEND all ingredients in your favorite blender!  (You may need some water to get it moving).
POUR all of it in your favorite glass!
ENJOY in your favorite sunny spot!

similar.name: One Second Strawberry Smoothie  Omg It's Orgasmic!
Sommer's Dark Chocolate Banana Berry Smoothie (With a Tropical T

name: Watermelon Juice
directions: Cut up the seedless sweet baby water melon into chunks and place them in your blender add in enough water to get them to blend and do so until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Oprah's Green Drink
directions: Combine in blender until smooth.

name: Mango Tango (Smoothie)
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.

name: Peach Paradise (Smoothie)
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.

name: Purple Dinosaur (Smoothie)
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.

name: Jazzyberrylicious (Smoothie)
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.

name: Chocolate Monkey (Smoothie)
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.

name: Pink & Orange Sunrise Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.

name: The All Canadian Blueberry Smoothie
directions: In a blender, combine milk, frozen blueberries, yogurt and honey.
Puree until smooth.
Pour into glasses.
Serve immediately.

name: Salad
directions: make a salad!

name: Strawberry-Banana Freeze
directions: Freeze banana until firm.
Cut frozen banana into chunks.  In a blender combine the banana, evaporated milk, sugar and vanilla.  Cover and blend until smooth.
With blender running, slowly add the frozen berries one or two at a time through opening in lid.
Blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Sweet Peach Lassi
directions: Put all the ingredients in the blender and process until frothy and the ice cubes are crushed into small pieces.
Adjust the sweetness and serve in lovely glasses.
Enjoy!

name: Cucumber Lime Smoothie
directions: Peel, seed and chop 2 medium cucumbers. Blend them with all the other ingredients until smooth.

name: Mango and Cardamom Lassi
directions: Put the mango, milk, yoghurt and cardamom in a blender and blend until smooth.
Divide between glasses to serve.

name: The Easiest Pina Colda Ever!
directions: 1. Get out all the ingredients.
2. Measure the ceram of coconut, the pinapple juice, and the ice.
3. Put all the ingredients in your blender.
4. Leave the smoothie the same or you can add mor ice to make the smoothie thicker.

name: Tahitian Punch
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender, and process until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Joker Juice Smoothies
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender (preferably Vita-Mix) and blend on high until Smooth.
EnJoY.

name: Jungle Jizz
directions: Throw it all in a blender or food processor and hit frappe!

name: South American Cooler
directions: Combine in blender at high speed until smooth and foamy.

name: 5 Min Horchada
directions: Put all ingredients in a bowl and whisk until frothy.  You can also blend all ingredients in a blender until frothy.  Serve immediately.

name: Black Berry Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender. Blend until smooth. If desired you can strain through a seive to get rid of the seeds.

name: Carrot-Orange Juice
directions: Mix carrot juice and orange juice together in a bowl.
Crush the ginger in garlic press to fill 1/2 teaspoon.
Stir crushed ginger into juice mixture and serve. (If making ahead, stir before serving.).

name: African Coffee Cooler
directions: Put ingredients in blender and mix until smooth.
Top with whipped cream and chocolate shavings.

name: Storm Smoothie
directions: Throw everything in your blender and enjoy!

name: Tahitian Mahana Cocktail
directions: Blend pineapple, Cointreau and vodka in a blender. Blend ice to your liking.
Serve in a Burgundy glass (large wine glass) with a pineapple wedge garnish.

name: Shake 'n' Date for 1
directions: Take a sharp knife and run it under hot water. Remove the pits and cut the dates up into very small pieces.

Place the dates and the remaining ingredients *except* for the cinnamon in a blender. Blend on HIGH speed a full 1 minute. (Some of the date pieces will not blend and that is okay and to be expected.).
Pour shake into a tall glass. The small dates pieces that didn't blend will sink to the bottom. Have a long sundae spoon handy to eat them!
If desired, [lightly] sprinkle cinnamon on top.
Enjoy!

similar.name: I've Got a Date With Some Chocolate Shake
A Date With a Banana Smoothie

name: Costa Rican Delight
directions: Place the banana and ice cubes in a blender, and pour in the coconut milk, evaporated milk, rum, and coffee liqueur.
Blend until well mixed.
Pour into 2 tall glasses and serve.

name: Jus De Fruit
directions: Crush the ice in a blender.
Peel and cut up fruit and put into the blender; blend lightly.
Add the milk, sugar and cardamom and blend well.
Serve immediately if possible, otherwise chill in the freezer for one hour, then refrigerate.  When ready to enjoy, shake again or re-mix in blender, then serve.

name: Creamy Fruit Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients in blender and chill well before serving.

similar.name: Fruit Coconut and Oat Milk Smoothie

name: Tamarind Slush (Hielo De Tamarindo)
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Cover and blend on high speed about 1 minute, or until slushy.
Pour into 4 tall glasses and serve.

similar.name: South American Jugo - Fresh Fruit Drink

name: Hawaiian Holiday Smoothie
directions: Pour all liquid ingredients into the blender. Add all frozen ingredients. blend at MIX setting for 30 seconds then blend at SMOOTH setting until smooth. While the machine is running, move the stir stick around counter-clockwise to aid mixing. Serve immediately. Each recipe serves 3-5.

name: Muesli Smoothie
directions: Chop the preserved ginger and put in a blender or food processor with the syrup, apricots, muesli and milk.
Process until smooth, adding more milk if necessary.
Serve in wide glasses.

name: Banana Milk
directions: Combine the milk, bananas, maple syrup, vanilla, and ice in a blender. Blend until smooth and frothy, about 1 minute. Pour the banana milk into glasses & sprinkle with nutmeg if desired.
Enjoy!

name: Spinach Basil  Lime-Aid
directions: Wash and rinse produce thoroughly. In order, place ingredients into a high powered blender. Blend on high until smooth.

similar.name: Minted Tomato, Rhubarb and Lime Cooler

name: Authentic Thai Watermelon Smoothie
directions: Combine watermelon, ice, and lime juice, blending until smooth.
To sweeten, add condensed milk to taste, while blending.
Pour and serve!

name: Stawberry Vanilla Smoothie
directions: Place all ingerdients in blender and mix until ice is crushed.
Pour into frozen mug or mason jar and enjoy!

name: Apple Pie Smoothie
directions: Cut up the apple. Mix all ingredients in a vtamix.  Blend until smooth.  Enjoy.

name: Carrot Cucumber and Celery Juice Refresher for Juicer
directions: Wash and cut each vegetable and feed through the mouth of a juicer one at a time.

similar.name: Kale Carrot and Apple Calcium Booster Juice for Juicer

name: Carrot Beet and Fennel Sweet Tooth Antidote for Juicer
directions: Wash and cut each vegetable and feed through the mouth of a juicer one at a time.

similar.name: Carrot Cucumber and Celery Juice Refresher for Juicer

name: Kale Carrot and Apple Calcium Booster Juice for Juicer
directions: Wash and cut each vegetable and feed through the mouth of a juicer one at a time.

similar.name: Carrot Cucumber and Celery Juice Refresher for Juicer

name: Pear Cooler
directions: In a blender, combine all the ingredients, cover and process until smooth.  Pour into chilled glasses; serve immediately.

name: Vegan Energizing Juice for Juicer
directions: Wash and cut each vegetable and fee through the mouth of a juicer one at a time.

similar.name: Carrot Cucumber and Celery Juice Refresher for Juicer
Kale Carrot and Apple Calcium Booster Juice for Juicer

name: Melon Berry Bliss
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Mix until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve.
Enjoy!

name: Fresh Strawberry Daiquiris
directions: Cut off tops of strawberries.
Combine ingredients in blender.  The blender should be about half strawberries and half ice with the concentrates filling in the gaps.
Add rum to taste.
Blend!

name: Mandarin Pear Sunrise
directions: In a blender combine pears and oranges until pureed.
Then add yogurt and honey ,blend for 3 minutes or until well blended (if too thick add a bit of juice to thin out).

name: Raspberries & Crystallized Ginger Smoothie
directions: Blend all the ingredients until smooth as possible. (There may be seeds left unblended depending on the blender you use).
Taste and adjust any ingredient if needed by adding more to your taste.
Enjoy in a tall glass!

name: Thick Choco-Nana-Berry Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients until there are no more large chunks.  If you don't have frozen bananas, or if you want a less thick smoothie, use room temperature bananas.

similar.name: Ultra Thick Minty Vegan Chocobanana Bliss

name: Watermelon Nectarine Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.

name: Healthy Tropical Melon Smoothie
directions: Place the yogurt, melon, banana and papaya juice in a blender and blend on high until smooth.

name: Mochaccino Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients in a blender to desired consistency and serve.

name: Martha Stewart's Cantaloupe Smoothie
directions: Combine yogurt and cantaloupe in a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Chill in an airtight container and use within 1 day.

name: Parlor Coffee Float - Iced Coffee
directions: In a blender, combine coffee, chocolate syrup, half and half, and 1/2 of the ice cream.
Blend until all ingredients are smooth and frothy.
Pour into two tall glasses; top each with a 1/4 cup/scoop of the remaining ice cream.
Top with whipped cream and a cherry or chocolate shavings, if desired.

name: Healthy Green Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients together in a blender.
Pour into glass and enjoy!

name: Mango Pineapple Banana Smoothie (Dairy Free)
directions: Peel and chop up the banana.

For the mango, stand the on the small end, then cut down the mango along the side of the pit, once on each side.  Then cut the fruit free from the peel.  Use a spoon to scrape the remaining fruit and juice free from the pit.
Add juice to blender jar.
Add frozen fruit to blender jar.
Add fresh mango and banana to blender jar and put the lid on.

Blend about 1 minute or until smooth.  If your blender has a smoothie or frozen drink pre-set, use that.  If the smoothie is thicker than desired, add a bit more juice and blend for a few more second.
Pour into tall glasses and enjoy.

name: Watermelon Agua Fresca
directions: Puree the watermelon and water in a blender until smooth.
Add the Spenda, lime juice and fresh mint leaves.
Puree until smooth.
Stir before serving. Serve over ice.

similar.name: Agua Fresca de Melon (Watermelon Sparkling Water)
Pineapple Melon Mint Cold Summer Soup
Minted Tomato, Rhubarb and Lime Cooler

name: Creamy Cherry Jubilee Smoothie
directions: Blend in blender and serve immediately.

name: Creamy Colada Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and blend until smooth.  Serve immediately.

name: Chocolate Slim Fast Slimfast Peanut Butter Smoothie Healthy
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender, blend on high until well blended.

name: Dr. Sears School-Ade Quick Smoothie
directions: Combine all the ingredients and blend until smooth. Serve immediately after blending while the mixture still has a bubbly milkshake-like consistency.

name: The Resurrector (Chuck's Hughes' Hangover Shake)
directions: Put all in blender except honeycomb and whip up.
Pour into tall glass.
Optional - Garnish with a little rectangle of honeycomb and fresh blueberries on top.

similar.name: GIN SMOOTHIE With Cranberrys and Banana

name: Fruit and Malt Oat Shake
directions: Whack everything in a blender, or use a stick mixer and whammo!  Yum!

name: Clementine Cream
directions: Blend the cashew nuts until they have the consistency of small crumbs.
Add the naartjie, lemon juice and honey to the blender and blitz until the naartjie has been completely mixed with the cashew nuts.
Gradually add the orange juice and then the water to the mixture until you have a smooth liquid.
Serve in a tall glass.

similar.name: " Jamba Juice at Home" Strawberries Wild  Smoothie

name: Chocolate Oatmeal Smoothie - the Perfect Post-Workout Breakfast
directions: Fill blender with the soaked oatmeal mixture, ricotta cheese, milk, and ice cubes. Turn on a low blending speed to get it going.

When things are looking smooth and blended, open the ingredient hatch on the lid of the blender, (or just the lid if yours doesn't have one - just make sure it's going low enough to where you won't have an explosion), and add your protein powder and cocoa powder while it's still going.
Replace cover and turn on high for a few seconds to make sure it's all nice and smooth.
Pour into a tall glass with a straw and enjoy!

similar.name: A  Breakfast Pick Me up - Try My Starburst Smoothie

name: Magic Bullet Strawberry Banana Smoothie (Dairy-Free)
directions: Add all ingredients to the TALL CUP or a PARTY MUG and twist on the CROSS BLADE.
Place the cup on the Magic Bullet power base and twist slightly to the LOCK ON position and mix until smooth.

name: Cappucino Smoothies
directions: In a blender, combine the yogurt, milk, sugar if desired and chocolate syrup.  Add ice cubes and 1/4 cup marshmallows; cover and process until blended.  Pour into chilled glasses; top with the remaining marshmallows.  Serve immediately.

name: Orange Coffee
directions: Place cold coffee, orange juice, vanilla ice cream, and ice cubes, in a blender.
Blend.
Top with orange peel.

name: Banana Coconut Carrot Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients in vitamix or blender and blend thoroughly.  Enjoy!

similar.name: Fruit Coconut and Oat Milk Smoothie

name: Orange Breakfast Shake
directions: Combine ingredients in order given in blender.
Cover and blend for about 5 seconds, until frothy.

name: Dr. Oz Green Smoothie
directions: Cook Kale in pot until tender, about 3 minute Remove and rinse under cold water until cool to touch.
While Kale cooks prep other vegetables and fruit.
Peel the Pear.
Place all items in Blender and Blend to taste.

name: Blueberry Cooler
directions: Place milk, berries and ice cubes in blender. Blend 30 seconds until thick and smooth.
Pour into tall glasses. Top each with ginger ale and stir.

name: Cappuccino Frost
directions: In a blender, combine milk, coffee, sugar, water and ice cubes. Blend until frothy.
Fill 4 glasses with ice cubes. Pour cappuccino over the ice and dust with cinnamon.

name: Apple of My Eye
directions: Puree all the ingredients in a blender 30 seconds or until smooth. Garnish with cucumbers and mint or dill.

name: Chocolate Covered Strawberry Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender and mix until everything is smooth.
Serve with a straw and enjoy!

name: Vegan Chocolate and Banana Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and process until smooth.

name: Fruity Shamrock Smoothies
directions: Freeze the kiwi and banana pieces in the freezer on a large cookie sheet, uncovered, for 2 hours or until frozen.
In a blender, combine half the frozen fruit and the rest of the ingredients. Gradually add the rest of the frozen fruit, blending after each addition until almost smooth.
Pour into glasses and garnish with kiwi slices.

name: Frappuccino
directions: put milk, chocolate chips, sugar, and ice cubes in blender and blend for about 30 seconds. add ice cream, coffee, and chocolate syrup. blend until smooth. top with whipped cream.

name: Authentic Green Tea Frappuccino
directions: Add milk, liquid smoothie base, and syrup to blender.
Add green tea powder.
Add 2/3 of the ice.
Blend until ice is broken up into a fine consistency.
Check the thickness and add more ice and blend as desired.  Careful not to overblend.
Add more syrup if you like it sweeter.

name: Jamba Juice Pumpkin Smash
directions: Put all ingredients into blender the same order as listed above.
Blend until smooth.
Pour and enjoy.

name: My Very Own Frescavena - Oatmeal Drink
directions: Process the oatmeal and sugar in batches in a coffee grinder. This assures a fine powder that will dissolve easily.
If using freeze dried strawberries process them in the coffee grinder too.
Put everything in a suitable container, give it a couple shakes.
When ready to serve add 1 tbsp of mix to a cup of warm milk (for extra creamy) or water and mix. For better results or for drinking it cold use a blender.

name: Green Monster Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in the order listed above into a blender, and blend until smooth.

name: Pomegranate Morning Shake
directions: In a blender, combine the pomegranate juice with soymilk, ice cubes, banana, almonds protein powder, and honey to taste.  Cover and blend on high speed for 30 seconds.  Pour into 2 tall glasses and serve immediately.

similar.name: Blueberry Pomegranate Smoothie With Honey & Orange

name: Wild Orange Shake
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender, and blend until smooth.
Pour into a glasses and serve. (Opt. garnish with orange slices or sprig of mint).

name: Blueberry Kefir Smoothie
directions: Place kefir and blueberries in a blender or Magic Bullet. Whirl around for less than a minute. Pour into a cup, sprinkle with cinnamon, flax, honey or anything else if you want!
Bon Apetit :).

name: Banana Milk
directions: Mix all in a blender and blend until creamy.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Banana Peanut Butter Chocolate Milk Shake

name: Kumquat Smoothie (Or Calamondin)
directions: Place all in blender (mine is on steroids - Blentec).  Just pop the kumquats in whole.
Whirl til smooth.
Enjoy.

name: Fine Cooking Strawberry-Orange-Vanilla Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender or use immersion blender.  Puree until smooth.

name: Pineapple Peach Coconut Green Smoothie
directions: Put the pineapple, coconut milk, almonds, and spinach in a high speed blender in that order.  Blend for 30 seconds or so until well mixed.  Gradually add the frozen peaches and blend well.  Melt the coconut oil in the microwave for 20 seconds and add to blender. Blend for 10 more seconds.  Enjoy!

Notes:  You can use any combination of fresh or frozen fruits.  If using fresh, just add 1-2 cups of ice before adding the coconut oil.  Don't put the ice in first!  Wait till you have a good liquid base before adding ice or it can damage your blender.  If using all frozen fruits, you may need to add more coconut milk or water.  The coconut milk I use is So Delicious brand.  It's non-dairy and full of the GOOD fats.  You can find it in the refrigerated section by the soy milk and almond milk.

name: Chocolate Banana Protein Shake
directions: In a magic bullet add all ingredients except milks, fill remaining cup space with crushed ice and pour milks over the top, blend untill smooth!

name: Daily Detox Ritual #2: Breakfast Meal Replacement Green Smoothie
directions: Start with water, you can use 1 cup to start, blend in about one small handful each of spinach and kale. Blend until smooth *if using a regular blender, try frozen organic chopped spinach. VITA MIX: add all ingredients in order, no need to blend greens first.

Add in 1/2 orange, cut into a few smaller pieces, try leaving a little rind! Make sure you take all seeds out. Break celery (more fat burning, anti-inflammatory!) into chunks, and blend smooth. NOTE: Citrus type fruits work best, for best nutrient absorption.
Add in harder fruits first, banana and lemon/lime last. If too thick, add in cold water until desired thickness, remember, it's a smoothie-not a juice:).
Add stevia and sweeten to taste, and try a pinch of dry or fresh mint if you find it strong for your palate!

name: High Protein Breakfast Smoothie
directions: This is a thick smoothie, so add 1/4 cup of orange juice first (or alternate juice with thick ingredients), then add the blueberries followed by the yogourt. Raspberries and  Acai juice go right on top.
Add the powder and the remaining juice, followed by honey.
Begin to blend. If you find the smoothie is too thick, add anything else you might want.

name: Papaya-Ginger Smoothie
directions: Refrigerate papaya until very cold, at least 1 hour or overnight.
Blend papaya, ice, yogurt, ginger, honey, and lemon juice in a blender.
Add up to 1/4 cup water, 1 tablespoon at a time, until mixture is smooth and thinned to desired consistency.
Blend in mint leaves.
Garnish with mint sprigs.

name: Golden Nectar Smoothie
directions: In a blender, puree all ingredients until smooth. Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

name: Natasha  - a Refreshing Drink
directions: In a mixer, put the soda and add the sugar syrup & orange crush and churn it in the mixer. then add icecream and again churn it in the mixer. Pour the mixer content into the glass. add a tea spoon of lemon juice in it and finally top it with a dollop of cream.
The drink is ready but to make it more presentable. Put a nice naked slice of pineapple on the brim of the glass.

name: Kiwi Slushi (Vegan, Low-Fat)
directions: Crush the kiwi and ice-cubes either in your blender or in a freezer bag with a rolling pin.
Combine with non-dairy milk and blend on high until slushy like in consistency.
Serve and enjoy!

name: Coffee Slushie (Vegan, Low-Fat)
directions: Crush ice cubes in your blender or in a freezer bag using a rolling pin or any other heavy instrument you have handy (I actually use my maglite torch ;)).
Add soy milk and vanilla and blend on high until slushie like in consistency.
Enjoy!

name: Power Green Shake
directions: 1. Place all ingredients in a good blender.  Blend for at least 30 seconds or until it is very smooth and creamy.  There should be no ice chunks left.
You can also substitute other fruits or vegetables!

Note: I always get everything ready the night before so that in the morning I just press "on" and go.  I put the first four ingredients in my blender (yes even the greens) the night before, and then put a banana and 3 ice cubes in a bag in the freezer.  Then the morning of I just add the frozen stuff to the blender, top it with milk and yogrt, and press "on".  Good to go!

name: Aarsi’s Ultimate Strawberry and Rose Lassi
directions: Blend together the ice, strawberries, yogurt, milk, sugar and the rose water Blend everything to a smooth mixture.
Pour the prepared lassi into the glasses and garnish with rose petals.
Enjoy with your loved ones!

name: Protein Vanilla Cheesecake Smoothie - Hcg P3
directions: Toss it all in a blender and mix until smooth and thickens. Don't worry, the cottage cheese gets all smooth and gives it a cheesecake cake batter taste.

name: Cantaloupe Frappe
directions: Put cantaloupe and partially thawed orange juice in blender.
Blend on high until smooth.
Add juice of lime and blend again quickly.
Serve in margarita glasses with mint sprig.

name: Peach Smoothie With Ginger Zing
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
Makes 2 very large peach smoothies.

similar.name: Peach Smoothie With Dark Sweet Cherries

name: Banana, Almond and Oatmeal Smoothie
directions: In a blender add rolled oats. Process until almost powder like.
Add the remainder of the ingredients and blend until smooth.  At this point you should taste it and add more of whatever flavors suit your tastes.
Pour into glasses and serve.

similar.name: Peanut Butter, Banana, and Flax Smoothies

name: Easy Peasy Healthy Mango Lassi
directions: Thaw the mango.  (I often cheat and use the microwave to speed up the process.).
Puree thawed mango in the food processor until smooth.
Add salt, yogurt, and stevia powder, process until smooth.
Add water.  Mix to blend.
Serve as desired!  I like mine over ice with a straw.  :D  Can be pre-made and stored in advance too.  It keeps for days and doesn't separate.

name: Vanilla Matcha Chai Latte (Dairy Free)
directions: Blend water and almonds until very smooth.
Strain through a fine sieve.
Bring almond milk and spices to a boil.
Boil for 5 minutes with the lid off, then simmer for 10 minutes covered.

Strain into a blender (I use glass). Let the mixture cool down for a few minutes, then add the matcha powder & vanilla and blend. Add raw honey to taste. I probably use more than an 1/8 cup but do it to taste.
Enjoy hot or cold. (I prefer it hot though).

similar.name: Honey and Vanilla Breakfast in a Glass

name: Mean Green Carroty Smoothie
directions: Chop everything into manageable pieces.
Put into high quality blender, like Blendtec or Vitamix.
Blend until smooth.
Serve immediately or freeze half for later.

name: Purple People Feeder Smoothie
directions: Use frozen fruit if you can. I take spotty bananas, peel them, and put them in a large freezer bag so they're always frozen and ready!
Break bananas into chunks and put in good blender with rest of ingredients.

You can add the chia to the blender, or add them after and let the smoothie sit about 15 minutes to "plump up" the seeds. You'll get a kind of "boba tea effect" and they will help keep you full and hydrated longer.

I also added a small amount of parsley to mine since my herbs are already filming "Herbs Gone Wild" in my garden. Adds a very fresh flavor, but don't add too much. Less is more with parsley until you're sure you like the flavor.
Can use any kind of berries you'd like.

name: Pistachio Milk (Raw, Vegan)
directions: Blend it up.
Strain through a sieve.
Enjoy it!

similar.name: Nut or Seed Milk for Smoothies

name: Don't Be Afraid Green Smoothie
directions: Remove any stems from kale and spinach.
Blend all ingredients in a blender.
If you like your smoothie pretty sweet, add sweetner. I think it's fine, but husband likes it sweeter.

name: Mean Green Smoothie #3
directions: Add ice, frozen bananas, celery, and carrots to the blender (I use a 48 year old Vitamix) first, then add the rest.
Use the tamper to tamp down.
Makes 1 big serving or two small.

name: Mean Green Smoothie #4 Strawberry Kiwi
directions: Add ice, frozen bananas, and ginger root first to the awesome blender that you must have to make a good smoothie.
Add rest of ingredients.
Blend for 2-3 minutes until smooth.
Serve right away.

name: Rise and Shine Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and puree until smooth.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Gingerly's Sunrise and Shine Power Smoothie

name: Mango Margarita
directions: Make a simple syrup by bringing the sugar and water to a boil. Let it boil for about 1 minute, and then take it off the burner and add the mint leaves letting them steep until the mixture comes to room temperature.
Pour syrup into blender through a sieve to extract mint leaves.
Add mangoes, tequila, and ice.
Blend thoroughly and enjoy!

name: Best Smoothie in the World
directions: In a blender, put all the ingredients together. When you blend, you want to put it on a lower setting. Blend until the fruit is thoroughly mixed inches.

name: Tropical Whirl Smoothie
directions: Place each ingredient in your blender / food processor.
Blend for 2 minutes on low speed. Continue to blend on medium speed until smooth.
Serve, preferably in tall glasses.

name: Pom Passion Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients together until the desired consistency is reached.

(NOTE:  This smoothie can also be made with freshly squeezed juice from a pomegranate. To juice a pomegranate, cut it in half (as you would a grapefruit) and juice using a citrus reamer or a juicer. Pour mixture through a cheesecloth-lined strainer or sieve. One large pomegranate will produce about 1/2 cup of juice.).

similar.name: Blueberry Pomegranate Smoothie With Honey & Orange

name: Spring Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender container or food processor.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into a glass and enjoy!

name: Sunshine Slush
directions: Blend fruit and juices; add crushed ice and blen just till combined.

name: Sunrise Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth; pour and drink.

name: Morning Sunrise
directions: In a blender, blend the strawberry preserves and berries until smooth and creamy. Transfer to a small bowl and chill until needed. Note: this can be made ahead of time and refrigerated.
In a clean blender combine the bananas and remaining smoothie ingredients until smooth.
To serve use a 10 oz wine goblet, Fill with 1/4 cup strawberry puree and pour banana mixture over to fill glass. This creates a 'sunrise' in your glass. Garnish with a fresh berry and orange slice.

name: Mango Peach Shake
directions: Put mango and peach in a blender and process till smooth. Add sorbet and mik then blend until ingredients are throughly mixed and serve.

name: Watermelon Frosty
directions: Place all ingredients into a blender.  Blend and serve.

name: Plum Blush
directions: cut small pieces of plum n apricots.
mash mango.
blend all the above ingredients till smooth mixture is obtained.
add ice cubes to the blender n blend till smooth!
serve cold -- enjoy!

name: Glowing Green Smoothie
directions: Add the water and chopped head of romaine to the blender. Starting the blender at low speed, mix until smoothi. Gradually moving to higher speeds, add the celery, apple and pear. Add the cilantro and parsley, if you are choosing to add them. Add the banana and lemon juice last.
The fruit and lemon cut right though the grass taste. Feel free to mix and match different greens and fruits, as these two specific food groups combine well.

name: Almond Date Vanilla Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients to blender and process until smooth.  Enjoy!

similar.name: Peanut Butter, Banana, and Flax Smoothies

name: Blueberry Lassi
directions: Combine everything except ice cubes in a blender. Process until smooth.
Add ice and blend until ice is pulverized. Serve in tall glasses.

name: Hearty Smoothie
directions: Put everthing in a drink blender and blend it until smooth.
Enjoy.

name: Orange Creamsicle
directions: Blend together all together then add ice and blend again.
Enjoy.

similar.name: The Orange Creamsicle - Vegan / Non-Dairy Smoothie

name: Strawberry Freeze Breakfast
directions: In blender, combine strawberries, milk, yogurt, breakfast drink mix and honey.
Put cover on blender, and blend until almost smooth, stopping the blender and stirring as necessary.
Pour into 3 or 4 -- 8-ounce glasses.
Serve immediately.

name: Pineapple and Banana Smoothie
directions: Blend the bananas, pour in the pineapple juice followed by the yogurt.
Blend until smooth.

similar.name: Fruit Smoothie for Babies or Toddlers

name: Thank You Berry Much Smoothie (Vegan)
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a blender; blending at HIGH speed until smooth*.
*In our KitchenAid blender the smoothie was blended 1 full minute.

name: Nutella Banana Smoothie
directions: Place in blender, blend, enjoy.

similar.name: Awesome Orange, Coconut and Banana Smoothie

name: Diabetes-Friendly Watermelon Milkshake
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and process to milkshake consistency. Taste and add more Splenda as desired.

name: Peach Melba Smoothies
directions: Arrange peach pieces in a single layer in a freezer-proof container.  Cover; freeze until very cold but not frozen solid, about 1-2 hours.

In a blender, combine peach pieces, raspberries, yogurt, nectar and sugar (if using).  Puree until very smooth, about 2 minutes.  Pour into four tall glasses, dividing evenly.  If desired, garnish with mint.

name: Summery Light Mango-Carrot Smoothie
directions: 1 Scrape the carrot and chop it into chunks. Same goes for the mango.
2 Combine all ingredients plus juice of 1/2 orange in a blender and blend well until smooth. Serve in a tall glass and enjoy.

name: Banana Lassi
directions: Place all ingredients except nuts in a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Serve in drinking glasses with a sprinkling of nuts.

name: Lassi (Indian Yogurt Drink)
directions: 1.Place all ingredients except the ice cubes in a blender and blend until smooth.
2.One by one, add the ice cubes and blend further until they are broken down into a slush.
3.Serve in a tall, cold glass on a hot, hot day.
Variations.
•Plain Lassi: eliminate the sugar, fruit and rosewater. Substitute a pinch of salt and some toasted cumin seeds.
•Bhang Lassi: a traditional lassi with cannabis extract and ground almonds. Used in the religious festival of Holi.
•Good fruit choices are mangoes, papayas, strawberries and melons. Or try using lemon or lime juice. You can use anything you like really.
•Add a pinch of ground cardamom, a few strands of saffron or some chopped mint if you like.

name: Chamango
directions: Set aside 1/2 cup mango.  Place remaining mango in a blender jar with the ice and a bit of sugar if the mango is not very sweet.
Process until it is smooth, but not so long that it melts.

In a tall glass, place enough bits of mango to cover the bottom of the glass, then add a few teaspoons or more of chamoy, enough to make a distinctive red layer. Next, pour a few inches of mango ice, depending on how tall the glass is, to about halfway.
On top of that, make another layer of diced mango, then more chamoy.  Top with more mango ice, almost to the top of the glass.
Add a final layer of chamoy. Add a few pieces of diced mango, then sprinkle some chunks of tamarind candy on top.
Serve immediately with a fat straw and a spoon.

name: Almond-Banana Milk
directions: Using a blender or Vita-Mix, process milk and bananas until smooth. Pour into a glass and sprinkle with nutmeg.

name: Avocado-Pineapple Smoothie
directions: Using a blender or Vita-Mix, process ingredients until smooth. Pour into a glass.

name: Body Booster Smoothie
directions: Using a blender or Vita-Mix, process all ingredients until smooth. Pour into a glass.

directions: Using a blender or Vita-Mix, process ingredients until smooth. Pour into a glass.

directions: Using a blender or Vita-Mix, process all ingredients until smooth. Pour into a glass.

name: Cran-Orange Smoothie
directions: Using a blender or Vita-Mix, process all ingredients until smooth. Pour into a glass.

directions: Using a blender or Vita-Mix, process all ingredients until smooth. Pour into a glass.

name: Cucumber Melon Smoothie
directions: Soften Greek frozen yogurt at room temperature for 5 minutes of necessary.
Combine frozen yogurt, cantaloupe, cucumber, vanilla yogurt, and lime juice in a blender and puree until smooth, scraping down the sides as necessary.
Serve immediately.

name: Dee's Horchata  Milkshake
directions: Blend rice milk, almonds, rice if using, sugar, vanilla, cinnamon and nutmeg for 1 minute.
Add ice; blend until mixed.

name: Apple Zinger Smoothie
directions: Put everything into a blender.
If you don''t have a frozen banana, add a couple of ice cubes.
Whiz.
Enjoy.

name: Amazing Indian Lassi
directions: 1) Combine in a blender: Yogurt, Milk, Cracked Ice, and Sugar.
2) Peel, slice and chop up your mango into small quarter inch cubes.
3) Add Coconut, Mango, Rosewater and Cardamom to other ingredients in the blender.
4) Close blender lid and blend on highest setting for two minutes.
5) Check thickness, add more milk to thin it out or more yogurt to thicken it and blend 2 more minutes if you add anything to change thickness.
6) Pour and Enjoy!

name: Coconut Chocolate Smoothie
directions: STIR/BLEND coconut milk, cocoa, vanilla and honey for about 30 seconds.
Turn the blender to LIQUIFY/CRUSH ICE mode and start adding Ice cubes one at a time.
VOILA' !
**note:  the smoothie will be thin. you can add more ice but that will water it down.  If you prefer a thicker recipe, simply add either plain or coconut fat free yogurt :).

name: Homemade Coconut Milk
directions: Drain the water inside the coconut by drilling three holes in the soft three holes at the top of the coconut (there are youtube videos to show you how).   Then Crack your coconut!
After cracking coconut and peeling off the inner brown layer to expose only the white meat.
Cut meat into 1/2 inch chunks and add to blender along with remaining ingredients.
LIQUEFY for about 1 and a half.
Place cheese cloth over container/pitcher.  Poor mixture through cheese cloth and squeeze all the liquid out.
COCONUT MILK!
Use quickly, it only lasts a couple days refrigerated. :(.

name: Kid Lovin' Mango Coconut Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients together in a blender.
Add more honey or sugar as needed for your particular tastes.
Pour into glasses and serve.

name: Raspberry Revolution Smoothie (Nordstrom)
directions: In a blender with a powerful motor, first place the apple juice, followed by the frozen strawberries, and then the frozen raspberries.  Next add the raspberry sorbet, and top with the ice.

Cover the blender securely and blend on high speed for 35 seconds or longer (until a tornado-like vortex forms in the center).  Let the vortex swirl 10-15 seconds longer (to allow the drink to smooth out).
Pour into tall glasses and add sturdy straws.  Serve immediately.

name: Yogurt Pistachio Smoothies
directions: Blend yogurt, water, ginger, salted pistachios, pepper, and ice cubes until smooth.
Divide among glasses - garnish with finely chopped pistachios.

name: Mango Lassi Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients in the order listed in a blender.
Pulse twice to chop mango, stir well, then blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.
Ingredient Note: Orange-flower water is a perfumy distillation of bitter-orange blossoms. Look for it at gourmet markets.
Nutrition Bonus: Vitamin C (70% daily value), Vitamin A (15% dv)
Carbohydrate Servings: 2 1/2.
Exchanges: 2 1/2 fruit.

name: Blended Jazzberry
directions: Blend orange juice, gingerale, raspberries, ice cubes, and Amaretto and cream if using, together.

Enjoy!

name: BPC Cashew Milk Knockoff
directions: Soak cashews in water overnight.

Blend cashews and their water in a blender until smooth. If desired, strain through cheesecloth. (Cashews are soft enough that they blend almost completely into a liquid, so straining isn’t really necessary. I only sort-of strained it this time, and next time I probably won’t bother. The result is a kind of “chewy” drink, but I don’t mind that. Protein!).

Stir in remaining ingredients. To stay true to Blueprint, add only agave, vanilla and cinnamon. To take it up a notch (which I highly recommend!), make it chai by adding 1/2 teaspoon each ground nutmeg, ginger and cardamom.
Enjoy!

name: BPC Spicy Lemonade Juice Knockoff
directions: Juice.
Pour in a sealed jar.
Enjoy!

directions: Place all ingredients in the blender and blend until smooth.

directions: Put liquids and oatmeal into the blender, add Yogurt, coconut, cinnamon, nutmeg, and ginger, then add frozen fruits one at a time.

name: Coconut Rose Lassi
directions: blend all together.

name: Non-Dairy Fruit Smoothie
directions: Fill whatever size cup you want with ice.

Fill the cup the rest of the way with the Fruit Juice. I find, since we had a large harvest of Pomegranates this year, this recipe works well with natural Pomegranate juice.  But you can use any fruit juice.
Pour the ice-juice mixture into your blender container.
Peel and break the banana into the same blender container.
If using sweetener, and it to the blender container before processing.
Process until as smooth as you like.

name: Blueberry Milkshake
directions: put all ingredients in a blender or a food processor and blend together until creamy.
pour into cups and enjoy!

directions: 1. Place banana in freezer overnight.
2. Combine remaining ingredients and store in refrigerator overnight.
3. Add banana to mixture and blend.

name: Pumpkin Pie Smoothie (Vitamix)
directions: Place all the ingredients in the Vitamix container in order listed and secure the lid.
Run machine on variable speed #1, quickly increase to #10, then switch to high.
Allow machine to run 20-30 seconds or until smooth.
Top with whipped cream and a dust of cinnamon if desired.

name: 2 Ingerdient Orange Slushies
directions: Put some orange juice in a cup and put some crushed ice in another cup. Then put the crushed ice in the cup that the orange juice is in and ENJOY!

name: Chocolate Nutella Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients into a blender in the order listed and secure lid. Puree until smooth and creamy.
Note: If you are using a Blendtec, add ingredients as listed and select "ice crush" mode.

similar.name: Anything Goes Fruit and Nut Smoothie

name: Date Shake, Vegan
directions: Place all ingredients into a blender (preferably an industrial strength one) and blend until smooth, then serve.  If you don't have a frozen banana, use a regular banana and add a couple of ice cubes.

name: George of the Jungle
directions: In blender, combine ice cubes, banana, pineapple, mango, rum and coconut milk and blend until smooth.
Pour into prepared glasses and garnish with pineapple slices.

name: Vermont Maple Morning Smoothie
directions: In blender, combine yogurt, milk, apple, granola, maple syrup, vanilla and cinnamon and blend until smooth.
Divide between 2 glasses and serve.

similar.name: Anything Goes Fruit and Nut Smoothie

name: Carrot, Apple, and Ginger Refresher
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender; process 2 minutes or until smooth. Serve immediately.

name: Blueberry Power Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender; process until smooth.

name: Tropical Tofu Smoothie
directions: Place tofu in a blender; process until smooth. Add pineapple and next 4 ingredients (pineapple through sugar); process until smooth. Serve immediately. Sprinkle with nutmeg, if desired.

directions: Place all ingredients in a blender; process until smooth.

directions: Place all ingredients in a blender; process until smooth.

directions: Combine all ingredients in blender. Cover and blend until smooth.

name: Creamy Papaya and Coconut Milk Smoothie (Refresco De Lechosa)
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend on high until smooth.
Pour into glasses and garnish with lime slices.

name: Lucuma Banana Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.If the lucuma is frozen break it up in the bag before opening so it's in small enough chunks to blend.
Blend until completely smooth.Enjoy :).

name: Mixed Berry Sweet Smoothie
directions: Put blueberries, raspberries, and strawberries in a blender. If strawberries aren't in season, hold off on the yogurt.
Blend the fruit for 30 seconds.
Add the vanilla yogurt (and strawberry yogurt) and blend it for 1 minute.
Add honey, ice, and sugar and blend for 30 seconds. The sugar is optional if honey is already sweet enough for you.

name: Exotic Green Smoothie
directions: Put ingredients in a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Tropical Breeze Smoothie
directions: In blender, combine all ingredients. Pour into glasses and garnish with orange slices.

name: Green Machine Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
Pour into a glass and serve with a straw.

name: Pumpkin Smoothie
directions: In blender puree all ingredients until smooth. Pour into two glasses and serve.

name: Super C Smoothie
directions: In blender, puree all ingredients until smooth. Pour into two glasses and serve.

name: Fuzzy Navel Smoothies
directions: In the container of a blender, combine peaches, nectar, yogurt, orange juice, and sugar.
Process until smooth.
Garnish with orange slices.

name: Chocolate Green Smoothie
directions: 1. Freeze almond milk in ice cube trays ahead of time.
2. Add all the ingredients to a high-speed blender and process until smooth.

name: Low Carb Green Smoothie
directions: I use my Ninja blender cup but a regular blender is fine, just be sure to use something that can blend the frozen berries. I add the berries first (I like to use strawberries and blueberries), the packed spinach 2nd (I probably use more than the 1 cup), then add the Splenda  and Crystal Light. Blend till smoothe then add yogurt and blend again. You may need to adjust amounts to get it to your desired consistency. Serve and enjoy!

name: Slammin' Sunrise "Green" Smoothie
directions: Blend everything in the blender.
Garnish with a strawberry.
Enjoy!
(note - servings are large).

name: Avocado Smoothies
directions: 1.	Remove the flesh from the avocados and mash it well.
2.	Add a cup of water to the mashed avocados and put in the freezer overnight.
3.	Blend all of the ingredients together to the consistency of a thick smoothie.
4.	Serve in tall glasses and garnish with fresh mint.

name: Spirulina, Quick Oats, Mango and Ginger Smoothie
directions: Cook the quick oats according the to instructions to avoid under cooked oats and excess water.
Once cooked add the oats to a blender with the rest of the ingredients and blend until pureed.

name: Frozen Strawberry Daiquiri Mix (Alcohol & Non-Alcohol)
directions: Combine sugar, lime juice and water in a bowl. Stir to mix and then let stand until sugar is almost completely dissolved, about 15 minutes (mixture will be thick).
In a blender or food processor, combine the sugar and lime juice with the berries (stems removed). Blend until smooth.

Pour the mixture into ice cube trays and freeze until firm, then unmold and pack into resealable freezer bags.  Alternately, pack into freezer containers and freeze.  Mixture will become solid, but will have consistency of a very firm sherbet, so you'll be able to scoop portions from main batch, then reseal mixture and store again in freezer.

For each strawberry daiquiri: In blender jar, combine 3 tablespoons rum (light or dark), 1/4 cup Frozen Strawberry Daiquiri Mix (2 average-sized cubes that have been frozen in ice cube trays) and about 3/4 cup of ice cubes (7 or 8 average sized cubes). Blend until smooth.  For a non-alcoholic frozen drink, replace the rum with unsweetened pineapple juice.

For a Strawberry Pina Colada: In blender jar, combine 3 tablespoons rum (light or dark), 1/4 cup Frozen Strawberry Daiquiri Mix, 3 tablespoons unsweetened pineapple juice, 1 tablespoon coconut cream and about 3/4 cup of ice cubes. For a non-alcoholic version, omit the rum.

name: Heavy Metal Detox and Energiser Smoothie
directions: Wash the cilantro and spinach if need be.
Add all the ingredients to a blender and mix until smooth.
Enjoy energy & the road becoming healthier.

name: Tummy Soothing Smoothie
directions: Put all the ingredients together and blend until smooth.

name: Pecan, Banana, Spirulina, Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients to a blender and blend until smooth.

similar.name: Anything Goes Fruit and Nut Smoothie

name: Egg(Less) Nog
directions: Soak the chia seeds in 1 cup of almond milk in the blender for 5-10 minutes.  Add the rest of the ingredients and blend.  Chill in the fridge for a couple of hours.  Serve with a little extra cinnamon and nutmeg sprinkled on top.

name: The Plan Smoothie
directions: Add Rice Dream or Silk coconut milk to a blender, then add pear, berries, avocado, ice, and any optional ingredients desired. Blend until smooth.

similar.name: There's No Fruit in the House Smoothie

name: Autumn Smoothie
directions: Puree the ingredients in a blender or food processor until smooth.

name: Chocolate Nut Butter Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients in a blender. That's it.

similar.name: Anything Goes Fruit and Nut Smoothie

name: Coconut Banana Cream Pie Smoothie
directions: Put all in blender, pulverize. :').
Another optional ingredient is Walden Farms Marshmallow dip. Throw in a few tablespoons for a gooey marshmallow texture to taste!

name: Mexican Chocolate Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Mix everything together except the banana, and leave in the fridge overnight.
When you are ready to eat breakfast, put the mixture in a blender with the banana, and blitz until smooth.

similar.name: Ultra Thick Minty Vegan Chocobanana Bliss

name: Feeling Blue Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Mix all in a blender until smooth. I prefer to use frozen blueberries,,but whatever you have is just fine.

similar.name: Blueberry Protein Breakfast Smoothie With Greens

name: Berry Chia Smoothie
directions: Put all ingrenents in a blender or Ninja and blend until smooth. Stir in chia seeds.

name: Three Berry Spinach Smoothie
directions: Add the orange juice and raspberries to the blender and puree.  I'm not a fan of the raspberry seeds so at this point I will use a strainer to remove the seeds.  If you are ok with seeds then add spinach; blend.  Add strawberries; blend.  Add blueberries; blend.  Pour into glass.  Enjoy!
You can add ice cubes if you prefer a icy smoothie or use 1/2 cup of orange juice for thicker consistency.

name: Pineapple Banana Smoothie
directions: Pour in 1 cup of milk.
Add Half of the banana.
Blend.
While still blending take out the center piece of the blender and add the other half of the banana.
Take off the lid of the blender and add the yogurt
Mix for 30 seconds.

name: Candances Alligater Swamp Drink
directions: Blend spinach, banana, applesauce and ice together for 3 minutes until smooth.

name: Natural Energy Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in blend.
For a smoother consistency, first blend just figs, honey, cinnamon, and 1/2 cup almond milk until smooth. Then add remaining ingredients and blend.

name: Green Yumminess (Vitamix)
directions: Place all ingredients in Vitamix.
I started with 1/2 cup of water, but I prefer it a little thinner and ended up with approximately 1 cup of water.
Started on #1 and went up to #7 slow progression until desired consistency.

name: Beet-Grapefruit-Apple Smoothie
directions: Slice the beet and apple and juice the grapefruit.
Put fruit and veg in blender and pulse for a couple of seconds.
Add ice cubes and as much OJ as you like (I use 1/4 cup) to make it smooth.
Blend for half a minute.
Pour. Enjoy!

name: Walnut-Date Smoothie
directions: TIP: SOAK dates overnight (in water) BEFORE blending. If you don't mind date bits in your smoothie, you can skip this step.
Combine everything except the ice in a blender and blend on high until the dates are broken up and the mixture very smooth, at least 1 minute.
Add ice and blend briefly on high until ice is just broken up. Pour into chilled glasses and serve immediately.

name: Fresh Peppermint Juice
directions: Mix in blender,  serve in glass with lots of ice. Enjoy.

name: Kefir Banana Smoothie
directions: Pop all the ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
Enjoy!

similar.name: One Honey of a Banana-Peach Smoothie

name: Chocolate Berry Blast Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients except whey protein at high speed.  Add Action Whey and blend at lower setting.  Serve and enjoy!

similar.name: Berry Blast Protein Shake -- Fruit Smoothie

In place of the lime juice, substitute Meyer lemon juice, Key lime juice, or grapefruit juice.  You can also try adding a splash of ginger ale or sparkling water for a little fizz.

Pour into your favorite glasses and serve immediately.

name: Breakfast Chocolate Protein Smoothie

name: Morning  Power Smoothie, Chocolate
directions: Put all of the above ingredients in a Vitamix or other high speed blender.  I have never used anything but a Vitamix and it comes out perfectly smooth with one.  I can't vouch for any others.

Note, that the stevia is two dropperfuls -- not two drops.  I have tried different types of stevia and have a definite preference for Sweetleaf liquid.  This is also good with hazelnut stevia (instead of vanilla).

Variation-  sometimes I add a teaspoon of coffee granules for a frozen mocha.  Sometimes I add a tiny bit of peppermint extract.  Sometimes I use carob instead of cocoa and add the peppermint (the carob mint is good, but not a fan of the plain carob).
For an immunity boost, I also often add water kefir grains.  They don't affect the taste.  I realize many people don't have those, but if you do -- they make a great addition  -- 2 teaspoons or so.
Add enough ice to make it thick, about 2-3 cups.

name: Dairy Free Super Food Avocado Smoothie
directions: I simply poor everything into a jar and let my stick blender at it until it's a nice creamy texture, and I don't see any chunks. Sometimes I have to add more milk if it's a bit thick, especially if I added berries. My yield is usually about 1 3/4 of a cup but it's not exact. When I have them, I love adding frozen berries for a frosty treat and the added nutrients; I especially love blueberries. The brands I usually use are Silk Pure Almond original flavor almond milk (but I like coconut almond too), Spectrum Decadent Blend Chia & Flax Seed with coconut & cocoa (when I don't have that I will usually still add about 1 tsp chia seeds and a bit of coconut if I have any) and Garden of Life Alkalizer & Detoxifier RAW Organic Green Super Food grass powder.

name: Pecan-Sunflower Seed Milk - Milk Does a Body Good
directions: In blender, mix nuts, seeds and water. (The less water used, the creamier milk becomes).

Pour mixture into a nut milk bag. (you can also use paint bags found at Lowes or Home Depot, or use cheesecloth).Gently squeeze liquid from pulp into a bowl. Be careful not to apply too much pressure on bag, but be firm. Once you have done so, empty pulp into a zip lock bag and freeze. When you collect enough pulp, spread on a non-stick dehydrator tray, covered with a mesh sheet, and dehydrate @ 110 degrees F for 8-12 hours or until dry. Crumble or run through ginder or dry blade and use as almond flour. I store flour in glass mason jars, in freezer.
Pour milk back into blender and add dates and extract. Feel free to add fruit or chia seeds to thicken. Drink as is, or use a a base for smoothies.

name: Perfect Strawberry Daiquiris
directions: Place sugar in blender and blend for 30 seconds.
Add lime and rum. Blend for 1 minute or until sugar has mostly dissolved.

Add frozen strawberries. If you have a blender with lower horsepower, you may want to partially thaw the strawberries before adding. Blend on your ice-crushing speed until the strawberries have been pureed.
Add two cups of crushed ice and blend on the crushing speed until all ingredients are fully broken down and incorporated.

This is a very versatile recipe. I have experimented with less rum and more rum, more and less sugar, and added a tiny bit of water when I wanted a thinner drink. This is how I prefer it, but don't be shy about adjusting alcohol and sugar to your personal preference. ENJOY!

directions: Makes 10 rainbow smoothies.
You will need to blend each layer separately, so simply rinse out your blender between each smoothie.

For each smoothie layer, combine all ingredients in blender and blend until smooth. Pour a small, even layer into all 10 glasses. Rinse blender, make next layer and pour a small, equal layer on top of the previous color. Repeat until finished with the blue layer on top and serve with fun straws!

directions: Combine the frozen blueberries, yogurt, almond milk, peanut butter, and flax seed in a blender. Pulse until smooth.
Pour into a bowl and place in the freezer for 10 minutes to set. This prevents toppings from sinking.
Remove smoothie bowl from freezer, garnish as desired.
Enjoy immediately.

name: My Go to Green Morning Smoothie
directions: in a large blender, add greens and 1 cup of water.
Process until smooth and then add the rest of the ingredients.
Keep adding water until you get your desired consistency.
Pour into five mason or canning jars remember to leave space at the top if freezing.

name: Moroccan Avocado Almond Smoothie
directions: Slide the avocado from the skin and place in blender.
Add the milk and sugar and blend until there are no pieces of avocado remaining.
*** NOTE: It is very important that the avocado is ripe or else it won't blend well. The consistency should be thick but smooth. You can add more milk if you prefer a thinner smoothie.

name: KIWI RASPBERRY SMOOTHIE
directions: In a small skillet over medium heat, toast wheat germ for about 2 ½ to 3 minutes. Remove from the heat to cool off.
In a jar of a blender, combine kiwifruits, raspberries, apple juice, yogurt, almond milk, protein powder, agave nectar and 1 ½ tablespoons toasted wheat germ; process until smooth.
Pour in glasses and sprinkle wheat germ on top. Makes 5 cups.

name: Healthy Green Smoothie
directions: In the jar of a blender, add banana, mango, kiwifruits, almond milk, orange juice, dried basil leaves, ground flax seed and agave nectar. Process until well blended.
Pour it in glasses and garnish with ¼ teaspoons chopped pistachios per glass. Serve immediately.

name: Summertime Frozen rose
directions: Pour the rosé into ice cube trays and freeze until solid, 8 hours or overnight.
Combine the strawberries and the sugar in a blender and let sit at room temperature for about 10 minutes or so, until the berries begin to release their juices.
Add the vodka, grenadine, and rosé cubes. Blend the mixture on high until smooth. Pour into glasses and garnish with strawberries and lemon slices.

similar.name: Aarsi’s Ultimate Strawberry and Rose Lassi

name: Prosecco Slushies
directions: I blender, combine prosecco, lime juice, vodka, and strawberries. Fill blender about halfway full with ice and blend until mixture is slushy.
Divide between 4 glasses and garnish with mint and fresh strawberries.

name: Caribbean Smoothie
directions: In the jar of a blender, add banana, pineapple, mango, almond milk, and agave nectar; process until the ingredients are well blended and the mixture is smooth.
Taste and adjust if necessary before serving. Serve 4.

name: TROPICAL SUNSHINE SMOOTHIE
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
Taste and adjust if necessary. Add agave nectar if needed. Makes 2 servings.
